items.title: TAIDL: Tensor Accelerator ISA Definition Language with Auto-generation of Scalable Test Oracles.
items.abstract:
With the increasing importance of deep learning workloads, many hardware accelerators have been proposed in both academia and industry. However, software tooling for the vast majority of them does not exist compared to the software ecosystem and innovations proposed for established platforms such as CPUs and GPUs. We observed that the lack of well-defined hardware-software interfaces and correctness testing tools like fast and scalable test oracles (also known as functional simulators) act as significant barriers to adopting these emerging accelerators in the software community. These interfaces and tools are essential in building software such as retargetable compilers and optimized kernels.

To bridge these gaps, we first present TAIDL , an instruction specification language that provides novel constructs to describe the instruction set architectures (ISAs) of tensor accelerators. Next, given ISA definitions in TAIDL , we introduce techniques to automatically generate fast and scalable test oracles for diverse sets of accelerators, which are needed for testing software correctness of code that targets pre-silicon hardware designs. Automated generation of such tools reduces the burden on hardware architects and the repeated development efforts required across different accelerator platforms. Further, our techniques allow us to execute these simulators on GPUs, leading to highly scalable simulations. To demonstrate the expressivity of TAIDL , we instantiated several tensor accelerator ISAs with different compute capabilities and memory hierarchies. Further, we show that test oracles generated using TAIDL definitions are orders of magnitude faster and more scalable than existing instruction-level functional simulators, making them suitable for integration into software development cycles. TAIDL is available at https://github.com/act-compiler/taidl.
items.abstract_zh:
随着深度学习工作负载的重要性日益增加，学术界和工业界都提出了许多硬件加速器。然而，与针对 CPU 和 GPU 等既定平台提出的软件生态系统和创新相比，其中绝大多数的软件工具并不存在。我们观察到，缺乏明确定义的硬件软件接口和正确性测试工具（例如快速且可扩展的测试预言机（也称为功能模拟器））是在软件社区中采用这些新兴加速器的重大障碍。这些接口和工具对于构建可重定向编译器和优化内核等软件至关重要。

为了弥补这些差距，我们首先提出 TAIDL，这是一种指令规范语言，它提供了新颖的结构来描述张量加速器的指令集架构 (ISA)。接下来，根据 TAIDL 中的 ISA 定义，我们介绍了为不同的加速器组自动生成快速且可扩展的测试预言机的技术，这些技术是测试针对硅前硬件设计的代码的软件正确性所必需的。此类工具的自动生成减轻了硬件架构师的负担，并减少了跨不同加速器平台所需的重复开发工作。此外，我们的技术允许我们在 GPU 上执行这些模拟器，从而实现高度可扩展的模拟。为了演示 TAIDL 的表达能力，我们实例化了几个具有不同计算能力和内存层次结构的张量加速器 ISA。此外，我们还表明，使用 TAIDL 定义生成的测试预言机比现有的指令级功能模拟器要快几个数量级，并且更具可扩展性，这使得它们适合集成到软件开发周期中。 TAIDL 可在 https://github.com/act-compiler/taidl 上获取。

items.title: Leveraging Chiplet-Locality for Efficient Memory Mapping in Multi-Chip Module GPUs.
items.abstract:
While the multi-chip module (MCM) design allows GPUs to scale compute and memory capabilities through multi-chip integration, it introduces memory system non-uniformity, particularly when a thread accesses resources in remote chiplets. In this work, we investigate how page size in memory mapping affects this non-uniformity. Large pages reduce address translation overhead by covering larger memory regions per TLB entry; however, they enforce coarse-grained data placement, which can lead to data misallocation across chiplets. In contrast, small pages allow for finer-grained placement, increasing the likelihood of mapping data to the chiplet most likely to access it. We observe that application performance is sensitive to page size, with the appropriate configuration depending on workload characteristics.

This paper introduces CLAP which determines the suitable page size—specifically, how much data should be co-located within a single chiplet-for each application. We observe that GPU applications exhibit a distinct memory mapping pattern, in which specific groups of virtually adjacent pages are primarily accessed by the same chiplet with the group size tending to remain consistent -a property referred to as chiplet-locality . Leveraging this insight, CLAP predicts groups of pages exhibit chiplet-locality and pre-organizes them to contiguous physical frames within the chiplet most likely to access them. This organization forms regions that behave like large pages, as CLAP enables these page groups to be covered by a single merged TLB entry through deliberate virtual-to-physical contiguity. As a result, CLAP delivers the benefits of large pages without compromising chiplet-level memory locality. Our evaluation shows that CLAP improves performance by up to 19.2% compared to previous paging schemes.
items.abstract_zh:
虽然多芯片模块 (MCM) 设计允许 GPU 通过多芯片集成来扩展计算和内存能力，但它会引入内存系统的不一致性，特别是当线程访问远程小芯片中的资源时。在这项工作中，我们研究了内存映射中的页面大小如何影响这种不均匀性。大页面通过覆盖每个 TLB 条目更大的内存区域来减少地址转换开销；然而，它们强制执行粗粒度的数据放置，这可能导致小芯片之间的数据错误分配。相比之下，小页面允许更细粒度的放置，从而增加将数据映射到最有可能访问它的小芯片的可能性。我们观察到应用程序性能对页面大小敏感，并根据工作负载特征进行适当的配置。

本文介绍了 CLAP，它可以确定每个应用程序的合适页面大小（具体来说，在单个小芯片中应共存多少数据）。我们观察到 GPU 应用程序表现出独特的内存映射模式，其中虚拟相邻页面的特定组主要由同一小芯片访问，且组大小往往保持一致 - 这种属性称为小芯片局部性。利用这种洞察力，CLAP 预测页面组表现出小芯片局部性，并将它们预先组织到最有可能访问它们的小芯片内的连续物理帧。这种组织形成了行为类似于大页面的区域，因为 CLAP 使这些页面组能够通过有意的虚拟到物理连续性由单个合并的 TLB 条目覆盖。因此，CLAP 提供了大页面的优势，而不会影响小芯片级内存局部性。我们的评估表明，与之前的寻呼方案相比，CLAP 的性能提高了高达 19.2%。

items.title: NetZIP: Algorithm/Hardware Co-design of In-network Lossless Compression for Distributed Large Model Training.
items.abstract: In distributed large model training, the long communication time required to exchange large volumes of gradients and activations among GPUs dominates the training time. To reduce the communication times, lossy or lossless compression of gradients and/or activations can be employed. However, lossy compression of gradients and activations may demand more training iterations to achieve the same model accuracy and cause convergence failure, respectively. Lossless compression, on the other hand, may not reduce the volumes of gradients and activations enough to offset the significant latency associated with compression and decompression on current platforms. To address these challenges, we propose NetZIP , an algorithm/hardware co-design for in-network lossless compression of both gradients and activations. NetZIP consists of two components. (1) NetZIP -algorithm transforms gradients and activations at the bit and value levels to help lightweight standard lossless compression achieve more compression of the gradients and activations. (2) NetZIP -accelerator integrates NetZIP -algorithm with a lightweight lossless compression accelerator within a NIC in a bump-in-the-wire fashion to reduce the compression/decompression latency under the resource constraints. NetZIP -algorithm compresses gradients and activations 40–63 and 43–75 percentage points more, respectively, than heavy standard lossless compression for Llama-3 70B, GPT-3 175B, and Llama-3 405B. NetZIP -accelerator, implemented within FPGA-NICs and connected to commodity servers, provides orders of magnitude lower latency for compression and decompression, respectively, than the lowest latency achieved by the standard lossless compression on current platforms. With greater compression of both gradients and activations, and lower latency for compression and decompression than the standard lossless compression, NetZIP provides 35% lower training time.
items.abstract_zh: 在分布式大型模型训练中，GPU 之间交换大量梯度和激活所需的较长通信时间主导了训练时间。为了减少通信时间，可以采用梯度和/或激活的有损或无损压缩。然而，梯度和激活的有损压缩可能需要更多的训练迭代才能达到相同的模型精度，并分别导致收敛失败。另一方面，无损压缩可能无法减少足够的梯度和激活量来抵消当前平台上与压缩和解压缩相关的显着延迟。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 NetZIP，这是一种用于梯度和激活的网络内无损压缩的算法/硬件协同设计。 NetZIP 由两个组件组成。 (1) NetZIP算法在位和值级别上变换梯度和激活，以帮助轻量级标准无损压缩实现梯度和激活的更多压缩。 (2) NetZIP加速器将NetZIP算法与NIC内的轻量级无损压缩加速器以线内凸块的方式集成，以减少资源限制下的压缩/解压缩延迟。对于 Llama-3 70B、GPT-3 175B 和 Llama-3 405B，NetZIP 算法比重度标准无损压缩的梯度和激活值分别高出 40-63 和 43-75 个百分点。 NetZIP 加速器在 FPGA-NIC 内实现并连接到商用服务器，与当前平台上标准无损压缩实现的最低延迟相比，压缩和解压缩延迟分别降低了几个数量级。与标准无损压缩相比，NetZIP 对梯度和激活的压缩程度更高，压缩和解压缩的延迟更低，训练时间缩短了 35%。

items.title: Rasengan: A Transition Hamiltonian-based Approximation Algorithm for Solving Constrained Binary Optimization Problems.
items.abstract: Constrained binary optimization is a representative NP-hard problem in various domains, including engineering, scheduling, and finance. Variational quantum algorithms (VQAs) provide a promising methodology for solving this problem by integrating the power of quantum parallelism and classical optimizer. However, existing methods fail to achieve both high accuracy and low circuit complexity, rendering it impossible to deploy onto current quantum devices. This paper proposes Rasengan, a high-precision and deployable approach that leverages algorithm-hardware codesign for solving constrained optimization problems. Unlike traditional VQAs that shrink the whole space and locate the possible solutions in a superposition state, our key idea is to expand the search space from one feasible solution and precisely identify the optimal solution in a basis state. Specifically, we propose the transition Hamiltonian that exponentially explores the entire feasible solution space with all combinations of homogeneous basis vectors. We then introduce three optimization techniques, which greatly reduce the circuit complexity when implementing the Hamiltonian simulation, including Hamiltonian simplification and pruning, segmented execution, and solution purification. Experiments demonstrate that Rasengan improves the accuracy by 4.12 × compared to SOTA QAOA [ 43 ] and exhibits 379 × improvement on real-world quantum platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 约束二元优化是工程、调度和金融等各个领域中具有代表性的 NP 难题。变分量子算法（VQA）通过集成量子并行性和经典优化器的力量，为解决这一问题提供了一种有前景的方法。然而，现有的方法无法同时实现高精度和低电路复杂性，导致无法部署到当前的量子设备上。本文提出了Rasengan，一种高精度且可部署的方法，利用算法-硬件协同设计来解决约束优化问题。与传统的 VQA 缩小整个空间并在叠加状态下定位可能的解不同，我们的关键思想是从一个可行解扩展搜索空间，并在基础状态下精确识别最优解。具体来说，我们提出了转移哈密顿量，它以指数方式探索具有齐次基向量的所有组合的整个可行解空间。然后我们介绍了三种优化技术，这些技术大大降低了实现哈密顿模拟时的电路复杂性，包括哈密顿简化和剪枝、分段执行和解纯化。实验表明，与 SOTA QAOA [43] 相比，Rasengan 的精度提高了 4.12 倍，并且在现实世界的量子平台上表现出 379 倍的提高。

items.title: DS-TIDE: Harnessing Dynamical Systems for Efficient Time-Independent Differential Equation Solving.
items.abstract:
Time-Independent Differential Equations (TIDEs) are central to modeling equilibrium behavior across a wide range of scientific and engineering domains. Conventional numerical solvers offer reliable solutions but incur significant computational costs due to fine-grained discretization and iterative procedures. Machine learning–based approaches address this by replacing iterative solving with one-time inference; however, they inevitably sacrifice accuracy and incur even higher costs once the training of sophisticated models is taken into account. Consequently, designing a TIDE solver that achieves high accuracy, broad applicability, and exceptional computational efficiency remains a fundamental challenge.

In this paper, we propose DS-TIDE, a novel hardware solver that is inspired by, and subsequently leverages, the intrinsic connection between Dynamical Systems (DS) and Differential Equations (DE) to efficiently and accurately solve TIDEs. DS-TIDE employs a CMOS-compatible DS-based processor, whose physical states evolve under carefully designed DE-driven dynamics and naturally converge to equilibria – the solutions of the target TIDE within ∼ 1 μs . To enhance expressivity, DS-TIDE incorporates Heterogeneous Dynamics with Temporal Layering (HDTL), which solves TIDEs through a three-stage DS evolution – conditioning, solving, and decoding – each governed by specialized dynamics. The entire evolution process is analogous to an infinitely deep neural network temporally unrolled, offering the system the capability of representing complex equations. Furthermore, DS-TIDE is equipped with an on-device DS-DE alignment mechanism that dynamically adapts intrinsic hardware dynamics within milliseconds, effectively aligning the system’s dynamics to diverse target DEs. Experimental results across TIDEs from a wide range of scientific and engineering domains demonstrate that DS-TIDE achieves ∼ 10 3 × efficiency improvement while delivering competitive or superior accuracy compared to state-of-the-art numerical and ML-based solvers.
items.abstract_zh:
与时间无关的微分方程 (TIDE) 是对广泛的科学和工程领域的平衡行为进行建模的核心。传统的数值求解器提供可靠的解决方案，但由于细粒度的离散化和迭代过程，会产生大量的计算成本。基于机器学习的方法通过用一次性推理代替迭代求解来解决这一问题；然而，一旦考虑到复杂模型的训练，它们不可避免地会牺牲准确性并产生更高的成本。因此，设计一个具有高精度、广泛适用性和卓越计算效率的 TIDE 求解器仍然是一个基本挑战。

在本文中，我们提出了 DS-TIDE，这是一种新型硬件求解器，其灵感来自于动力系统 (DS) 和微分方程 (DE) 之间的内在联系，并随后利用它们来高效、准确地求解 TIDE。 DS-TIDE 采用与 CMOS 兼容的基于 DS 的处理器，其物理状态在精心设计的 DE 驱动动力学下演化，并自然收敛到平衡点，即目标 TIDE 在 ∼ 1 μs 内的解。为了增强表现力，DS-TIDE 将异构动力学与时间分层 (HDTL) 相结合，通过三阶段 DS 演化（调节、求解和解码）来解决 TIDE，每个阶段都由专门的动力学控制。整个演化过程类似于临时展开的无限深度神经网络，为系统提供了表示复杂方程的能力。此外，DS-TIDE配备了设备上的DS-DE对齐机制，可以在几毫秒内动态调整固有的硬件动态，有效地将系统的动态与不同的目标DE对齐。来自广泛科学和工程领域的 TIDE 实验结果表明，与最先进的数值和基于 ML 的求解器相比，DS-TIDE 实现了约 10 3 × 的效率提升，同时提供具有竞争力或卓越的精度。

items.title: Athena: Accelerating Quantized Convolutional Neural Networks under Fully Homomorphic Encryption.
items.abstract: Deep learning under FHE is difficult due to two aspects: (1) formidable amount of ciphertext computations like convolutions, so frequent bootstrapping is inevitable which in turn exacerbates the problem; (2) lack of the support to various non-linear functions in terms of the diversity and accuracy. Previous work primarily used the CKKS-based approach, which requires large parameters and places a heavy burden on the hardware. In this paper, we propose Athena, including a novel framework targeting quantized convolutional neural networks under FHE, and a specialized accelerator to release the maximum potential of the framework. Unlike the classic CKKS-based approach, Athena only requires much smaller parameters, i.e., 2 15 degree and approximately 5 MB ciphertext size. Athena uses a uniform representation, functional bootstrapping, to accurately support any type of activation functions, and is not limited to polynomial approximate fitted functions such as ReLU and sigmoid. We highlight the following results: (1) the accuracy varies by \(+0.01\%\;/-0.24 \%\) compared with the plaintext quantized CNN; (2) the inference performance on the Athena accelerator achieves a speedup of 1.5 × to 2.3 ×, an EDAP improvement of 3.8 × to 9.9 ×, compared with state-of-the-art FHE accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: FHE下的深度学习之所以困难，主要有两个方面：（1）卷积等密文计算量巨大，频繁的自举（bootstrapping）是不可避免的，这反过来又加剧了问题； (2)缺乏对各种非线性函数的多样性和准确性的支持。之前的工作主要使用基于CKKS的方法，该方法需要较大的参数并且对硬件造成沉重的负担。在本文中，我们提出了 Athena，包括一个针对 FHE 下的量化卷积神经网络的新颖框架，以及一个专门的加速器来释放该框架的最大潜力。与经典的基于 CKKS 的方法不同，Athena 只需要小得多的参数，即 2×15 度和大约 5 MB 的密文大小。 Athena 使用统一表示法（函数自举）来精确支持任何类型的激活函数，并且不限于 ReLU 和 sigmoid 等多项式近似拟合函数。我们强调以下结果：（1）与明文量化 CNN 相比，准确率变化 \(+0.01\%\;/-0.24 \%\)； (2) 与最先进的 FHE 加速器相比，Athena 加速器的推理性能实现了 1.5 倍至 2.3 倍的加速比，EDAP 提升了 3.8 倍至 9.9 倍。

items.title: Learning to Walk: Architecting Learned Virtual Memory Translation.
items.abstract: The rise in memory demands of emerging datacenter applications has placed virtual memory translation in the spotlight, exposing it as a significant performance bottleneck. To address this problem, this paper introduces Learned Virtual Memory (LVM) , a page table structure that effectively provides optimal single-access address translation . LVM is founded on a novel learned index model that dynamically adapts the address translation procedure based on the characteristics of an application’s virtual address space. Furthermore, LVM’s learned index requires minimal memory space, does not impose stringent physical contiguity requirements, enjoys high cacheability in the MMU, efficiently supports insertions, and relies on simple fixed-point arithmetic. Finally, LVM supports all features of virtual memory, including multiple page sizes. We evaluate LVM with a set of operating system (OS) extensions in Linux, RTL synthesis, and full-system simulations across a wide range of workloads. LVM reduces the address translation overhead by an average of 44% over radix page tables, while reducing the page walk cache area required by 1.5 ×. Overall, LVM achieves a 2-27% speedup in application execution time and is within 1% of an ideal page table.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴数据中心应用程序内存需求的增长使虚拟内存转换成为人们关注的焦点，使其成为一个重要的性能瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，本文引入了学习虚拟内存（LVM），这是一种有效提供最佳单访问地址转换的页表结构。 LVM 基于一种新颖的学习索引模型，该模型根据应用程序虚拟地址空间的特征动态调整地址转换过程。此外，LVM的学习索引需要最小的内存空间，不施加严格的物理连续性要求，在MMU中享有高缓存能力，有效地支持插入，并且依赖于简单的定点运算。最后，LVM 支持虚拟内存的所有功能，包括多种页面大小。我们使用 Linux 中的一组操作系统 (OS) 扩展、RTL 综合以及跨各种工作负载的全系统模拟来评估 LVM。与基页表相比，LVM 平均减少了 44% 的地址转换开销，同时将所需的页遍历缓存区域减少了 1.5 倍。总体而言，LVM 在应用程序执行时间方面实现了 2-27% 的加速，并且与理想页表的差距在 1% 以内。

items.title: Distributed-HISQ: A Distributed Quantum Control Architecture.
items.abstract:
The design of a scalable Quantum Control Architecture (QCA) faces two primary challenges. First, the continuous growth in qubit counts has rendered distributed QCA inevitable, yet the non-deterministic latencies inherent in feedback loops demand cycle-accurate synchronization across multiple controllers. Existing synchronization strategies — whether lock-step or demand-driven — introduce significant performance penalties. Second, existing quantum instruction set architectures are polarized, being either too abstract or too granular. This lack of a unifying design necessitates recurrent hardware customization for each new control requirement, which limits the system’s reconfigurability and impedes the path toward a scalable and unified digital microarchitecture.

Addressing these challenges, we propose Distributed-HISQ , featuring: (i) HISQ, A universal instruction set that redefines quantum control with a hardware-agnostic design. By decoupling from quantum operation semantics, HISQ provides a unified language for control sequences, enabling a single microarchitecture to support various control methods and enhancing system reconfigurability. (ii) BISP , a booking-based synchronization protocol that can potentially achieve zero-cycle synchronization overhead. The feasibility and adaptability of Distributed-HISQ are validated through its implementation on a commercial quantum control system targeting superconducting qubits. We performed a comprehensive evaluation using a customized quantum software stack. Our results show that BISP effectively synchronizes multiple control boards, leading to a 22.8% reduction in average program execution time and a ∼ 5 × reduction in infidelity when compared to an existing lock-step synchronization scheme.
items.abstract_zh:
可扩展的量子控制架构 (QCA) 的设计面临两个主要挑战。首先，量子比特数量的持续增长使得分布式 QCA 不可避免，但反馈循环中固有的非确定性延迟要求跨多个控制器实现周期精确的同步。现有的同步策略（无论是锁步还是需求驱动）都会带来严重的性能损失。其次，现有的量子指令集架构是两极分化的，要么过于抽象，要么过于细化。由于缺乏统一的设计，需要针对每个新的控制要求进行经常性的硬件定制，这限制了系统的可重新配置性，并阻碍了通往可扩展和统一数字微架构的道路。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了分布式 HISQ，其特点是：（i）HISQ，一种通用指令集，通过与硬件无关的设计重新定义了量子控制。通过与量子操作语义解耦，HISQ提供了统一的控制序列语言，使单一微架构能够支持多种控制方法，增强系统的可重构性。 (ii) BISP，一种基于预订的同步协议，有可能实现零周期同步开销。 Distributed-HISQ 的可行性和适应性通过其在针对超导量子位的商业量子控制系统上的实现得到了验证。我们使用定制的量子软件堆栈进行了全面评估。我们的结果表明，与现有的锁步同步方案相比，BISP 有效地同步了多个控制板，平均程序执行时间减少了 22.8%，不保真度减少了约 5 倍。

items.title: Crane: Inter-Layer Scheduling Framework for DNN Inference and Training Co-Support on Tiled Architecture.
items.abstract:
Tiled architectures have emerged as a compelling platform for scaling deep neural network (DNN) execution, offering both compute density and communication efficiency. To harness their full potential, effective inter-layer scheduling is crucial for managing operation order, memory behavior, and compute resource coordination. However, current schedulers often fall short due to three persistent issues: incomplete treatment of core design factors, limited flexibility in handling diverse workload structures, and reliance on heuristic search algorithms with poor convergence.

In this work, we trace these limitations to the absence of a unified and expressive scheduling representation. We introduce Crane , a framework that addresses these gaps through a hierarchical table-format abstraction capable of encoding rich scheduling semantics. Crane supports both inference and training workloads, and reformulates scheduling as a mathematically structured optimization problem, enabling more complete and efficient exploration of the scheduling space. Evaluations show that Crane reduces energy-delay product by up to 21.01 × and improves scheduling speed by at least 2.82 × over state-of-the-art baselines.
items.abstract_zh:
平铺架构已成为扩展深度神经网络 (DNN) 执行的引人注目的平台，可提供计算密度和通信效率。为了充分发挥其潜力，有效的层间调度对于管理操作顺序、内存行为和计算资源协调至关重要。然而，当前的调度程序常常由于三个长期存在的问题而达不到要求：对核心设计因素的处理不完整、处理不同工作负载结构的灵活性有限以及依赖于收敛性差的启发式搜索算法。

在这项工作中，我们将这些限制追溯到缺乏统一且富有表现力的调度表示。我们引入了 Crane，这是一个框架，它通过能够编码丰富的调度语义的分层表格式抽象来解决这些差距。 Crane 支持推理和训练工作负载，并将调度重新表述为数学结构的优化问题，从而能够更完整、更高效地探索调度空间。评估表明，与最先进的基准相比，Crane 将能量延迟乘积减少了高达 21.01 倍，并将调度速度提高了至少 2.82 倍。

items.title: Vegapunk: Accurate and Fast Decoding for Quantum LDPC Codes with Online Hierarchical Algorithm and Sparse Accelerator.
items.abstract: Quantum Low-Density Parity-Check (qLDPC) codes are a promising class of quantum error-correcting codes that exhibit constant-rate encoding and high error thresholds, thereby facilitating scalable fault-tolerant quantum computation. However, real-time decoding of qLDPC codes remains a significant challenge due to the high connectivity of their check matrices, which typically requires solving large-scale linear systems with sparse structures. In particular, off-the-shelf qLDPC decoders are often subject to a tradeoff between accuracy and latency, thus yielding no accurate and real-time decoding. This paper presents Vegapunk, a software-hardware co-design framework that enables real-time qLDPC decoding with high accuracy. To improve decoding accuracy, we design an offline decoupling strategy leveraging Satisfiability Modulo Theories (SMT) optimizations to mitigate quantum degeneracy. To enable fast decoding, we introduce an online hierarchical decoding algorithm employing a greedy strategy. Furthermore, we show that our SMT-optimized strategy suffices to produce decoupled matrices with maximized sparsity, thus admitting a dedicated accelerator to fully exploit the sparsity and parallelism to achieve real-time qLDPC decoding. Experimental results demonstrate that Vegapunk enables real-time decoding (< 1 μs ) for the Bivariate Bicycle (BB) code up to [[784,24,24]] while exhibiting logical error rates on par with the state-of-the-art decoder, i.e., BP+OSD.
items.abstract_zh: 量子低密度奇偶校验（qLDPC）码是一类很有前途的量子纠错码，它具有恒定速率编码和高错误阈值，从而促进可扩展的容错量子计算。然而，由于其校验矩阵的高连通性，qLDPC 码的实时解码仍然是一个重大挑战，这通常需要求解具有稀疏结构的大规模线性系统。特别是，现成的 qLDPC 解码器通常需要在准确性和延迟之间进行权衡，从而无法实现准确和实时的解码。本文提出了 Vegapunk，一种软硬件协同设计框架，可实现高精度的实时 qLDPC 解码。为了提高解码精度，我们设计了一种离线解耦策略，利用可满足性模理论（SMT）优化来减轻量子简并性。为了实现快速解码，我们引入了一种采用贪婪策略的在线分层解码算法。此外，我们表明，我们的 SMT 优化策略足以产生具有最大化稀疏性的解耦矩阵，从而允许专用加速器充分利用稀疏性和并行性来实现实时 qLDPC 解码。实验结果表明，Vegapunk 能够对高达 [[784,24,24]] 的双变量 Bicycle (BB) 代码进行实时解码（< 1 μs），同时表现出与最先进的解码器（即 BP+OSD）相当的逻辑错误率。

items.title: ccAI: A Compatible and Confidential System for AI Computing.
items.abstract:
Confidential xPU computing has emerged as a prominent technique for effectively securing users’ AI computing workloads on heterogeneous systems equipped with xPUs. Although the industry adopts this technology in cutting-edge hardware (e.g. NVIDIA H100 GPU) to safeguard high-performance AI computing, most clouds still rely on legacy xPUs and suffer from data leakage problems. Moreover, although the academy proposes several confidential xPU designs, these solutions have yet to be widely deployed in heterogeneous clouds. A key limitation is the compatibility challenge, which requires non-trivial engineering effort to address. Therefore, there is an urgent need to design a compatible and confidential xPU protection system that is tailored for today’s AI computing platforms.

To address these issues, we present ccAI , a heterogeneous system that ensures both high compatibility and strong security for AI computing based on xPU. By leveraging the PCIe interconnect as a common abstraction layer, ccAI provides a unified solution for securing diverse xPU types while preserving user transparency, effectively overcoming key compatibility limitations of existing approaches. Specifically, ccAI achieves this through two core components: (1) a dedicated hardware module, the PCIe Security Controller (PCIe-SC), which enforces computing security of diverse types of xPU and (2) a collaborative software component, the Adaptor, deployed within the Trusted VM (TVM), which orchestrates secure workload processing without modifying applications or drivers. To handle the complexity of PCIe packet transmissions, ccAI incorporates a flexible and fine-grained processing framework, within which ccAI additionally optimizes frequent I/O interactions and security-critical operations to minimize performance overhead. We implement a prototype of ccAI and evaluate it across multiple real-world xPU platforms using a range of Large Language Models (LLMs). Results show that ccAI effectively protects xPU computing with low (0.05 \(\%\) – 5.67 \(\%\) ) performance overhead
items.abstract_zh:
机密 xPU 计算已成为一种重要技术，可有效保护配备 xPU 的异构系统上的用户 AI 计算工作负载。尽管业界在尖端硬件（例如NVIDIA H100 GPU）中采用该技术来保障高性能AI计算，但大多数云仍然依赖于传统xPU并遭受数据泄露问题。此外，尽管该学院提出了几种保密的xPU设计，但这些解决方案尚未在异构云中广泛部署。一个关键的限制是兼容性挑战，这需要大量的工程工作来解决。因此，迫切需要设计一种适合当今AI计算平台的兼容且保密的xPU保护系统。

针对这些问题，我们提出了ccAI，一种异构系统，保证基于xPU的AI计算的高兼容性和强安全性。通过利用 PCIe 互连作为通用抽象层，ccAI 提供了一个统一的解决方案，用于保护不同 xPU 类型的安全，同时保持用户透明度，有效克服现有方法的关键兼容性限制。具体来说，ccAI 通过两个核心组件实现这一目标：(1) 专用硬件模块 PCIe 安全控制器 (PCIe-SC)，它强制执行不同类型 xPU 的计算安全性；(2) 协作软件组件适配器，部署在可信虚拟机 (TVM) 内，它在不修改应用程序或驱动程序的情况下协调安全工作负载处理。为了处理 PCIe 数据包传输的复杂性，ccAI 结合了灵活且细粒度的处理框架，其中 ccAI 还优化了频繁的 I/O 交互和安全关键操作，以最大限度地降低性能开销。我们实现了 ccAI 原型，并使用一系列大型语言模型 (LLM) 在多个现实世界的 xPU 平台上对其进行评估。结果表明，ccAI 以较低的 (0.05 \(\%\) – 5.67 \(\%\) ) 性能开销有效保护 xPU 计算

items.title: HiPACK: Efficient Sub-8-Bit Direct Convolution with SIMD and Bitwise Management.
items.abstract: Quantized Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have progressed to utilize sub-8-bit data types, achieving notable reductions in both memory usage and computational expenses. Nevertheless, the efficient execution of sub-8-bit convolution operations remains insufficiently optimized, especially in the context of Single Instruction Multiple Data (SIMD) architectures. This paper introduces HiPACK, which takes the packing for efficient convolution as foundation to reduce the required number of operations, and address the challenges of SIMD incompatibility in sub-8-bit direct convolution by decoupling the unpacking phase from multiplication operations, optimizing the caching of intermediate data, determining the ideal segmentation, and employing a dual interleaved register (DIR) mechanism to facilitate parallel multiplication through SIMD. Collectively, these optimizations significantly enhance computational efficiency and diminish operational overhead. Evaluation on the BCM2711 ARM processor reveals speedups of up to 4.6 × compared to floating-point calculations and 1.7 × when measured against state-of-the-art solutions, thus accelerating model inference. Our implementation is open-sourced and available at: https://github.com/Xtra-Computing/HIPACK.
items.abstract_zh: 量化深度神经网络 (DNN) 已发展到利用低于 8 位的数据类型，显着减少了内存使用量和计算费用。然而，亚 8 位卷积运算的高效执行仍然没有得到充分优化，特别是在单指令多数据 (SIMD) 架构的背景下。本文介绍了HiPACK，它以高效卷积的打包为基础，减少所需的运算次数，并通过将解包阶段与乘法运算解耦、优化中间数据的缓存、确定理想的分段以及采用双交错寄存器（DIR）机制以促进通过SIMD进行并行乘法来解决亚8位直接卷积中SIMD不兼容的挑战。总的来说，这些优化显着提高了计算效率并减少了运营开销。对 BCM2711 ARM 处理器的评估显示，与浮点计算相比，速度提升高达 4.6 倍，与最先进的解决方案相比，速度提升高达 1.7 倍，从而加速模型推理。我们的实现是开源的，可从以下网址获取：https://github.com/Xtra-Computing/HIPACK。

items.title: Stratum: System-Hardware Co-Design with Tiered Monolithic 3D-Stackable DRAM for Efficient MoE Serving.
items.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) continue to evolve, Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture has emerged as a prevailing design for achieving state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of tasks. MoE models use sparse gating to activate only a handful of expert sub-networks per input, achieving billion-parameter capacity with inference costs akin to much smaller models. However, such models often pose challenges for hardware deployment due to the massive data volume introduced by the MoE layers. To address the challenges of serving MoE models, we propose Stratum, a system–hardware co-design approach that combines the novel memory technology Monolithic 3D-Stackable DRAM (Mono3D DRAM), near-memory processing (NMP), and GPU acceleration. The logic and Mono3D DRAM dies are connected through hybrid bonding, whereas the Mono3D DRAM stack and GPU are interconnected via silicon interposer. Mono3D DRAM offers higher internal bandwidth than HBM thanks to the dense vertical interconnect pitch enabled by its monolithic structure, which supports implementations of higher-performance near-memory processing. Furthermore, we tackle the latency differences introduced by aggressive vertical scaling of Mono3D DRAM along the z -dimension by constructing internal memory tiers and assigning data across layers based on access likelihood, guided by topic-based expert usage prediction to boost NMP throughput. The Stratum system achieves up to 8.29 × improvement in decoding throughput and 7.66 × better energy efficiency across various benchmarks compared to GPU baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型 (LLM) 的不断发展，专家混合 (MoE) 架构已成为在各种任务中实现最先进性能的流行设计。 MoE 模型使用稀疏门控每个输入仅激活少数专家子网络，从而实现十亿参数容量，推理成本类似于小得多的模型。然而，由于 MoE 层引入的海量数据量，此类模型通常会给硬件部署带来挑战。为了解决服务 MoE 模型的挑战，我们提出了 Stratum，这是一种系统硬件协同设计方法，结合了新颖的内存技术单片 3D 可堆叠 DRAM (Mono3D DRAM)、近内存处理 (NMP) 和 GPU 加速。逻辑和 Mono3D DRAM 芯片通过混合键合连接，而 Mono3D DRAM 堆栈和 GPU 通过硅中介层互连。由于其单片结构实现了密集的垂直互连间距，Mono3D DRAM 提供比 HBM 更高的内部带宽，支持实现更高性能的近内存处理。此外，我们通过构建内部存储器层并根据访问可能性跨层分配数据，在基于主题的专家使用预测的指导下提高 NMP 吞吐量，解决了 Mono3D DRAM 沿 z 维度的积极垂直扩展所带来的延迟差异。与 GPU 基准相比，Stratum 系统在各种基准测试中的解码吞吐量提高了 8.29 倍，能源效率提高了 7.66 倍。

items.title: OASIS: A Commercial High Performance Terminal AI Processor Supporting RISC-V Tensor Extension Instructions.
items.abstract: The exponential growth of artificial intelligence (AI) has spurred a demand for efficient, scalable computing. While domain-specific accelerators (DSAs) outperform general-purpose GPUs, their closed architectures lead to ecosystem fragmentation. The open RISC-V ISA offers a path to a unified ecosystem, but faces fundamental architectural challenges: the inefficiency of standard extensions for domain-specific workloads and severe memory contention in heterogeneous SoCs. This paper investigates these challenges and proposes a set of evidence-backed design principles for high-performance RISC-V AI accelerators. To this end, we present OASIS, the first commercial terminal AI processor supporting RISC-V tensor extension instructions. Its core innovation is a scalable, multi-core RISC-V Tensor Processing Unit (RTPU) architected with three key principles: a hardware-accelerated data path to solve the im2col bottleneck; a decoupled memory subsystem to eliminate resource contention; and a novel, low-overhead synchronization mechanism that enables near-linear multi-core scaling. The success of this evidence-driven architecture is ultimately validated by an evaluation of the fabricated chip. To demonstrate its versatility, we benchmark its performance across a wide spectrum of representative AI models. Our results consistently show superior performance over leading commercial platforms across key terminal AI scenarios. This outcome is supported by deep-dive analyses including multi-core scaling and multi-model concurrency tests, alongside a Roofline model which confirms high hardware utilization. By submitting our tensor extension for standardization, this work establishes a new, evidence-backed blueprint for an open, scalable, and high-performance AI computing ecosystem.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 的指数级增长刺激了对高效、可扩展计算的需求。虽然特定领域加速器 (DSA) 的性能优于通用 GPU，但其封闭架构会导致生态系统碎片化。开放的 RISC-V ISA 提供了一条通往统一生态系统的道路，但面临着基本的架构挑战：特定领域工作负载的标准扩展效率低下，以及异构 SoC 中严重的内存争用。本文研究了这些挑战，并提出了一套基于证据的高性能 RISC-V AI 加速器设计原则。为此，我们推出了首款支持RISC-V张量扩展指令的商用终端AI处理器OASIS。其核心创新是可扩展的多核 RISC-V 张量处理单元 (RTPU)，其架构遵循三个关键原则：解决 im2col 瓶颈的硬件加速数据路径；解耦的内存子系统，以消除资源争用；以及一种新颖的低开销同步机制，可实现近线性的多核扩展。这种证据驱动架构的成功最终通过对制造芯片的评估来验证。为了展示其多功能性，我们在各种代表性人工智能模型中对其性能进行了基准测试。我们的结果始终显示出在关键终端人工智能场景中优于领先商业平台的性能。这一结果得到了深入分析的支持，包括多核扩展和多模型并发测试，以及确认高硬件利用率的 Roofline 模型。通过提交我们的张量扩展进行标准化，这项工作为开放、可扩展和高性能的人工智能计算生态系统建立了一个新的、有证据支持的蓝图。

items.title: CryptoBTB: A Secure Hierarchical BTB for Diverse Instruction Footprint Workloads.
items.abstract:
Timing attacks leveraging shared resources on a CPU are a growing concern. Branch Target Buffer (BTB), a crucial component of high-performance processors, is shared among threads and privileged spaces. Recently, researchers discovered numerous vulnerabilities in the BTB, allowing an adversary to maliciously infer a victim’s BTB update and mistrain the BTB. Such attacks can successfully bypass privilege-level and secure enclave protection, as well as address space isolation. Randomizing BTB through encrypted addressing to prevent these attacks suffers from high performance overhead due to exposed encryption latency in the pipeline. Prior works address this by using encryption schemes that are either not fully secure or require frequent flush. The most recent proposal, HyBP [ 79 ], uses stronger encryption schemes. However, it suffers from high overhead since it underutilizes the BTB and suffers from higher collisions within the same thread.

In this work, we propose CryptoBTB, a secure BTB, specifically designed for an exclusive BTB hierarchy. Our proposal decouples the index encryption from the index itself, enabling low-latency index encryption to obscure BTB set mapping. Additionally, unlike earlier secure BTB proposals, this scheme is well-suited for applications with a higher instruction footprint where performance is sensitive to the BTB capacity. We evaluated CryptoBTB on various classes of workloads that stress the BTB differently. Our results show that CryptoBTB incurs 4.27% performance overhead for these workloads, while HyBP experiences 31.89% overhead. Moreover, CryptoBTB requires 22.57% lower hardware overhead than HyBP.
items.abstract_zh:
利用 CPU 上的共享资源的定时攻击越来越受到关注。分支目标缓冲区 (BTB) 是高性能处理器的关键组件，在线程和特权空间之间共享。最近，研究人员发现 BTB 中存在大量漏洞，使攻击者能够恶意推断受害者的 BTB 更新并误导 BTB。此类攻击可以成功绕过特权级别和安全飞地保护以及地址空间隔离。通过加密寻址随机化 BTB 来防止这些攻击，会因管道中暴露的加密延迟而遭受高性能开销。先前的工作通过使用不完全安全或需要频繁刷新的加密方案来解决这个问题。最新的提案 HyBP [79] 使用更强的加密方案。然而，它的开销较高，因为它未充分利用 BTB，并且同一线程内的冲突较多。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 CryptoBTB，一种安全的 BTB，专门为专有的 BTB 层次结构而设计。我们的建议将索引加密与索引本身解耦，从而实现低延迟索引加密来模糊 BTB 集映射。此外，与早期的安全 BTB 提议不同，该方案非常适合具有较高指令占用空间的应用，其中性能对 BTB 容量敏感。我们在不同类别的工作负载上评估了 CryptoBTB，这些工作负载对 BTB 的压力不同。我们的结果显示，CryptoBTB 在这些工作负载上产生了 4.27% 的性能开销，而 HyBP 则产生了 31.89% 的开销。此外，CryptoBTB 所需的硬件开销比 HyBP 低 22.57%。

items.title: Rethinking Tiling and Dataflow for SpMM Acceleration: A Graph Transformation Framework.
items.abstract:
Sparse Matrix Dense Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) is a fundamental computation kernel across various domains, including scientific computing, machine learning, and graph processing. Despite extensive research, existing approaches optimize SpMM using loop transformations and linear algebra principles, which (1) poorly handle unstructured sparsity patterns, (2) rely on empirical methods to explore data reuse opportunities, and (3) enforce rigid coordinate alignment, compromising data locality.

In this paper, we demonstrate that these limitations stem from the fundamental matrix representation and traditional dataflows of SpMM (e.g., inner-product, outer-product, and Gustavson). We propose Aquila, a graph transformation framework that reformulates SpMM computations as a graph optimization problem, leveraging graph theory to reinterpret tiling and dataflow. First, on the theoretical side, we introduce vertex decomposition and adaptive depth traversal (ADT) to enable non-contiguous tiling, where nonzero elements from discontinuous rows and columns are clustered by connectivity rather than following matrix dimensionality. This approach quantifies data reuse and improves data locality beyond traditional loop transformations while maintaining output equivalence. Second, on the algorithm side, we develop a pull-after-push (PaP) dataflow that simultaneously enhances the dense matrix data reuse while eliminating synchronization issues in output matrix accumulation. Third, building on our theoretical approach and dataflow, we present a versatile accelerator architecture that handles a variety of SpMM kernels with diverse data sizes and sparsity patterns in a unified architecture. Additionally, we introduce a bidirectional fiber tree (BFT) format to support the proposed graph-oriented dataflow in contrast to traditional column or row-major access. Evaluation across diverse sparse datasets shows Aquila achieves speedups of 4.3 ×, 3.4 ×, 3.7 ×, 2.9 ×, and 2.7 × in execution time and up to 4.8 × improvements in energy efficiency compared to state-of-the-art accelerators.
items.abstract_zh:
稀疏矩阵密集矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 是跨多个领域的基本计算内核，包括科学计算、机器学习和图形处理。尽管进行了大量研究，但现有方法使用循环变换和线性代数原理来优化 SpMM，这些方法 (1) 不能很好地处理非结构化稀疏模式，(2) 依靠经验方法来探索数据重用机会，(3) 强制执行严格的坐标对齐，从而损害数据局部性。

在本文中，我们证明这些限制源于 SpMM 的基本矩阵表示和传统数据流（例如内积、外积和 Gustavson）。我们提出了 Aquila，一个图转换框架，它将 SpMM 计算重新表述为图优化问题，利用图论重新解释平铺和数据流。首先，在理论方面，我们引入顶点分解和自适应深度遍历（ADT）来实现非连续平铺，其中来自不连续行和列的非零元素通过连通性而不是遵循矩阵维数进行聚类。这种方法可量化数据重用，并在保持输出等效性的同时，超越传统循环转换来改进数据局部性。其次，在算法方面，我们开发了一种推后拉（PaP）数据流，该数据流同时增强了密集矩阵数据的重用，同时消除了输出矩阵累积中的同步问题。第三，基于我们的理论方法和数据流，我们提出了一种多功能加速器架构，可以在统一架构中处理具有不同数据大小和稀疏模式的各种 SpMM 内核。此外，我们引入了双向光纤树（BFT）格式来支持所提出的面向图形的数据流，而不是传统的列或行优先访问。对不同稀疏数据集的评估表明，与最先进的加速器相比，Aquila 的执行时间加速了 4.3 ×、3.4 ×、3.7 ×、2.9 × 和 2.7 ×，能源效率提高了 4.8 ×。

items.title: RICH Prefetcher: Storing Rich Information in Memory to Trade Capacity and Bandwidth for Latency Hiding.
items.abstract:
Memory systems characterized by high bandwidth and/or capacity alongside high access latency are becoming increasingly critical. This trend can be observed both at the device level—for instance, in non‑volatile memory—and at the system level, as seen in CXL‑based memory pooling architectures. To benefit from such memory in general‑purpose computing systems, it is essential to employ techniques that can tolerate high memory access latency. Although prefetching has long been recognized as a classical approach for latency tolerance, conventional prefetching techniques are typically either optimized for area efficiency or constrained by limited prefetching patterns. Consequently, they often fail to convert the abundant metadata into significant performance improvements at minimal cost.

To address these challenges, we propose RICH—a prefetcher that strategically consumes memory capacity and bandwidth to reduce memory access latency. First, RICH is capable of leveraging abundant metadata to improve performance by integrating spatial prefetching with diverse region sizes and prefetch triggers. Second, RICH implements such metadata with minimal overheads by employing a hierarchical on-chip/off-chip storage mechanism, thereby avoiding both large on-chip storage and critical off-chip accesses. We propose a specific implementation of RICH and evaluate it across a wide range of workloads. With increased memory latency, RICH achieves performance improvements of 8.3% over Bingo and 6.2% over PMP. This highlights the RICH’s suitability for future memory systems. In a conventional system, RICH still outperforms Bingo by 3.4%.
items.abstract_zh:
以高带宽和/或容量以及高访问延迟为特征的内存系统变得越来越重要。这种趋势可以在设备级别（例如非易失性存储器）和系统级别（如基于 CXL 的内存池架构中看到）观察到。为了从通用计算系统中的此类内存中受益，必须采用能够容忍高内存访问延迟的技术。尽管预取长期以来一直被认为是延迟容忍的经典方法，但传统的预取技术通常要么针对区域效率进行优化，要么受到有限的预取模式的约束。因此，他们常常无法以最小的成本将丰富的元数据转化为显着的性能改进。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 RICH——一种预取器，它可以策略性地消耗内存容量和带宽，以减少内存访问延迟。首先，RICH 能够通过将空间预取与不同区域大小和预取触发器集成来利用丰富的元数据来提高性能。其次，RICH 通过采用分层片上/片外存储机制以最小的开销实现此类元数据，从而避免大量片上存储和关键的片外访问。我们提出了 RICH 的具体实现，并在广泛的工作负载中对其进行了评估。随着内存延迟的增加，RICH 的性能比 Bingo 提高了 8.3%，比 PMP 提高了 6.2%。这凸显了 RICH 对未来存储系统的适用性。在传统系统中，RICH 的性能仍比 Bingo 好 3.4%。

items.title: DExiM: Exposing Impedance-Based Data Leakage in Emerging Memories.
items.abstract: Emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) technologies, such as resistive RAM (ReRAM), ferroelectric RAM (FRAM), and magnetoresistive RAM (MRAM), are gaining traction due to their scalability, energy efficiency, and resilience to traditional charge-based attacks. Unlike conventional memories that store data as electrical charge, these NVMs encode information through distinct impedance states. While this fundamental shift in data storage has led to the assumption that such memories are inherently more secure, we demonstrate that impedance itself can serve as a side-channel leakage source. In this work, we introduce and validate a novel impedance-based side-channel attack that exploits the correlation between stored data and NVM cell impedance, enabling non-invasive data extraction via power distribution network measurements. Using template construction and scattering parameter analysis, we evaluate a range of commercial ReRAM, FRAM, and MRAM devices. Our results reveal statistically significant impedance variations tied to both inter- and intra-Hamming weight differences, confirming that data-dependent impedance leakage is a real and exploitable phenomenon. These findings expose a new class of hardware vulnerabilities in emerging memory systems and highlight the need for dedicated countermeasures against impedance side channels.
items.abstract_zh: 电阻式 RAM (ReRAM)、铁电 RAM (FRAM) 和磁阻 RAM (MRAM) 等新兴非易失性存储器 (NVM) 技术因其可扩展性、能源效率和对传统电荷攻击的恢复能力而受到关注。与以电荷形式存储数据的传统存储器不同，这些 NVM 通过不同的阻抗状态对信息进行编码。虽然数据存储的这一根本性转变导致人们假设此类存储器本质上更安全，但我们证明阻抗本身可以充当侧通道泄漏源。在这项工作中，我们介绍并验证了一种新颖的基于阻抗的旁道攻击，该攻击利用存储数据和 NVM 单元阻抗之间的相关性，从而通过配电网络测量实现非侵入式数据提取。使用模板构建和散射参数分析，我们评估了一系列商用 ReRAM、FRAM 和 MRAM 器件。我们的结果揭示了与汉明间和汉明内权重差异相关的统计上显着的阻抗变化，证实了数据相关的阻抗泄漏是一种真实且可利用的现象。这些发现暴露了新兴存储系统中的一类新的硬件漏洞，并强调需要针对阻抗侧通道采取专门的对策。

items.title: Chasoň: Supporting Cross HBM Channel Data Migration to Enable Efficient Sparse Algebraic Acceleration.
items.abstract: High bandwidth memory (HBM) equipped sparse accelerators are emerging as a new class of accelerators that offer concurrent accesses to data and parallel execution to mitigate the memory bound behavior of sparse kernels. However, because of their underlying non-zero scheduling scheme, state-of-the-art HBM-based sparse accelerators (e.g., Serpens) suffer from high resource underutilization causing suboptimal performance, and inefficiency. To solve this challenge, we propose Chasoň, an HBM-based streaming accelerator for sparse kernels, specifically sparse matrix vector multiplication. Chasoň supports our novel non-zero scheduling scheme called Cross-HBM Channel out-of-order (OoO) Scheduling (CrHCS) to enable data migration across HBM channels and mitigate resource underutilization. We implement Chasoň on AMD Alveo U55C, achieving 301 MHz clock frequency and evaluate it based on SuiteSparse and SNAP matrix collections. Chasoň improves the resource utilization and achieves up to 8 ×, 20.33 ×, 11.65 ×, and 2.67 × performance improvement and 2.03 ×, 34.72 ×, 19.48 ×, and 14.61 × better energy efficiency over Serpens, Nvidia RTX 4090, Nvidia RTX 6000 Ada, and Intel Core i9-11980HK, respectively. The source code of Chasoň is available at https://github.com/UbaidHunts/Chason.
items.abstract_zh: 配备高带宽内存 (HBM) 的稀疏加速器正在成为一类新型加速器，它提供对数据的并发访问和并行执行，以减轻稀疏内核的内存限制行为。然而，由于其底层的非零调度方案，最先进的基于 HBM 的稀疏加速器（例如 Serpens）面临着资源利用率较高的问题，导致性能不佳和效率低下。为了解决这一挑战，我们提出了 Chasoň，一种基于 HBM 的稀疏内核流加速器，特别是稀疏矩阵向量乘法。 Chasoň 支持我们称为跨 HBM 通道无序 (OoO) 调度 (CrHCS) 的新型非零调度方案，以实现跨 HBM 通道的数据迁移并缓解资源利用不足的情况。我们在 AMD Alveo U55C 上实现 Chasoň，实现 301 MHz 时钟频率，并基于 SuiteSparse 和 SNAP 矩阵集合对其进行评估。与 Serpens、Nvidia RTX 4090、Nvidia RTX 6000 Ada 和 Intel Core i9-11980HK 相比，Chasoň 提高了资源利用率，性能提高了 8 倍、20.33 倍、11.65 倍和 2.67 倍，能效提高了 2.03 倍、34.72 倍、19.48 倍和 14.61 倍，分别。 Chasoň 的源代码可在 https://github.com/UbaidHunts/Chason 获取。

items.title: Micro-MAMA: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Multicore Prefetching.
items.abstract:
Online reinforcement learning (RL) holds promise for microarchitectural techniques like prefetching. Its ability to adapt to changing and previously-unseen scenarios makes it a versatile technique. However, when multiple RL-operated components compete for shared resources in multicore systems, they can often converge to sub-optimal policies due to conflicting incentives.

In this work, we identify key challenges that arise when scaling RL-based prefetchers to multi-core environments, and relate these to known problems from Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). In particular, we find that recent work using multi-armed bandit algorithms for prefetching can lead to inefficient systems when memory bandwidth is limited, as each agent attempts to claim a disproportionate share of the system’s bandwidth.

To solve this problem, we present μ Mama , a light-weight supervisor of distributed multi-armed bandit agents, which learns performant joint-policies. In μ Mama , distributed local agents narrow the global joint-action search space, while a central agent with a global perspective learns system-wide policies. Additionally, μ Mama provides key local agents with a system perspective, encouraging them to avoid actions that would harm the others.

μ Mama exhibits high adaptability, which we show by evaluating it using multiple measures of performance. In our evaluation of an 8-core system, the policies learned by μ Mama outperform those of independently-operating agents by an average of 2.1% when optimizing for throughput, and by an average of 10.4% when optimizing for fairness. We also show that μ Mama performs better in systems that are more bandwidth constrained, as well as when profiles of the workloads are provided.
items.abstract_zh:
在线强化学习 (RL) 为预取等微架构技术带来了希望。它适应不断变化和以前未见过的场景的能力使其成为一种多功能技术。然而，当多个强化学习操作的组件在多核系统中竞争共享资源时，由于激励冲突，它们通常会收敛到次优策略。

在这项工作中，我们确定了将基于 RL 的预取器扩展到多核环境时出现的关键挑战，并将这些挑战与多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 的已知问题相关联。特别是，我们发现，当内存带宽有限时，最近使用多臂老虎机算法进行预取的工作可能会导致系统效率低下，因为每个代理都试图占用不成比例的系统带宽份额。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 μ Mama，一个分布式多臂老虎机代理的轻量级监督器，它学习高性能的联合策略。在 μ Mama 中，分布式本地代理缩小了全局联合行动搜索空间，而具有全局视角的中央代理则学习系统范围的策略。此外，μMama 还为当地主要特工提供系统视角，鼓励他们避免做出伤害他人的行为。

μ Mama 表现出高度的适应性，我们通过使用多种表现指标对其进行评估来证明这一点。在我们对 8 核系统的评估中，μ Mama 学习的策略在吞吐量优化时比独立操作的代理平均高出 2.1%，在公平性优化时平均高出 10.4%。我们还表明，μ Mama 在带宽受限的系统以及提供工作负载配置文件时表现更好。

items.title: Understanding and Mitigating Covert Channel and Side Channel Vulnerabilities Introduced by RowHammer Defenses.
items.abstract:
DRAM chips are increasingly vulnerable to read disturbance phenomena (e.g., RowHammer and RowPress), where repeatedly accessing or keeping open a DRAM row causes bitflips in nearby rows, due to DRAM density scaling. Attackers can exploit RowHammer bitflips in real systems to compromise security, which has motivated many prior works on RowHammer defenses. To enable such defenses, recent DDR specifications introduce new defense frameworks (e.g., PRAC and RFM). For robust (i.e., secure, safe, and reliable) operation , it is critical to analyze security implications of widely-adopted RowHammer defenses. Yet, no prior work analyzes the timing covert channel and side channel vulnerabilities RowHammer defenses introduce.

This paper presents the first analysis and evaluation of timing covert channel and side channel vulnerabilities introduced by state-of-the-art RowHammer defenses. We demonstrate that RowHammer defenses’ preventive actions (e.g., preventively refreshing potential victim rows) have two fundamental features that allow an attacker to exploit RowHammer defenses for timing leakage. First, preventive actions often reduce DRAM bandwidth availability because they block access to DRAM, thereby resulting in significantly longer memory access latencies. Second, users can intentionally trigger preventive actions because preventive actions highly depend on application memory access patterns.

We introduce LeakyHammer, a new class of attacks that leverage the RowHammer defense-induced memory latency differences to establish communication channels between processes and leak secrets from victim processes. First, we build two covert channel attacks exploiting two state-of-the-art RowHammer defenses (i.e., PRAC and RFM), achieving 39.0 Kbps and 48.7 Kbps channel capacity. Second, we demonstrate a proof-of-concept website fingerprinting attack that can identify visited websites based on the RowHammer-preventive actions they cause. We propose and evaluate three countermeasures against LeakyHammer. Our results show that fundamentally and completely mitigating LeakyHammer induces large performance overheads in highly RowHammer-vulnerable systems. We believe and hope our work can enable and aid future work on designing better solutions and more robust systems in the presence of such new vulnerabilities.
items.abstract_zh:
DRAM 芯片越来越容易受到读取干扰现象（例如 RowHammer 和 RowPress）的影响，其中由于 DRAM 密度缩放，重复访问或保持打开 DRAM 行会导致附近行发生位翻转。攻击者可以在实际系统中利用 RowHammer 位翻转来破坏安全性，这激发了许多先前关于 RowHammer 防御的工作。为了实现此类防御，最近的 DDR 规范引入了新的防御框架（例如 PRAC 和 RFM）。为了实现稳健（即安全、可靠）的操作，分析广泛采用的 RowHammer 防御的安全影响至关重要。然而，之前没有任何工作分析 RowHammer 防御引入的定时隐蔽通道和侧通道漏洞。

本文首次对最先进的 RowHammer 防御引入的定时隐蔽通道和侧通道漏洞进行了分析和评估。我们证明 RowHammer 防御的预防措施（例如，预防性刷新潜在受害者行）具有两个基本特征，允许攻击者利用 RowHammer 防御进行定时泄漏。首先，预防措施通常会降低 DRAM 带宽可用性，因为它们会阻止对 DRAM 的访问，从而导致内存访问延迟显着延长。其次，用户可以有意触发预防性操作，因为预防性操作高度依赖于应用程序内存访问模式。

我们引入了 LeakyHammer，这是一种新型攻击，它利用 RowHammer 防御引起的内存延迟差异来建立进程之间的通信通道，并从受害者进程中泄漏秘密。首先，我们利用两种最先进的 RowHammer 防御（即 PRAC 和 RFM）构建两种隐蔽通道攻击，实现 39.0 Kbps 和 48.7 Kbps 的通道容量。其次，我们演示了一种概念验证网站指纹攻击，该攻击可以根据访问的网站引起的 RowHammer 预防操作来识别这些网站。我们提出并评估了针对 LeakyHammer 的三种对策。我们的结果表明，从根本上彻底缓解 LeakyHammer 会在 RowHammer 高度脆弱的系统中带来巨大的性能开销。我们相信并希望我们的工作能够促进并帮助未来在存在此类新漏洞的情况下设计更好的解决方案和更强大的系统。

items.title: LLMulator: Generalizable Cost Modeling for Dataflow Accelerators with Input-Adaptive Control Flow.
items.abstract:
Precise and rapid performance prediction for dataflow-based accelerators is essential for efficient hardware design and design space exploration. However, existing methods often fall short due to limited generalization across hardware architectures, applications, and input-dependent control flows.

Considering the rich program semantic knowledge contained in pre-trained large language models (LLMs), which is used for text and code generation, we propose a progressive numeric modeling paradigm based on pre-trained LLMs. This is an approach to achieve hardware, application, and control flow-sensitive generalization in dataflow accelerator performance prediction. Specifically, to make accurate performance estimates for unseen applications beyond the scope of the training data, we propose a numeric prediction model capable of estimating any performance range. This is achieved by treating the numerical data of the dataflow program as separate tokens and using categorical output for performance values, allowing us to observe confidence at each numerical position. Second, LLMulator supports input-adaptive performance prediction by introducing a reinforcement learning-based dynamic calibration framework, enabling accurate modeling of applications whose control flow varies with input—unlike prior methods that assume fixed execution paths. The cycles prediction error converges to within 11.2% after several iterations, reducing the error by 9.7% over static models. Finally, to generalize across diverse hardware architectures and configurations, we introduce a progressive data augmentation framework that systematically generates rich datasets spanning software and hardware variations. This includes multi-level dataflow structures and a structured representation of memory parameters and loop mapping primitives, significantly improving the performance of LLMulator for diverse hardware configurations.

Experiments show that LLMulator achieves an average absolute percentage error (MAPE) of 12.2% in ASIC design scenarios, reducing errors by 16.7%-7.8% compared to existing SOTA methods (TLP, GNNHLS). These results establish LLMulator as a highly accurate and interpretable framework for performance prediction, showcasing new opportunities for applying pre-trained LLMs to hardware modeling.
items.abstract_zh:
基于数据流的加速器的精确、快速的性能预测对于高效的硬件设计和设计空间探索至关重要。然而，由于硬件架构、应用程序和依赖于输入的控制流的通用性有限，现有方法常常存在不足。

考虑到用于文本和代码生成的预训练大型语言模型（LLM）中包含丰富的程序语义知识，我们提出了一种基于预训练 LLM 的渐进式数值建模范例。这是一种在数据流加速器性能预测中实现硬件、应用程序和控制流敏感泛化的方法。具体来说，为了对超出训练数据范围的未见过的应用程序进行准确的性能估计，我们提出了一种能够估计任何性能范围的数值预测模型。这是通过将数据流程序的数值数据视为单独的标记并使用性能值的分类输出来实现的，使我们能够观察每个数值位置的置信度。其次，LLMulator 通过引入基于强化学习的动态校准框架来支持输入自适应性能预测，从而能够对控制流随输入变化的应用程序进行精确建模，这与假设固定执行路径的先前方法不同。经过多次迭代，周期预测误差收敛到11.2%以内，比静态模型误差降低9.7%。最后，为了泛化不同的硬件架构和配置，我们引入了一个渐进式数据增强框架，该框架可以系统地生成跨越软件和硬件变化的丰富数据集。这包括多级数据流结构以及内存参数和循环映射原语的结构化表示，显着提高了 LLMulator 对于不同硬件配置的性能。

实验表明，LLMulator在ASIC设计场景中实现了12.2%的平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE），与现有的SOTA方法（TLP、GNNHLS）相比，误差减少了16.7%-7.8%。这些结果使 LLMulator 成为一个高度准确且可解释的性能预测框架，展示了将预训练的 LLM 应用于硬件建模的新机会。

items.title: SHADOW: Simultaneous Multi-Threading Architecture with Asymmetric Threads.
items.abstract:
Many important applications exhibit shifting demands between instruction-level parallelism (ILP) and thread-level parallelism (TLP) due to irregular sparsity and unpredictable memory access patterns. Conventional CPUs optimize for one but fail to balance both, leading to underutilized execution resources and performance bottlenecks. Addressing this challenge requires an architecture that can seemlessly and efficiently adapt to workload variations.

This paper presents SHADOW, the first asymmetric SMT core that dynamically balances ILP and TLP by executing out-of-order (OoO) and in-order (InO) threads simultaneously on the same core. SHADOW maximizes CPU utilization by leveraging deep ILP in the OoO thread and high TLP in lightweight InO threads. It is runtime-configurable, allowing applications to optimize the mix of OoO and InO execution. Evaluated on nine diverse benchmarks, SHADOW achieves up to 3.16 × speedup and 1.33 × average improvement over an OoO CPU, with just 1% area and power overhead. By dynamically adapting to workload characteristics, SHADOW outperforms conventional architectures, efficiently accelerating memory-bound workloads without compromising compute-bound performance.
items.abstract_zh:
由于不规则的稀疏性和不可预测的内存访问模式，许多重要的应用程序在指令级并行性 (ILP) 和线程级并行性 (TLP) 之间呈现出不断变化的需求。传统 CPU 针对其中之一进行优化，但无法平衡两者，从而导致执行资源未充分利用和性能瓶颈。应对这一挑战需要一种能够无缝、高效地适应工作负载变化的架构。

本文介绍了 SHADOW，这是第一个非对称 SMT 内核，它通过在同一内核上同时执行乱序 (OoO) 和有序 (InO) 线程来动态平衡 ILP 和 TLP。 SHADOW 通过利用 OoO 线程中的深度 ILP 和轻量级 InO 线程中的高 TLP 来最大限度地提高 CPU 利用率。它是运行时可配置的，允许应用程序优化 OoO 和 InO 执行的组合。根据九个不同的基准进行评估，SHADOW 比 OoO CPU 实现了高达 3.16 倍的加速和 1.33 倍的平均改进，而面积和功耗仅为 1%。通过动态适应工作负载特征，SHADOW 的性能优于传统架构，可有效加速内存密集型工作负载，而不会影响计算密集型性能。

items.title: Software Prefetch Multicast: Sharer-Exposed Prefetching for Bandwidth Efficiency in Manycore Processors.
items.abstract: As the core counts continue to scale in manycore processors, the increasing bandwidth pressure on the network-on-chip (NoC) and last-level cache (LLC) emerges as a critical performance bottleneck. While shared-data multicasting from the LLC can alleviate this pressure by combining responses heading to the same direction, existing solutions face fundamental challenges in accurately identifying complete sharer sets and avoiding unnecessary data responses. In this work, we propose Software Prefetch Multicast (SPM) , a software-hardware co-design that addresses these limitations through sharer-exposed prefetching for bandwidth-efficient multicast. SPM introduces three key innovations: (1) New software-hardware interfaces including sharer group configuration and sharer-exposed prefetching instructions, enabling software-directed multicast initiation; (2) A corresponding microarchitecture for sharer group configuration that supports sharer-group-based multicast triggering in LLC through representative prefetch requests from leader threads; and (3) A dynamic leader thread switching algorithm to accommodate thread variation. Compared with a system with software prefetching, SPM achieves an average of 42% NoC bandwidth saving, a geometric mean of 1.28 × and a maximum of 1.46 × speedup in a 16-core system. In a 64-core system, it can achieve an average of 50% NoC bandwidth saving, along with a geomean of 1.38 × and a maximum of 1.86 × speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 随着多核处理器中的核心数量不断增加，片上网络 (NoC) 和末级缓存 (LLC) 上不断增加的带宽压力成为关键的性能瓶颈。虽然来自 LLC 的共享数据多播可以通过组合前往同一方向的响应来减轻这种压力，但现有解决方案在准确识别完整共享者集和避免不必要的数据响应方面面临着根本挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了软件预取多播（SPM），这是一种软件硬件协同设计，通过共享者公开的预取来实现带宽高效的多播来解决这些限制。 SPM引入了三个关键创新：（1）新的软件-硬件接口，包括共享器组配置和共享器公开的预取指令，从而实现软件引导的多播启动； (2)用于共享器组配置的相应微体系结构，通过来自领导线程的代表性预取请求来支持LLC中基于共享器组的多播触发； (3)动态引导线程切换算法以适应线程变化。与采用软件预取的系统相比，SPM在16核系统中平均节省42%的NoC带宽，几何平均1.28倍，最大加速1.46倍。在64核系统中，它可以实现平均50%的NoC带宽节省，以及1.38×的几何平均值和最大1.86×的加速比。

items.title: HEAT: NPU-NDP HEterogeneous Architecture for Transformer-Empowered Graph Neural Networks.
items.abstract:
Transformer-empowered Graph Neural Networks (TF-GNNs) are gaining significant attention in AI research because they leverage the front-end Transformer’s ability to process textual data while also harnessing the back-end GNN’s capacity to analyze graph structures. Typically, TF-GNNs follow the sequential execution mode, where the front-end Transformer first encodes vertex features, followed by subgraph sampling and subsequent processing by the back-end GNN. However, due to the massive computation workloads of Transformers and the irregular memory access patterns of GNNs, achieving efficient inference for TF-GNNs remains a challenge. Although architectures like FACT and MEGA have been proposed to separately accelerate the Transformer and GNN, they overlook the new opportunities arising from the coupling of the Transformer and GNN.

To enable efficient TF-GNNs, we propose HEAT, a heterogeneous architecture with a Neural Processing Unit (NPU) and a DIMM-based Near-Data Processing (NDP). Such a heterogeneous architecture can utilize both the high computational power of NPU and the high internal bandwidth of NDP. To fully unleash the potential of the NPU-NDP architecture, HEAT makes the following three contributions: First , HEAT leverages graph topology to identify the importance of vertices and encodes their features in the Transformer using varying precision accordingly. Second , HEAT gives more flexibility to the execution granularity and execution order of subgraphs in GNN, allowing their DRAM accesses to scatter across different banks and enhancing locality between subgraphs. Third , HEAT decouples the inherent dependency between the front-end Transformer and the back-end GNN by allowing the Transformer to selectively encode only the vertex features required by the current subgraph. This enables concurrent execution of the NPU and NDP, thereby fully exploiting the parallelism of the heterogeneous architecture. Comprehensive evaluations on a wide range of datasets demonstrate that HEAT outperforms the high-performance A100 GPU, the state-of-the-art (SOTA) Transformer accelerator FACT, and GNN accelerator MEGA in terms of execution time and energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh:
基于 Transformer 的图神经网络 (TF-GNN) 在人工智能研究中获得了广泛关注，因为它们利用前端 Transformer 处理文本数据的能力，同时还利用后端 GNN 分析图结构的能力。通常，TF-GNN 遵循顺序执行模式，其中前端 Transformer 首先对顶点特征进行编码，然后进行子图采样，并由后端 GNN 进行后续处理。然而，由于 Transformer 的大量计算工作量和 GNN 的不规则内存访问模式，实现 TF-GNN 的高效推理仍然是一个挑战。尽管像 FACT 和 MEGA 这样的架构已经被提出来分别加速 Transformer 和 GNN，但它们忽视了 Transformer 和 GNN 耦合带来的新机会。

为了实现高效的 TF-GNN，我们提出了 HEAT，这是一种具有神经处理单元 (NPU) 和基于 DIMM 的近数据处理 (NDP) 的异构架构。这种异构架构可以同时利用NPU的高计算能力和NDP的高内部带宽。为了充分释放 NPU-NDP 架构的潜力，HEAT 做出了以下三点贡献：首先，HEAT 利用图拓扑来识别顶点的重要性，并相应地使用不同的精度在 Transformer 中对其特征进行编码。其次，HEAT 为 GNN 中子图的执行粒度和执行顺序提供了更大的灵活性，允许它们的 DRAM 访问分散在不同的存储体上，并增强了子图之间的局部性。第三，HEAT 通过允许 Transformer 有选择地仅对当前子图所需的顶点特征进行编码，解耦了前端 Transformer 和后端 GNN 之间的固有依赖关系。这使得NPU和NDP能够并发执行，从而充分利用异构架构的并行性。对广泛数据集的综合评估表明，HEAT 在执行时间和能源效率方面优于高性能 A100 GPU、最先进的 (SOTA) Transformer 加速器 FACT 和 GNN 加速器 MEGA。

items.title: ρHammer: Reviving RowHammer Attacks on New Architectures via Prefetching.
items.abstract: Rowhammer is a critical vulnerability in dynamic random access memory (DRAM) that continues to pose a significant threat to various systems. However, we find that conventional load-based attacks are becoming highly ineffective on the most recent architectures such as Intel Alder and Raptor Lake. In this paper, we present ρ Hammer, a new Rowhammer framework that systematically overcomes three core challenges impeding attacks on these new architectures. First, we design an efficient and generic DRAM address mapping reverse-engineering method that uses selective pairwise measurements and structured deduction, enabling recovery of complex mappings within seconds on the latest memory controllers. Second, to break through the activation rate bottleneck of load-based hammering, we introduce a novel prefetch-based hammering paradigm that leverages the asynchronous nature of x86 prefetch instructions and is further enhanced by multi-bank parallelism to maximize throughput. Third, recognizing that speculative execution causes more severe disorder issues for prefetching, which cannot be simply mitigated by memory barriers, we develop a counter-speculation hammering technique using control-flow obfuscation and optimized NOP -based pseudo-barriers to maintain prefetch order with minimal overhead. Evaluations across four latest Intel architectures demonstrate ρ Hammer’s breakthrough effectiveness: it induces up to 200K+ additional bit flips within 2-hour attack pattern fuzzing processes and has a 112× higher flip rate than the load-based hammering baselines on Comet and Rocket Lake. Also, we are the first to revive Rowhammer attacks on the latest Raptor Lake architecture, where baselines completely fail, achieving stable flip rates of 2,291/min and fast end-to-end exploitation.
items.abstract_zh: Rowhammer 是动态随机存取存储器 (DRAM) 中的一个严重漏洞，持续对各种系统构成重大威胁。然而，我们发现传统的基于负载的攻击在最新的架构（例如 Intel Alder 和 Raptor Lake）上变得非常无效。在本文中，我们提出了 ρ Hammer，这是一种新的 Rowhammer 框架，它系统地克服了阻碍对这些新架构进行攻击的三个核心挑战。首先，我们设计了一种高效且通用的 DRAM 地址映射逆向工程方法，该方法使用选择性成对测量和结构化推导，从而能够在最新的内存控制器上在几秒钟内恢复复杂的映射。其次，为了突破基于负载的锤击的激活率瓶颈，我们引入了一种新颖的基于预取的锤击范例，该范例利用 x86 预取指令的异步特性，并通过多存储体并行性进一步增强，以最大化吞吐量。第三，认识到推测执行会导致更严重的预取混乱问题，而这不能简单地通过内存屏障来缓解，我们开发了一种反推测锤击技术，使用控制流混淆和优化的基于 NOP 的伪屏障，以最小的开销维持预取顺序。对四种最新英特尔架构的评估证明了 ρ Hammer 的突破性有效性：它在 2 小时的攻击模式模糊处理过程中引发了多达 200K+ 的额外位翻转，并且翻转率比 Comet 和 Rocket Lake 上基于负载的锤击基线高出 112 倍。此外，我们是第一个在最新的 Raptor Lake 架构上恢复 Rowhammer 攻击的人，该架构的基线完全失败，实现了 2,291/分钟的稳定翻转率和快速的端到端利用。

items.title: SmartPIR: A Private Information Retrieval System using Computational Storage Devices.
items.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption-based Private Information Retrieval systems provide strong privacy by enabling encrypted queries on databases hosted by untrusted servers. However, adoption is limited by system-level bottlenecks, including severe I/O constraints in large-scale settings and inefficiencies in handling variable-length data. To solve these issues, we present SmartPIR, a scalable PIR system that tackles these challenges through a protocol and architecture co-design. First, we introduce an in-storage computing framework that offloads FHE operations to computational storage devices (CSDs), eliminating the overhead of large-volume data movement. To address the limited computational capacity of CSDs, we further propose a zero-skipping encoding strategy at the protocol level, which decouples actual payloads from paddings to avoid redundant computations. Additionally, SmartPIR incorporates two key architectural optimizations: (1) a resource-efficient FPGA circuit design and (2) a load-aware scheduling strategy, which collectively sustain high throughput and ensure scalability. Implemented on a commercial off-the-shelf CSD array, SmartPIR achieves a 10 2 × ∼ 10 3 × speedup over state-of-the-art CPU-based PIR schemes.
items.abstract_zh: 基于全同态加密的隐私信息检索系统通过对不受信任的服务器托管的数据库启用加密查询来提供强大的隐私性。然而，采用受到系统级瓶颈的限制，包括大规模设置中的严格 I/O 限制以及处理可变长度数据的低效率。为了解决这些问题，我们推出了 SmartPIR，这是一种可扩展的 PIR 系统，可通过协议和架构协同设计来应对这些挑战。首先，我们引入了一个存储内计算框架，该框架将 FHE 操作卸载到计算存储设备 (CSD)，从而消除大量数据移动的开销。为了解决 CSD 有限的计算能力，我们进一步在协议级别提出了一种零跳跃编码策略，它将实际有效负载与填充解耦，以避免冗余计算。此外，SmartPIR 还整合了两项关键架构优化：(1) 资源高效型 FPGA 电路设计和 (2) 负载感知调度策略，共同维持高吞吐量并确保可扩展性。 SmartPIR 在商用现成 CSD 阵列上实施，与最先进的基于 CPU 的 PIR 方案相比，速度提高了 10 2 × ∼ 10 3 ×。

items.title: SuperSFQ: A Hardware Design to Realize High-Frequency Superconducting Processors.
items.abstract:
Superconducting computing using single flux quantum (SFQ) technology has been recognized as a promising post-Moore’s law era technology thanks to its extremely low power and high performance. Therefore, many researchers have proposed various SFQ-based circuits (e.g., ALU, register file) and architectures (e.g., NPU, CPU) to exploit the potential. However, due to the absence of a reliable and high-frequency clocking scheme, general SFQ circuits cannot operate at high frequencies, making all architectural efforts for high-performance SFQ computing ineffective.

In this paper, we propose SuperSFQ, a new design methodology for SFQ hardware that unlocks the high-frequency potential of SFQ technology by co-designing the clocking scheme, circuitry, and architecture. First, we propose SuperClocking, a new clocking scheme that enables high frequency in general SFQ hardware. Second, we implement an SFQ-based synchronizer to realize the reliable operation of SuperClocking. Finally, we provide two architectural design guidelines and corresponding solutions to ensure the functional correctness of SuperClocking in general SFQ devices.

By applying our clocking scheme, synchronizer, and guidelines to the latest general-purpose SFQ CPU, SuperSFQ achieves up to 62.5 times higher frequency and improves single-thread and multi-thread performance by 17 and 62.5 times, respectively, compared to conventional designs, with only 34.4% Josephson junction overhead. In addition, to demonstrate the generality of SuperSFQ, we apply SuperSFQ to 48 different benchmark circuits, achieving 88.5 times higher frequency compared to conventional designs, on average.
items.abstract_zh:
使用单通量量子（SFQ）技术的超导计算因其极低的功耗和高性能而被认为是一种有前途的后摩尔定律时代技术。因此，许多研究人员提出了各种基于 SFQ 的电路（例如 ALU、寄存器文件）和架构（例如 NPU、CPU）来开发潜力。然而，由于缺乏可靠的高频时钟方案，通用SFQ电路无法在高频下运行，使得高性能SFQ计算的所有架构努力都无效。

在本文中，我们提出了 SuperSFQ，这是一种 SFQ 硬件的新设计方法，通过共同设计时钟方案、电路和架构来释放 SFQ 技术的高频潜力。首先，我们提出了 SuperClocking，这是一种新的时钟方案，可在通用 SFQ 硬件中实现高频。其次，我们实现了一个基于SFQ的同步器来实现SuperClocking的可靠运行。最后，我们提供了两个架构设计指南和相应的解决方案，以确保 SuperClocking 在通用 SFQ 器件中的功能正确性。

通过将我们的时钟方案、同步器和指南应用于最新的通用 SFQ CPU，与传统设计相比，SuperSFQ 的频率提高了 62.5 倍，单线程和多线程性能分别提高了 17 倍和 62.5 倍，而约瑟夫森结开销仅为 34.4%。此外，为了证明SuperSFQ的通用性，我们将SuperSFQ应用于48个不同的基准电路，与传统设计相比，平均实现了88.5倍的频率。

items.title: Swift and Trustworthy Large-Scale GPU Simulation with Fine-Grained Error Modeling and Hierarchical Clustering.
items.abstract:
Kernel-level sampling is an effective technique for running large-scale GPU workloads on cycle-level simulators by selecting a representative subset of kernels, thereby significantly reducing simulation complexity and runtime. However, in large-scale GPU workloads, kernels often exhibit heterogeneous runtime behaviors where some identical kernels show fluctuating performance, while others display multiple performance saturation points. We observe that the kernel execution time distribution is a powerful signature for addressing this complexity. By carefully analyzing execution time distributions, we show that heterogeneous kernels can be effectively classified and sampled, significantly reducing errors in sampled simulations.

This paper proposes STEM+ROOT, a fine-grained kernel-level sampling methodology that enables trustworthy sampled simulation by achieving minimal sampling error. STEM leverages the distribution of kernel execution times as a signature and applies statistical techniques to determine optimal sample sizes with tight error bounds. ROOT is a novel hierarchical clustering framework built on top of STEM that ensures the sampled kernels faithfully represent the entire workload in terms of execution time and a wide range of microarchitectural metrics. STEM achieves high scalability for large-scale GPU workloads by significantly reducing offline profiling overhead for collecting kernel execution times. When evaluated on the latest GPU benchmark suite, our proposed methodology reduces sampling error by 27.6-81.9 × and achieves 7-600 × faster kernel profiling than existing approaches while achieving comparable performance.
items.abstract_zh:
内核级采样是一种有效的技术，通过选择内核的代表性子集，在周期级模拟器上运行大规模 GPU 工作负载，从而显着降低模拟复杂性和运行时间。然而，在大规模 GPU 工作负载中，内核通常会表现出异构运行时行为，其中一些相同的内核表现出波动的性能，而其他内核则表现出多个性能饱和点。我们观察到，内核执行时间分布是解决这种复杂性的有力标志。通过仔细分析执行时间分布，我们表明可以有效地对异构内核进行分类和采样，从而显着减少采样模拟中的错误。

本文提出了 STEM+ROOT，这是一种细粒度内核级采样方法，可通过实现最小采样误差来实现可信的采样模拟。 STEM 利用内核执行时间的分布作为签名，并应用统计技术来确定具有严格误差范围的最佳样本大小。 ROOT 是一种构建在 STEM 之上的新型分层集群框架，可确保采样的内核在执行时间和各种微体系结构指标方面忠实地代表整个工作负载。 STEM 通过显着减少收集内核执行时间的离线分析开销，实现大规模 GPU 工作负载的高可扩展性。在最新的 GPU 基准测试套件上进行评估时，我们提出的方法将采样误差降低了 27.6-81.9 倍，并且内核分析速度比现有方法快 7-600 倍，同时实现了相当的性能。

items.title: DRAM Fault Classification through Large-Scale Field Monitoring for Robust Memory RAS Management.
items.abstract: As DRAM technology scales down, maintaining prior levels of reliability becomes increasingly challenging due to heightened susceptibility to faults. This growing concern underscores the need for effective in-field fault monitoring and management. Addressing this challenge, this work first introduces a refined DRAM fault classification, derived from the correlation between DRAM addresses and their underlying architectural hierarchies of faulty DRAMs. Building on this classification, we propose a comprehensive memory fault management strategy adequate to each DRAM fault. We further formalize and implement a structured remediation framework, enabling fault-specific mitigation. Utilizing this methodology, we conduct a large-scale field study on DDR4 x4 and DDR5 10x4 RDIMMs, uncovering that over 98% of DDR4 x4 RDIMM faults are tightly coupled with intra-bank architectural characteristics. In particular, we identify that early detection and localized management of faults within 2×2 MATs 1 —encompassing the vast majority of clustered row faults—are crucial to achieving resilient memory subsystems. We also observe intrinsic correlations among faulty Row Addresses (RAs), indicating unavoidable structural address patterns in most DRAMs. Additionally, our method demonstrates strong diagnostic accuracy in detecting unbounded faults 2 even in DDR5 10x4 RDIMMs equipped with in-DRAM ECC. The insights gained from this study not only enhance DRAM fault diagnosis and mitigation but also inform the development of RAS features for future memory systems with limited error correction capabilities.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 DRAM 技术规模不断缩小，由于故障的敏感性增加，保持先前的可靠性水平变得越来越具有挑战性。这种日益增长的担忧强调了有效的现场故障监控和管理的必要性。为了应对这一挑战，这项工作首先引入了一种精细的 DRAM 故障分类，该分类源自 DRAM 地址与其故障 DRAM 的底层架构层次结构之间的相关性。在此分类的基础上，我们提出了适合每种 DRAM 故障的全面内存故障管理策略。我们进一步规范并实施结构化修复框架，实现针对特定故障的缓解。利用这种方法，我们对 DDR4 x4 和 DDR5 10x4 RDIMM 进行了大规模的现场研究，发现超过 98% 的 DDR4 x4 RDIMM 故障与银行内架构特征紧密相关。特别是，我们发现 2×2 MAT 1 内的故障（包括绝大多数集群行故障）的早期检测和本地化管理对于实现弹性内存子系统至关重要。我们还观察到错误行地址 (RA) 之间的内在相关性，表明大多数 DRAM 中不可避免的结构地址模式。此外，我们的方法在检测无限故障 2 方面表现出强大的诊断准确性，即使是在配备 DRAM ECC 的 DDR5 10x4 RDIMM 中也是如此。从这项研究中获得的见解不仅增强了 DRAM 故障诊断和缓解，还为纠错能力有限的未来内存系统的 RAS 功能的开发提供了信息。

items.title: SMX: Heterogeneous Architecture for Universal Sequence Alignment Acceleration.
items.abstract: Sequence alignment is a fundamental building block for critical applications across multiple fields, such as computational biology and information retrieval. The rapid advancement of genome sequencing technologies and breakthrough generative AI tools, like AlphaFold, has driven an exponential increase in sequence-data production, creating a pressing need for fast and efficient sequence alignment tools to analyze ever-growing biological sequence databases. Notwithstanding the numerous accelerators proposed, from general-purpose architectures (CPUs and GPUs) to domain-specific designs (FPGAs and ASICs), the most efficient solutions suffer from over-specialization and fail to adapt to the wide variety of irregular use cases demanded by practical sequence alignment applications. Thus, it remains a challenge to design an architecture that can balance efficiency and flexibility to meet the demands of real-world alignment applications. This work introduces SMX, a heterogeneous architecture designed for high-performance sequence alignment that supports various configurations for different sequence types (DNA, protein, and ASCII text) and alignment models (including weighted gaps and substitution matrices). SMX integrates an ISA extension (SMX-1D) for irregular and sequential tasks and a specialized coprocessor (SMX-2D) to accelerate regular and parallel tasks, both orchestrated by the general-purpose core to enable seamless integration with state-of-the-art sequence alignment algorithms. Our results demonstrate that SMX’s heterogeneous architecture accelerates different sequence alignment use cases by 256–744 × compared to state-of-the-art software implementations when aligning real datasets. Compared to specialized hardware accelerators, SMX delivers up to 18.5 × more peak performance per area added while providing greater flexibility to accelerate different use cases. Physical design results targeting a 22nm technology node estimate SMX’s area at 0.34mm 2 , which is only 30% of a single-issue in-order CPU. SMX offers a high-performance and efficient heterogeneous architecture for accelerating practical sequence alignment algorithms, providing a scalable and flexible solution tailored to meet the needs of modern sequence-analysis tools. Furthermore, an SMX case study explores the frontier between flexibility and efficiency in domain-specific architectures and accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 序列比对是计算生物学和信息检索等多个领域关键应用的基本构建模块。基因组测序技术的快速发展和突破性的生成人工智能工具（如 AlphaFold）推动了序列数据产量的指数级增长，迫切需要快速高效的序列比对工具来分析不断增长的生物序列数据库。尽管提出了众多加速器，从通用架构（CPU 和 GPU）到特定领域设计（FPGA 和 ASIC），但最高效的解决方案都存在过度专业化的问题，并且无法适应实际序列比对应用所需的各种不规则用例。因此，设计一种能够平衡效率和灵活性以满足实际对准应用需求的架构仍然是一个挑战。这项工作引入了 SMX，这是一种专为高性能序列比对而设计的异构架构，支持不同序列类型（DNA、蛋白质和 ASCII 文本）和比对模型（包括加权间隙和替换矩阵）的各种配置。 SMX 集成了用于不规则和顺序任务的 ISA 扩展 (SMX-1D) 以及用于加速常规和并行任务的专用协处理器 (SMX-2D)，两者均由通用内核精心编排，以实现与最先进的序列比对算法的无缝集成。我们的结果表明，在对齐真实数据集时，与最先进的软件实现相比，SMX 的异构架构将不同的序列对齐用例加速了 256-744 倍。与专用硬件加速器相比，SMX 每增加一个面积即可提供高达 18.5 倍的峰值性能，同时提供更大的灵活性来加速不同的用例。针对 22nm 技术节点的物理设计结果估计 SMX 的面积为 0.34mm 2 ，仅为单发有序 CPU 的 30%。 SMX 提供高性能、高效的异构架构，用于加速实用的序列比对算法，提供可扩展且灵活的解决方案，以满足现代序列分析工具的需求。此外，SMX 案例研究探索了特定领域架构和加速器的灵活性和效率之间的前沿。

items.title: MINDFUL: Safe, Implantable, Large-Scale Brain-Computer Interfaces from a System-Level Design Perspective.
items.abstract:
Brain-computer interface (BCI) technology is among the fastest growing fields in research and development. On the application side, BCIs provide a deeper understanding of brain function, inspire the creation of complex computational models, and hold significant promise for assisting individuals with disabilities. On the system side, BCIs have evolved from non-invasive, low-resolution wearable devices to invasive, high-resolution, implantable systems-on-chip (SoCs) that offer higher-quality brain data, enabling more effective exploration of brain activity. However, implantable BCIs must acquire large-scale neural signals and run real-time BCI applications, all while relying on wireless communication for practical use. Unlike typical devices, BCIs must operate within strict power constraints to ensure safety, which is crucial for their deployment in real-world applications. This requires careful co-design and a balanced approach across the key components of the BCI system.

In this work, we discuss why BCIs present unique design challenges compared to conventional computing systems. We develop equations based on the system-level structure of modern BCIs to estimate power consumption and explore trade-offs among key system components: data acquisition, on-chip computation, and wireless communication. Using these equations, we analyze BCI SoC designs that support wireless communication and examine how scaling trends, design constraints, and optimization strategies may impact the feasibility of future BCIs. Specifically, we show a clear discrepancy between certain cutting-edge, BCI-centric computations and the feasibility of their on-chip integration in power-constrained BCI systems, revealing a significant gap between the development of deep learning methods for BCI and the design of safe BCI systems. However, with targeted optimizations in BCI system design and greater specialization for specific applications, future BCI systems will be able to successfully integrate modern BCI applications and advance toward widespread adoption.
items.abstract_zh:
脑机接口（BCI）技术是研究和开发中增长最快的领域之一。在应用方面，脑机接口提供了对大脑功能的更深入的了解，激发了复杂计算模型的创建，并为帮助残疾人士带来了重大希望。在系统方面，脑机接口已经从非侵入性、低分辨率可穿戴设备发展到侵入性、高分辨率、可植入片上系统（SoC），可提供更高质量的大脑数据，从而能够更有效地探索大脑活动。然而，植入式脑机接口必须采集大规模神经信号并运行实时脑机接口应用程序，同时在实际使用中依赖无线通信。与典型设备不同，BCI 必须在严格的功率限制下运行以确保安全，这对于它们在实际应用中的部署至关重要。这需要 BCI 系统的关键组件进行仔细的协同设计和平衡的方法。

在这项工作中，我们讨论了为什么脑机接口与传统计算系统相比会带来独特的设计挑战。我们根据现代脑机接口的系统级结构开发方程来估计功耗并探索关键系统组件之间的权衡：数据采集、片上计算和无线通信。使用这些方程，我们分析支持无线通信的 BCI SoC 设计，并研究扩展趋势、设计约束和优化策略如何影响未来 BCI 的可行性。具体来说，我们展示了某些尖端的、以 BCI 为中心的计算与其在功率受限的 BCI 系统中片上集成的可行性之间存在明显的差异，揭示了 BCI 深度学习方法的开发与安全 BCI 系统的设计之间的显着差距。然而，通过 BCI 系统设计的针对性优化和特定应用的更加专业化，未来的 BCI 系统将能够成功集成现代 BCI 应用并走向广泛采用。

items.title: LoopFrog: In-Core Hint-Based Loop Parallelization.
items.abstract:
To scale ILP, designers build deeper and wider out-of-order superscalar CPUs. However, this approach incurs quadratic scaling complexity, area, and energy costs with each generation. While small loops may benefit from increased instruction-window sizes and large loops may see speedups via thread-level parallelism across cores, there remains unexploited medium-granularity parallelism.

We propose LoopFrog to tap into this potential by bringing thread-level speculation schemes into the modern era. LoopFrog runs multiple loop iterations from a single thread in parallel within the microarchitecture. The core can spawn future loop iterations as new microarchitectural threadlets based on compiler-inserted hints, which can leapfrog execution beyond the parent thread’s instruction window, exposing a new, medium-grained parallelism, orthogonal to traditional ILP and TLP. LoopFrog monitors data dependencies between executing threadlets, forwards data for true dependencies and squashes speculative threadlets on ordering violations.

Using an LLVM-based compiler to insert hints, we achieve a geometric mean loop speedup of \(43\%\) , translating to whole-program speedups of \(9.2\%\) on SPEC CPU 2006 and \(9.5\%\) on SPEC CPU 2017 benchmarks, with only modest area and power overheads.
items.abstract_zh:
为了扩展 ILP，设计人员构建了更深、更宽的无序超标量 CPU。然而，这种方法在每一代都会产生二次缩放的复杂性、面积和能源成本。虽然小循环可能会受益于增加的指令窗口大小，而大循环可能会通过跨内核的线程级并行性获得加速，但仍然存在未开发的中等粒度并行性。

我们建议 LoopF​​rog 通过将线程级推测方案引入现代来挖掘这一潜力。 LoopF​​rog 在微架构内从单个线程并行运行多个循环迭代。核心可以根据编译器插入的提示将未来的循环迭代生成为新的微架构线程，这可以超越父线程的指令窗口执行，从而暴露出一种新的、中粒度的并行性，与传统的 ILP 和 TLP 正交。 LoopF​​rog 监视正在执行的 threadlet 之间的数据依赖关系，转发真实依赖关系的数据，并在违反顺序时压缩推测的 threadlet。

使用基于 LLVM 的编译器插入提示，我们实现了 43% 的几何平均循环加速，这意味着 SPEC CPU 2006 上的整个程序加速为 9.2%，SPEC CPU 2017 基准测试上的整个程序加速为 9.5%，而面积和功耗开销适中。

items.title: Interleaved Bitstream Execution for Multi-Pattern Regex Matching on GPUs.
items.abstract: Pattern matching is a key operation in unstructured data analytics, commonly supported by regular expression (regex) engines. Bit-parallel regex engines compile regexes into bitstream programs, which expose fine-grained parallelism and are well-suited for GPU execution. A straightforward strategy executes each bitstream instruction sequentially, processing all data blocks in a loop. However, this execution suffers from poor data reuse and high memory consumption, limiting throughput. Our key insight is to adopt an interleaved execution model, where all bitstream instructions are fused into a single loop and executed block-wise. While interleaved execution could improve data reuse, enabling it on GPUs is non-trivial due to cross-block data dependencies. To address this, we introduce 1) Dependency-Aware Thread-Data Mapping, which resolves cross-block dependencies via selective recomputation.
