items.abstract_zh: 紧凑型大语言模型 (LLM) 上的测试时计算 (TTC) 实现了人工智能推理领域的最新突破，为边缘设备有效执行复杂推理任务提供了巨大潜力。然而，与 TTC 相关的复杂推理管道带来了新的效率瓶颈，限制了可实现的延迟并阻碍了广泛采用。通过深入分析，我们确定了三个关键障碍：（1）可变并行性，其特点是依赖推理的动态控制流和不同的批量大小，使工作负载调度复杂化； (2) 分支依赖性，阻碍跨顺序推理步骤的高效流水线； (3)分支修剪，导致内存碎片和不规则的数据访问模式。受 LLM 内存限制性质和内存处理 (PIM) 减少数据移动能力的启发，我们提出了 ORCHES，这是一种专门为解决这些障碍而设计的新型 GPU-PIM 协作系统。 ORCHES 集成了三个关键创新：（1）自适应工作负载分配，动态平衡 GPU 和 PIM 单元之间的工作负载，以在分支不可预测的情况下最大限度地提高并行性； (2) 分支感知流水线，利用推测执行来大幅减少步骤间流水线停顿； (3)碎片感知内存结构，通过协调缓存和优化内存布局重组来增强数据局部性和访问效率。实验结果表明，对于基于文本和基于视觉的推理任务，ORCHES 分别比最先进的 (SOTA) GPU 实现平均加速 4.16 倍和 3.10 倍，而原始推理管道的准确性没有任何损失。

items.title: SeaCache: Efficient and Adaptive Caching for Sparse Accelerators.
items.abstract: Sparse tensor computations are highly memory-bound, making on-chip data reuse in SRAM buffers critical to the performance of domain-specific sparse accelerators. On-demand caches are commonly used in recent sparse accelerators, due to the advantage of easy space allocation and the ability to avoid unnecessary data fetches compared to scratchpad-style data buffering. However, existing cache designs suffer from inefficient space utilization due to the difficulty of fitting variable-length sparse data into fixed-size cache blocks. The theoretically optimal replacement policies used by them also have substantial implementation cost, requiring significant on-chip space to manage the metadata. To address these issues, we propose SeaCache to enable efficient and adaptive caching for sparse accelerators. SeaCache includes three key techniques. First, it incorporates fiber packing and splitting to efficiently map variable-length data into fixed-size cache blocks with high space utilization. Second, it proposes a practical replacement policy that performs similarly to the optimal one but has a much cheaper implementation. Third, it shares the cache space between the actual data and the replacement policy metadata, with a two-phase adaptive mechanism to decide the best partition ratio. Overall, SeaCache outperforms state-of-the-art sparse cache designs by 2.8 × on average, demonstrating the effectiveness of its novel optimizations.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏张量计算高度受内存限制，因此 SRAM 缓冲区中的片上数据重用对于特定领域稀疏加速器的性能至关重要。与暂存器式数据缓冲相比，按需缓存通常在最近的稀疏加速器中使用，因为它具有易于空间分配的优点，并且能够避免不必要的数据获取。然而，由于难以将可变长度稀疏数据装入固定大小的缓存块，现有的缓存设计面临着空间利用率低下的问题。他们使用的理论上最佳的替换策略也具有巨大的实施成本，需要大量的片上空间来管理元数据。为了解决这些问题，我们建议 SeaCache 为稀疏加速器提供高效且自适应的缓存。 SeaCache 包括三个关键技术。首先，它结合了光纤打包和分割，可以有效地将可变长度数据映射到具有高空间利用率的固定大小的缓存块中。其次，它提出了一种实用的替代政策，其表现与最优政策类似，但实施成本要低得多。第三，它在实际数据和替换策略元数据之间共享缓存空间，并通过两阶段自适应机制来决定最佳分区比率。总体而言，SeaCache 的性能平均比最先进的稀疏缓存设计高 2.8 倍，证明了其新颖优化的有效性。

items.title: RTGS: Real-Time 3D Gaussian Splatting SLAM via Multi-Level Redundancy Reduction.
items.abstract:
3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) based Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems can largely benefit from 3DGS’s state-of-the-art rendering efficiency and accuracy, but have not yet been adopted in resource-constrained edge devices due to insufficient speed. Addressing this, we identify notable redundancies across the SLAM pipeline for acceleration. While conceptually straightforward, practical approaches are required to minimize the overhead associated with identifying and eliminating these redundancies.

In response, we propose RTGS, an algorithm-hardware co-design framework that comprehensively reduces the redundancies for real-time 3DGS-SLAM on edge. To minimize the overhead, RTGS fully leverages the characteristics of the 3DGS-SLAM pipeline.

On the algorithm side, we introduce (1) an adaptive Gaussian pruning step to remove the redundant Gaussians by reusing gradients computed during backpropagation; and (2) a dynamic downsampling technique that directly reuses the keyframe identification and alpha computing steps to eliminate redundant pixels. On the hardware side, we propose (1) a subtile-level streaming strategy and a pixel-level pairwise scheduling strategy that mitigates workload imbalance via a Workload Scheduling Unit (WSU) guided by previous iteration information; (2) a Rendering and Backpropagation (R&B) Buffer that accelerates the rendering backpropagation by reusing intermediate data computed during rendering; and (3) a Gradient Merging Unit (GMU) to reduce intensive memory accesses caused by atomic operations while enabling pipelined aggregation. Integrated into an edge GPU, RTGS achieves real-time performance (≥ 30 FPS) on four datasets and three algorithms, with up to 82.5 × energy efficiency over the baseline and negligible quality loss. Code is available at https://github.com/UMN-ZhaoLab/RTGS .
items.abstract_zh:
基于 3D 高斯溅射 (3DGS) 的同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 系统可以在很大程度上受益于 3DGS 最先进的渲染效率和准确性，但由于速度不足，尚未在资源受限的边缘设备中采用。为了解决这个问题，我们确定了 SLAM 管道中显着的冗余以实现加速。虽然概念上很简单，但需要采取实用的方法来最大限度地减少与识别和消除这些冗余相关的开销。

为此，我们提出了 RTGS，一种算法-硬件协同设计框架，可全面减少边缘实时 3DGS-SLAM 的冗余。为了最大限度地减少开销，RTGS 充分利用了 3DGS-SLAM 管道的特性。

在算法方面，我们引入（1）自适应高斯剪枝步骤，通过重用反向传播期间计算的梯度来去除冗余高斯； (2)动态下采样技术，直接重用关键帧识别和alpha计算步骤来消除冗余像素。在硬件方面，我们提出（1）子图块级流媒体策略和像素级成对调度策略，通过先前迭代信息引导的工作负载调度单元（WSU）减轻工作负载不平衡； (2) 渲染和反向传播（R&B）缓冲区，通过重用渲染期间计算的中间数据来加速渲染反向传播； (3) 梯度合并单元 (GMU)，用于减少原子操作引起的密集内存访问，同时启用管道聚合。 RTGS 集成到边缘 GPU 中，可在四个数据集和三种算法上实现实时性能 (≥ 30 FPS)，能源效率比基准高出 82.5 倍，质量损失可以忽略不计。代码可在 https://github.com/UMN-ZhaoLab/RTGS 获取。

items.title: C3ache: Towards Hierarchical Cache-Centric Computing for Sparse Matrix Multiplication on GPGPUs.
items.abstract:
Sparse matrix multiplications (SPMMs) are fundamental kernels in various domains and are highly demanded to be executed on general-purpose graphics processing units (GPGPUs). However, it is a challenge to efficiently execute SPMMs across varying sparsity regimes on GPGPUs due to the significant variations in sparsity patterns across different domains. Most of the state-of-the-art works enhance GPGPUs by integrating dedicated accelerator units in processor, which prioritize computational density over memory subsystem optimizations. As sparsity increases, the overhead from expensive memory accesses and redundant input fetches in sparse matrices constrains the effectiveness of processor-centric optimization schemes. Consequently, these optimizations become suboptimal for workloads dominated by irregular memory access patterns and low arithmetic intensity.

To address these problems, we proposed a hierarchical cache-centric computing architecture with hybrid dataflow, C 3 ache , to achieve near-optimal memory efficiency and data reuse. First, the hybrid dataflow based on the outer-product dataflow and Gustavson’s dataflow is proposed to decouple the SPMM computation into two distinct phases (multiplication and merging) with different behavioral characteristics and align with the memory access pattern. Furthermore, C 3 ache restructures the cache hierarchy through in-cache computing, transforming the two levels of cache into large-scale data parallel processing in memory (PIM) units and in-situ merging PIM units respectively to map the two computation phases of SPMMs. To synchronize the granularity of data fetching with the memory access pattern, a novel memory-aware compressed format is proposed for sparse encoding to further reduce the memory transaction and the decoding overhead of C 3 ache . To realize C 3 ache , an efficient multi-precision matrix multiplication PIM macro is also implemented. Experimental results demonstrate that C 3 ache achieves 7.22 × and 2.4 × speedup on average with 42.4 × and 22.9 × EDP reduction over the GPGPU CUDA Cores and Sparse Tensor Cores respectively, while reducing memory access more than 80%.
items.abstract_zh:
稀疏矩阵乘法 (SPMM) 是各个领域的基本内核，并且非常需要在通用图形处理单元 (GPGPU) 上执行。然而，由于不同领域的稀疏模式存在显着差异，因此在 GPGPU 上跨不同稀疏度机制有效执行 SPMM 是一个挑战。大多数最先进的作品通过在处理器中集成专用加速器单元来增强 GPGPU，这些加速器单元优先考虑计算密度而不是内存子系统优化。随着稀疏性的增加，稀疏矩阵中昂贵的内存访问和冗余输入获取的开销限制了以处理器为中心的优化方案的有效性。因此，对于以不规则内存访问模式和低算术强度为主的工作负载，这些优化变得次优。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种具有混合数据流的分层缓存为中心的计算架构C 3 ache，以实现近乎最优的内存效率和数据重用。首先，提出了基于外积数据流和 Gustavson 数据流的混合数据流，将 SPMM 计算解耦为具有不同行为特征的两个不同阶段（乘法和合并），并与内存访问模式保持一致。此外，C 3 ache通过缓存内计算重构缓存层次结构，将两级缓存分别转化为大规模内存数据并行处理（PIM）单元和原位合并PIM单元，映射SPMM的两个计算阶段。为了使数据获取的粒度与存储器访问模式同步，提出了一种新颖的存储器感知压缩格式用于稀疏编码，以进一步减少存储器事务和C 3 ache 的解码开销。为了实现C 3 ache ，还实现了高效的多精度矩阵乘法PIM宏。实验结果表明，与 GPGPU CUDA 核心和稀疏张量核心相比，C 3 ache 平均加速达到 7.22 倍和 2.4 倍，EDP 分别减少 42.4 倍和 22.9 倍，同时减少内存访问超过 80%。

items.title: Efficient Security Support for CXL Memory through Adaptive Incremental Offloaded (Re-)Encryption.
items.abstract:
Current DRAM technologies face critical scaling limitations, significantly impacting the expansion of memory bandwidth and capacity required by modern data-intensive applications. Compute eXpress Link (CXL) emerges as a promising technology to address these limitations, enabling efficient cache-coherent memory expansion through direct connections between processors and CXL memory devices. Despite its potential, broad adoption of CXL memory in public cloud computing introduces substantial security challenges. Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs), such as Intel SGX/TDX and AMD SEV, provide robust protection for data integrity and confidentiality in cloud environments, complemented by CXL Integrity and Data Encryption (CXL IDE), which employs XTS encryption and Galois/Counter Mode (GCM) for secure message transmission.

However, this approach incurs significant performance overhead due to the latency of XTS encryption on memory-intensive workloads. To mitigate this, we propose Adaptive Incremental Offloaded (Re-)Encryption (AIORE), an adaptive security framework combining Counter (CTR) and XTS encryption. AIORE dynamically selects encryption schemes based on page access frequency, implements incremental and offloaded re-encryption strategies, and leverages memory node computation to reduce overheads. Evaluation with Gem5 across diverse benchmarks reveals that AIORE significantly reduces security overhead by 62.8% on average and maintains overhead within 3.7% relative to an insecure baseline.
items.abstract_zh:
当前的 DRAM 技术面临着严重的扩展限制，严重影响了现代数据密集型应用所需的内存带宽和容量的扩展。 Compute eXpress Link (CXL) 作为解决这些限制的一项有前途的技术而出现，通过处理器和 CXL 内存设备之间的直接连接实现高效的缓存一致性内存扩展。尽管 CXL 内存具有潜力，但它在公共云计算中的广泛采用带来了巨大的安全挑战。可信执行环境 (TEE)，例如 Intel SGX/TDX 和 AMD SEV，为云环境中的数据完整性和机密性提供强大的保护，并辅以 CXL 完整性和数据加密 (CXL IDE)，后者采用 XTS 加密和 Galois/Counter 模式 (GCM) 来实现安全消息传输。

然而，由于 XTS 加密在内存密集型工作负载上存在延迟，这种方法会产生显着的性能开销。为了缓解这一问题，我们提出了自适应增量卸载（重新）加密（AIORE），这是一种结合了计数器（CTR）和 XTS 加密的自适应安全框架。 AIORE根据页面访问频率动态选择加密方案，实现增量和卸载重加密策略，并利用内存节点计算来减少开销。对 Gem5 跨不同基准的评估表明，与不安全的基准相比，AIORE 平均显着降低了 62.8% 的安全开销，并将开销保持在 3.7% 以内。

items.title: LEGOSim: A Unified Parallel Simulation Framework for Multi-chiplet Heterogeneous Integration.
items.abstract: The rise of multi-chiplet integration challenges existing simulators like gem5 [ 55 ] and GPGPU-Sim [ 45 ] for efficiently simulating heterogeneous multiple-chiplet systems due to incapability to modularly integrate heterogeneous chiplets and high synchronization overheads in parallel simulation. To address these limitations, this paper introduces LEGOSim, a unified parallel simulation framework capable of flexibly integrating various open-source and in-house designed chiplet simulators as processes in parallel simulation, referred to as "simlets" with minimal modifications needed. It introduces an on-demand synchronization protocol with adaptive time quanta and non-global fencing, ensuring synchronization only occurs when necessary, thus reducing overhead while maintaining correctness. The framework also integrates Network-on-Interposer (NoI) simulator for modeling inter-chiplet communication, enabling accurate assessment of various interconnection architectures’ performance. Evaluated with diverse benchmarks, LEGOSim shows high accuracy in simulating multi-chiplet architectures like SIMBA [ 69 ] and a CiM-based accelerator [ 14 ], with average errors of 3.79% and 3.94%, respectively. It significantly reduces synchronization overhead by up to 99.9% compared to per-cycle synchronization and by 66.1% compared to time quantum synchronization, without synchronization errors. Five case studies show that LEGOSim also provides precise system performance metrics and stall cause reporting, simplifying tasks such as performance analysis and optimization, and can be used for design space exploration of various multi-chiplet systems.
items.abstract_zh: 由于无法模块化集成异构小芯片以及并行仿真中的高同步开销，多小芯片集成的兴起对 gem5 [55] 和 GPGPU-Sim [45] 等现有模拟器在高效模拟异构多小芯片系统方面提出了挑战。为了解决这些限制，本文引入了LEGOSim，这是一个统一的并行仿真框架，能够灵活地将各种开源和内部设计的小芯片模拟器集成为并行仿真中的流程，称为“simlet”，只需进行最少的修改。它引入了具有自适应时间量子和非全局防护的按需同步协议，确保同步仅在必要时发生，从而在保持正确性的同时减少开销。该框架还集成了中介层网络 (NoI) 模拟器，用于对芯片间通信进行建模，从而能够准确评估各种互连架构的性能。通过不同的基准评估，LEGOSim 在模拟多芯片架构（如 SIMBA [69] 和基于 CiM 的加速器 [14]）方面表现出很高的准确性，平均误差分别为 3.79% 和 3.94%。与每周期同步相比，它显着降低了同步开销高达 99.9%，与时间量子同步相比，同步开销显着降低了 66.1%，且没有同步错误。五个案例研究表明，LEGOSim 还提供精确的系统性能指标和停顿原因报告，简化了性能分析和优化等任务，并可用于各种多芯片系统的设计空间探索。

items.title: Ironman: Accelerating Oblivious Transfer Extension for Privacy-Preserving AI with Near-Memory Processing.
items.abstract:
With the wide application of machine learning (ML), privacy concerns arise with user data as they may contain sensitive information. Privacy-preserving ML (PPML) based on cryptographic primitives has emerged as a promising solution in which an ML model is directly computed on the encrypted data to provide a formal privacy guarantee. However, PPML frameworks heavily rely on the oblivious transfer (OT) primitive to compute nonlinear functions. OT mainly involves the computation of single-point correlated OT (SPCOT) and learning parity with noise (LPN) operations. As OT is still computed extensively on general-purpose CPUs, it becomes the latency bottleneck of modern PPML frameworks.

In this paper, we propose a novel OT accelerator, dubbed \(\mathsf {Ironman}\) , to significantly increase the efficiency of OT and the overall PPML framework. We observe that SPCOT is computation-bounded, and thus propose a hardware-friendly SPCOT algorithm with a customized accelerator to improve SPCOT computation throughput. In contrast, LPN is memory-bandwidth-bounded due to irregular memory access patterns. Hence, we further leverage the near-memory processing (NMP) architecture equipped with memory-side cache and index sorting to improve effective memory bandwidth. With extensive experiments, we demonstrate \(\mathsf {Ironman}\) achieves a 39.2–237.4 × improvement in OT throughput across different NMP configurations compared to the full-thread CPU implementation. For different PPML frameworks, \(\mathsf {Ironman}\) demonstrates a 2.1–3.4 × reduction in end-to-end latency for both CNN and Transformer models.
items.abstract_zh:
随着机器学习（ML）的广泛应用，用户数据出现了隐私问题，因为它们可能包含敏感信息。基于加密原语的隐私保护机器学习 (PPML​​) 已成为一种有前途的解决方案，其中直接在加密数据上计算机器学习模型以提供正式的隐私保证。然而，PPML 框架严重依赖于不经意传递 (OT) 原语来计算非线性函数。 OT主要涉及单点相关OT（SPCOT）计算和学习噪声奇偶校验（LPN）运算。由于 OT 仍然在通用 CPU 上广泛计算，因此它成为现代 PPML 框架的延迟瓶颈。

在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 OT 加速器，称为 \(\mathsf {Ironman}\) ，以显着提高 OT 和整体 PPML 框架的效率。我们观察到 SPCOT 是计算受限的，因此提出了一种具有定制加速器的硬件友好型 SPCOT 算法，以提高 SPCOT 计算吞吐量。相比之下，LPN 由于不规则的内存访问模式而受到内存带宽的限制。因此，我们进一步利用配备内存端缓存和索引排序的近内存处理（NMP）架构来提高有效内存带宽。通过大量实验，我们证明与全线程 CPU 实现相比，\(\mathsf {Ironman}\) 在不同 NMP 配置上实现了 39.2–237.4 倍的 OT 吞吐量提升。对于不同的 PPML 框架，\(\mathsf {Ironman}\) 证明 CNN 和 Transformer 模型的端到端延迟减少了 2.1–3.4 倍。

items.title: Titan-I: An Open-Source, High Performance RISC-V Vector Core.
items.abstract: Vector processing has evolved from early systems like the CDC STAR-100 and Cray-1 to modern ISAs like ARM’s Scalable Vector Extension (SVE) and RISC-V Vector (RVV) extensions. However, scaling vector processing for contemporary workloads presents challenges due to overheads in traditional architectures. We introduce Titan-I (T1), an out-of-order (OoO) RVV architecture designed to scale both Instruction-Level Parallelism (ILP) and Data-Level Parallelism (DLP). T1 incorporates a coarse-grained floor-planning solver, a datapath-wide permutation unit, and a register cache for mask registers, improving bandwidth and reducing latency. It also uses multiple OoO techniques, such as fine-grained chaining, issue-as-commit and memory interleaving, to optimize ILP for wider vector datapaths. T1 outperforms General Purpose Graphic Processing Units (GP-GPU) and other vector cores, achieving up to 1.85 × speedup over GB202 (Nvidia 5090) and up to 2.41 × speedup over GA102 (Nvidia 3090) in cryptography with 40% of SM’s area of GA102. In HPC workloads, T1 offers a compatible performance with 19% area of HiSilicon TaiShan V120 (KP920), achieving a 4.59 × speedup over it when scaling T1’s datapath 4 ×. T1 also exhibits robust tolerance to memory latency, achieving an 8.05 × performance improvement over the SpacemiT X60 (K1) in pure DDR mode.
items.abstract_zh: 矢量处理已从 CDC STAR-100 和 Cray-1 等早期系统发展到 ARM 的可扩展矢量扩展 (SVE) 和 RISC-V 矢量 (RVV) 扩展等现代 ISA。然而，由于传统架构中的开销，针对当代工作负载的扩展矢量处理提出了挑战。我们推出 Titan-I (T1)，这是一种无序 (OoO) RVV 架构，旨在扩展指令级并行性 (ILP) 和数据级并行性 (DLP)。 T1 包含一个粗粒度布局规划求解器、一个数据路径范围的排列单元和一个用于掩码寄存器的寄存器缓存，从而提高了带宽并减少了延迟。它还使用多种 OoO 技术，例如细粒度链接、提交时发出和内存交错，以优化 ILP 以实现更广泛的矢量数据路径。 T1 的性能优于通用图形处理单元 (GP-GPU) 和其他矢量核心，在加密方面比 GB202 (Nvidia 5090) 实现高达 1.85 倍的加速，比 GA102 (Nvidia 3090) 实现高达 2.41 倍的加速，SM 面积仅为 GA102 的 40%。在 HPC 工作负载中，T1 提供与海思 TaiShan V120 (KP920) 19% 面积兼容的性能，在将 T1 的数据路径扩展 4 倍时，实现了 4.59 倍的加速。 T1 还表现出对内存延迟的强大容忍度，在纯 DDR 模式下实现了比 SpacemiT X60 (K1) 8.05 倍的性能提升。

items.title: Elk: Exploring the Efficiency of Inter-core Connected AI Chips with Deep Learning Compiler Techniques.
items.abstract:
To meet the increasing demand of deep learning (DL) models, AI chips are employing both off-chip memory (e.g., HBM) and high-bandwidth low-latency interconnect for direct inter-core data exchange. However, it is not easy to explore the efficiency of these i nter- c ore c onnected A I (ICCA) chips, due to a fundamental tussle among compute (per-core execution), communication (inter-core data exchange), and I/O (off-chip data access).

In this paper, we develop Elk , a DL compiler framework to maximize the efficiency of ICCA chips by jointly trading off all the three performance factors discussed above. Elk structures these performance factors into configurable parameters and forms a global trade-off space in the DL compiler. To systematically explore this space and maximize overall efficiency, Elk employs a new inductive operator scheduling policy and a cost-aware on-chip memory allocation algorithm. It generates globally optimized execution plans that best overlap off-chip data loading and on-chip execution. To examine the efficiency of Elk , we build a full-fledged emulator based on a real ICCA chip IPU-POD4, and an ICCA chip simulator for sensitivity analysis with different interconnect network topologies. Elk achieves 94% of the ideal roofline performance of ICCA chips on average, showing the benefits of supporting large DL models on ICCA chips. We also show Elk ’s capability of enabling architecture design space exploration for new ICCA chip development.
items.abstract_zh:
为了满足深度学习（DL）模型日益增长的需求，AI芯片正在采用片外存储器（例如HBM）和高带宽低延迟互连来实现核心间的直接数据交换。然而，由于计算（每核执行）、通信（核间数据交换）和 I/O（片外数据访问）之间存在根本性的冲突，探索这些核间连接的 AI (ICCA) 芯片的效率并不容易。

在本文中，我们开发了 Elk，一个 DL 编译器框架，通过共同权衡上述所有三个性能因素来最大限度地提高 ICCA 芯片的效率。 Elk 将这些性能因素构建为可配置参数，并在 DL 编译器中形成全局权衡空间。为了系统地探索这个空间并最大限度地提高整体效率，Elk 采用了新的归纳算子调度策略和成本感知的片上内存分配算法。它生成全局优化的执行计划，最好地重叠片外数据加载和片内执行。为了检查 Elk 的效率，我们构建了一个基于真实 ICCA 芯片 IPU-POD4 的成熟仿真器，以及一个用于不同互连网络拓扑的灵敏度分析的 ICCA 芯片模拟器。 Elk 平均实现了 ICCA 芯片理想屋顶线性能的 94%，展示了 ICCA 芯片上支持大型 DL 模型的好处。我们还展示了 Elk 为新 ICCA 芯片开发启用架构设计空间探索的能力。

items.title: SymbFuzz: Symbolic Execution Guided Hardware Fuzzing.
items.abstract: Modern hardware incorporates reusable designs to reduce cost and time to market, inadvertently increasing exposure to security vulnerabilities. While formal verification and simulation-based approaches have been traditionally utilized to mitigate these vulnerabilities, formal techniques are hindered by scalability issues, while conventional simulation methods frequently overlook critical edge cases. Fuzzing, as a simulation-based strategy, has demonstrated considerable promise in enhancing the security of both software and hardware; however, it is impeded by challenges such as limited input coverage, difficulties in traversing branching paths, and the complexity of managing circuit parameters, in addition to the limited adaptability of existing hardware fuzzing techniques within industrial workflows. To address these limitations, we propose SymbFuzz , an innovative hybrid hardware fuzzing methodology that leverages symbolic execution to achieve superior coverage. SymbFuzz is the first hardware fuzzing technique to be implemented on the industry-standard Universal Verification Methodology (UVM), facilitating seamless integration into commercial hardware verification flows. SymbFuzz was evaluated on a diverse set of processor RTLs, including OpenTitan (Ibex), CVA6, Rocket-Core, and Mor1kx. These designs span a range of processor architectures and complexities. SymbFuzz detected all bugs previously found by existing fuzzers and additionally uncovered 14 new bugs, including a vulnerability in OpenTitan, reported in the CWE 2025 database. It also achieved up to 6.8 × faster convergence compared to traditional UVM random testing and over 2 × 10 4 additional functional coverage points compared to state-of-the-art fuzzers, demonstrating its effectiveness in improving RTL validation across varied processor architectures.
items.abstract_zh: 现代硬件采用可重复使用的设计来降低成本和缩短上市时间，但无意中增加了安全漏洞的风险。虽然传统上使用形式验证和基于模拟的方法来缓解这些漏洞，但形式化技术受到可扩展性问题的阻碍，而传统的模拟方法经常忽视关键的边缘情况。模糊测试作为一种基于模拟的策略，在增强软件和硬件的安全性方面表现出了巨大的前景；然而，除了工业工作流程中现有硬件模糊测试技术的适应性有限之外，它还受到诸如有限的输入覆盖范围、遍历分支路径的困难以及管理电路参数的复杂性等挑战的阻碍。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 SymbFuzz，这是一种创新的混合硬件模糊测试方法，利用符号执行来实现卓越的覆盖范围。 SymbFuzz 是第一个在行业标准通用验证方法 (UVM) 上实施的硬件模糊测试技术，有助于无缝集成到商业硬件验证流程中。 SymbFuzz 在多种处理器 RTL 上进行了评估，包括 OpenTitan (Ibex)、CVA6、Rocket-Core 和 Mor1kx。这些设计涵盖了一系列处理器架构和复杂性。 SymbFuzz 检测到了现有模糊器之前发现的所有错误，还发现了 14 个新错误，其中包括 CWE 2025 数据库中报告的 OpenTitan 中的漏洞。与传统 UVM 随机测试相比，它还实现了高达 6.8 倍的更快收敛速度​​，与最先进的模糊器相比，实现了超过 2 × 10 4 的额外功能覆盖点，证明了其在改进跨不同处理器架构的 RTL 验证方面的有效性。

items.title: Boosting Task Scheduling Data Locality with Low-latency, HW-accelerated Label Propagation.
items.abstract: Task Scheduling is a popular technique for exploiting parallelism in modern computing systems. In particular, HW-accelerated Task Scheduling has been shown to be effective at improving the performance of fine-grained workloads by dynamically assigning tasks to cores based on their data dependencies with minimal overhead, allowing the handling of tasks with execution times in the order of thousands of cycles. However, the performance of applications assisted by accelerated Task Scheduling is limited by the fact that once a task has all its dependencies fulfilled, it is typically executed on the first available core, which might not be locality-optimal. We thus propose a novel approach to Task Scheduling that leverages HW-accelerated Label Propagation (LP), a graph clustering algorithm, to group tasks with intersecting data patterns such that they are executed on the same core. We show that our approach can significantly improve the performance of task-based applications, improving overall program execution times by up to 1.50 × while simultaneously reducing average task sizes by up to 1.81 ×, augmenting both synthetic benchmarks and real-world applications running on a 24-core RISC-V processor mapped to the Alveo U55C FPGA. These gains rely heavily on the low-latency nature of our proposed label propagation accelerator, which will typically cluster dynamic task graphs in under 300 cycles, up to 581 × faster than an equivalent software implementation. Furthermore, by ensuring that ideal placement predictions are used as a hint rather than a hard constraint, we allow the system to benefit from improved data locality for memory-intensive applications while also maintaining high core utilization in compute-bound scenarios. Our results hence demonstrate the potential of HW-accelerated label propagation to improve the performance of Task Scheduling systems with low-latency, dynamic data locality optimization.
items.abstract_zh: 任务调度是现代计算系统中利用并行性的一种流行技术。特别是，硬件加速任务调度已被证明可以有效地提高细粒度工作负载的性能，它可以根据数据依赖性以最小的开销将任务动态分配给内核，从而允许处理执行时间为数千个周期的任务。然而，加速任务调度辅助的应用程序的性能受到以下事实的限制：一旦任务满足其所有依赖性，它通常在第一个可用核心上执行，这可能不是局部最优的。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的任务调度方法，该方法利用硬件加速标签传播（LP）（一种图聚类算法）对具有交叉数据模式的任务进行分组，以便它们在同一核心上执行。我们证明，我们的方法可以显着提高基于任务的应用程序的性能，将整体程序执行时间提高多达 1.50 倍，同时将平均任务大小减少多达 1.81 倍，增强综合基准测试和在映射到 Alveo U55C FPGA 的 24 核 RISC-V 处理器上运行的实际应用程序。这些收益在很大程度上依赖于我们提出的标签传播加速器的低延迟特性，该加速器通常会在 300 个周期内对动态任务图进行聚类，比同等软件实现快 581 倍。此外，通过确保理想的放置预测用作提示而不是硬约束，我们允许系统从内存密集型应用程序的数据局部性改进中受益，同时还在计算密集型场景中保持高核心利用率。因此，我们的结果证明了硬件加速标签传播通过低延迟、动态数据局部性优化来提高任务调度系统性能的潜力。

items.title: Accurate Leakage Speculation for Quantum Error Correction.
items.abstract:
Quantum Error Correction (QEC) protects qubits against bit- and phase-flip errors in the \(\mathinner {|{0}\rangle }/\mathinner {|{1}\rangle }\) subspace, but physical qubits can also leak into higher energy levels (e.g., \(\mathinner {|{2}\rangle }\) ). Leakage is especially harmful, as it corrupts all subsequent syndrome measurements and can spread to neighboring qubits. Detecting leakage on data qubits is particularly challenging, since they are never measured directly during QEC cycles. Prior work, such as eraser [ 43 ], addresses this by inferring leakage from syndrome patterns using a fixed heuristic. However, this approach often misclassifies benign syndromes, triggering excessive leakage-reduction circuits (LRCs). Because LRCs are themselves noisy and slow, these false triggers lengthen QEC cycles and inflate logical error rates.

We propose gladiator , a general and adaptable leakage speculation framework that works across surface code, color code, and qLDPC codes. Offline, gladiator builds a code-aware error-propagation graph calibrated to device data. Online, it classifies each syndrome in a few nanoseconds and schedules LRC only when the observed pattern is provably leakage-dominated. This precise speculation eliminates up to 3 × (and on average 2 ×) unnecessary LRCs, shortens QEC cycles, and suppresses false positives at their source. Evaluated on standard fault-tolerant benchmarks, gladiator delivers 1.7 × –3.9 × speedups and 16% reduction in logical error rate, advancing the efficiency of fault-tolerant quantum computing.
items.abstract_zh:
量子纠错 (QEC) 保护量子位免受 \(\mathinner {|{0}\rangle }/\mathinner {|{1}\rangle }\) 子空间中的位和相位翻转错误的影响，但物理量子位也可能泄漏到更高的能级（例如 \(\mathinner {|{2}\rangle }\) ）。泄漏尤其有害，因为它会破坏所有后续的综合症测量，并可能传播到相邻的量子位。检测数据量子位上的泄漏尤其具有挑战性，因为它们在 QEC 周期期间永远不会直接测量。先前的工作，例如擦除器[43]，通过使用固定启发式从综合症模式推断泄漏来解决这个问题。然而，这种方法经常对良性综合征进行错误分类，从而触发过多的漏电减少电路（LRC）。由于 LRC 本身噪声大且速度慢，因此这些错误触发会延长 QEC 周期并增加逻辑错误率。

我们提出了gladiator，这是一种通用且适应性强的泄漏推测框架，可跨表面代码、颜色代码和qLDPC代码工作。离线时，角斗士构建了一个根据设备数据进行校准的代码感知错误传播图。在网上，它可以在几纳秒内对每种综合症进行分类，并且仅当观察到的模式可证明是泄漏主导时才安排 LRC。这种精确的推测消除了多达 3 ×（平均 2 ×）不必要的 LRC，缩短了 QEC 周期，并从源头上抑制了误报。在标准容错基准上进行评估，角斗士提供了 1.7 × –3.9 × 的加速和 16% 的逻辑错误率降低，提高了容错量子计算的效率。

items.title: One Flew over the Stack Engine's Nest: Practical Microarchitectural Attacks on the Stack Engine.
items.abstract: Security research on modern CPUs has raised numerous concerns in recent years. These security issues stem from classic microarchitectural optimizations designed decades ago, without consideration for security. Stack pointer tracking, also known as the stack engine in recent CPUs, is one such optimization. To investigate the security implications of the stack engine, we reverse engineer its operational details on a number of recent Intel and AMD CPUs for the first time. Our results show the particular microarchitecture-dependent behaviors of the stack engine, such as the conditions under which it needs to synchronize the stack pointer values with the backend. Using these results, we build three primitives called Direct Underflow , Sync+Reload and Prime+Sync+Probe that enable information leakage through the stack engine under different conditions. We use these primitives in the construction of various covert and side-channel attacks, leaking sensitive patient records from a widely-used JSON library as an example. Our mitigation efforts reveal that recent AMD Zen 4 and Zen 5 CPUs include undocumented chicken bits which allow enabling or disabling the stack engine. Using these bits to disable the stack engine, we measure 3.98% and 3.94% slowdown using SPEC CPU2017 on Zen 4 and Zen 5, respectively, prompting the need to consider more secure designs for the stack engine in future CPUs which we also discuss.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，针对现代 CPU 的安全研究引起了众多关注。这些安全问题源于几十年前设计的经典微架构优化，没有考虑安全性。堆栈指针跟踪（在最近的 CPU 中也称为堆栈引擎）就是这样的优化之一。为了调查堆栈引擎的安全隐患，我们首次在一些最新的 Intel 和 AMD CPU 上对其操作细节进行了逆向工程。我们的结果显示了堆栈引擎的特定微架构相关行为，例如需要将堆栈指针值与后端同步的条件。利用这些结果，我们构建了三个原语，称为 Direct Underflow 、 Sync+Reload 和 Prime+Sync+Probe ，它们能够在不同条件下通过堆栈引擎泄漏信息。我们在构建各种隐蔽和旁道攻击时使用这些原语，例如从广泛使用的 JSON 库中泄露敏感的患者记录。我们的缓解措施表明，最近的 AMD Zen 4 和 Zen 5 CPU 包含未记录的鸡块，允许启用或禁用堆栈引擎。使用这些位来禁用堆栈引擎，我们在 Zen 4 和 Zen 5 上使用 SPEC CPU2017 测得速度分别降低了 3.98% 和 3.94%，这提示需要在我们也讨论的未来 CPU 中考虑更安全的堆栈引擎设计。

items.title: Empowering Vector Architectures for ML: The CAMP Architecture for Matrix Multiplication.
items.abstract:
This study presents the Cartesian Accumulative Matrix Pipeline (CAMP) architecture, a novel approach designed to enhance matrix multiplication in Vector Architectures (VAs) and Single Instruction, Multiple Data (SIMD) units. CAMP improves processing efficiency of Quantized Neural Networks (QNNs).

Matrix multiplication is a cornerstone of machine learning applications, and its quantized versions are increasingly popular for more efficient operations. Unfortunately, existing VAs and SIMD-support units struggle to efficiently handle these quantized formats. In this work, we propose CAMP, a simple yet effective architecture that leverages a hybrid multiplier. The CAMP architecture significantly advances the performance of vector architectures in handling quantized data, enabling more efficient execution of matrix multiplication across various platforms, specifically targeting the ARMv8 Scalable Vector Extension (SVE) and edge RISC-V with SIMD-support unit architecture. Thanks to its hierarchical design, CAMP natively supports multiple integer precisions; here we focus on 4-bit and 8-bit, while the unit remains applicable as a general-purpose integer multiplier across other bit widths. In addition to increasing throughput, CAMP’s architectural design also contributes to energy efficiency, making it an effective solution for low-power applications.

Evaluations on a range of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) demonstrate that matrix multiplication operations using the proposed micro-architecture achieve up to 17 × and 23 × performance improvements compared to their respective baselines, the ARM A64FX core and a RISC-V-based edge System-on-Chip (SoC). Furthermore, synthesis and place-and-route (PnR) of the CAMP micro-architecture — using Synopsys ICC2 for the ARM TSMC 7nm (A64FX) and Cadence Innovus for the GlobalFoundries 22nm flow (RISC-V SoC)—add only 1% and 4% area overhead, respectively, compared to the baseline designs.
items.abstract_zh:
本研究提出了笛卡尔累积矩阵管道 (CAMP) 架构，这是一种旨在增强向量架构 (VA) 和单指令多数据 (SIMD) 单元中的矩阵乘法的新颖方法。 CAMP 提高了量化神经网络 (QNN) 的处理效率。

矩阵乘法是机器学习应用的基石，其量化版本越来越受欢迎，以实现更高效的运算。不幸的是，现有的 VA 和 SIMD 支持单元很难有效地处理这些量化格式。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CAMP，这是一种利用混合乘法器的简单而有效的架构。 CAMP 架构显着提高了矢量架构在处理量化数据方面的性能，能够更高效地跨各种平台执行矩阵乘法，特别针对 ARMv8 可扩展矢量扩展 (SVE) 和具有 SIMD 支持单元架构的边缘 RISC-V。由于其分层设计，CAMP 原生支持多种整数精度；这里我们关注 4 位和 8 位，而该单元仍然适用于其他位宽度的通用整数乘法器。除了提高吞吐量之外，CAMP 的架构设计还有助于提高能源效率，使其成为低功耗应用的有效解决方案。

对一系列大型语言模型 (LLM) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的评估表明，与各自的基准、ARM A64FX 内核和基于 RISC-V 的边缘片上系统 (SoC) 相比，使用所提出的微架构的矩阵乘法运算可实现高达 17 倍和 23 倍的性能改进。此外，与基准设计相比，CAMP 微架构的综合和布局布线 (PnR) — 使用用于 ARM TSMC 7nm (A64FX) 的 Synopsys ICC2 和用于 GlobalFoundries 22nm 流程 (RISC-V SoC) 的 Cadence Innovus — 仅分别增加 1% 和 4% 的面积开销。

items.title: A. Delegato: Locality-Aware Atomic Memory Operations on Chiplets.
items.abstract:
The irruption of chiplet-based architectures has been a game changer, enabling higher transistor integration and core counts in a single socket. However, chiplets impose higher and non-uniform memory access (NUMA) latencies than monolithic integration. This harms the efficiency of atomic memory operations (AMOs), which are fundamental to implementing fine-grained synchronization and concurrent data structures on large systems. AMOs are executed either near the core (near) or at a remote location within the cache hierarchy (far). On near AMOs, the core’s private cache fetches the target cache line in exclusiveness to modify it locally. Near AMOs cause significant data movement between private caches, especially harming parallel applications’ performance on chiplet-based architectures. Alternatively, far AMOs can alleviate the communication overhead by reducing data movement between processing elements. However, current multicore architectures only support one type of far AMO, which sends all updates to a single serialization point (centralized AMOs).

This work introduces two new types of far AMOs, delegated and migrating, that execute AMOs remotely without centralizing updates in a single point of the cache hierarchy. Combining centralized, delegated, and migrating AMOs allows the directory to select the best location to execute AMOs. Moreover, we propose Delegato, a tracing optimization to effectively transport usage information from private caches to the directory to predict the best atomic type to issue accurately. Additionally, we design a simple predictor on top of Delegato that seamlessly selects the best placement to perform AMOs based on the data access pattern and usage activity of cores. Our evaluation using gem5 shows that Delegato can speed up applications on average by 1.07 × over centralized AMOs and by 1.13 × over the state-of-the-art AMO predictor.
items.abstract_zh:
基于小芯片的架构的出现改变了游戏规则，在单个插槽中实现了更高的晶体管集成度和核心数量。然而，与单片集成相比，小芯片会带来更高的非均匀内存访问 (NUMA) 延迟。这会损害原子内存操作 (AMO) 的效率，而原子内存操作是在大型系统上实现细粒度同步和并发数据结构的基础。 AMO 在核心附近（近）或缓存层次结构中的远程位置（远）执行。在近 AMO 上，核心的私有缓存以独占方式获取目标缓存行以在本地修改它。近 AMO 会导致私有缓存之间发生大量数据移动，尤其会损害基于小芯片的架构上的并行应用程序的性能。或者，远 AMO 可以通过减少处理元件之间的数据移动来减轻通信开销。然而，当前的多核架构仅支持一种类型的远 AMO，它将所有更新发送到单个序列化点（集中式 AMO）。

这项工作引入了两种新型远程 AMO：委托和迁移，它们远程执行 AMO，而无需将更新集中在缓存层次结构的单个点中。结合集中式、委托式和迁移式 AMO，目录可以选择执行 AMO 的最佳位置。此外，我们提出了 Delegato，一种跟踪优化，可以有效地将使用信息从私有缓存传输到目录，以准确预测要发布的最佳原子类型。此外，我们在 Delegato 之上设计了一个简单的预测器，可以根据数据访问模式和核心的使用活动无缝地选择执行 AMO 的最佳位置。我们使用 gem5 进行的评估表明，Delegato 的应用程序速度比集中式 AMO 平均提高了 1.07 倍，比最先进的 AMO 预测器平均提高了 1.13 倍。

items.title: EcoCore: Dynamic Core Management for Improving Energy Efficiency in Latency-Critical Applications.
items.abstract: Modern data centers face increasing pressure to improve energy efficiency while guaranteeing Service Level Objectives (SLOs) for Latency-Critical (LC) applications. Resource management in public cloud environments, typically operating at the node or instance level, often results in underutilized idle cores and unnecessary energy consumption, highlighting the need for fine-grained core-level management. Existing studies on core management primarily focus on allocating cores for application threads, aiming to maximize idle cores without violating SLOs, but often neglect the impact of network packet processing on core idleness and energy consumption. In this work, we demonstrate that separate core allocation for network packet processing is essential to optimize both performance and energy efficiency in LC applications. Additionally, we show that co-managing packet processing intervals alongside core allocation further enhances core idleness and reduces energy consumption without compromising SLO compliance. Based on these insights, we propose EcoCore , a dynamic core management technique that jointly manages core allocation for application threads and network packet processing while adaptively adjusting packet processing intervals. EcoCore employs a lightweight predictive model to estimate energy consumption and tail latency, enabling it to select energy-efficient configurations without violating SLOs. Through comprehensive evaluations, including deployment on the AWS cloud platform, EcoCore demonstrates its practicality, reducing energy consumption by 11.7 \(\%\) on average and by up to 20.3 \(\%\) without SLO violations. In the AWS cloud environment, EcoCore extends core sleep states by up to 45.9 \(\%\) , resulting in additional energy savings of up to 35.8 \(\%\) . These results highlight EcoCore ’s potential for bridging the gap between coarse-grained resource management and fine-grained core management in data centers.
items.abstract_zh: 现代数据中心面临着越来越大的压力，需要提高能源效率，同时保证延迟关键 (LC) 应用程序的服务级别目标 (SLO)。公有云环境中的资源管理通常在节点或实例级别运行，通常会导致闲置核心未充分利用和不必要的能源消耗，这凸显了细粒度核心级管理的必要性。现有的核心管理研究主要集中在为应用程序线程分配核心，旨在在不违反SLO的情况下最大化空闲核心，但往往忽视网络数据包处理对核心空闲和能耗的影响。在这项工作中，我们证明了网络数据包处理的单独核心分配对于优化 LC 应用的性能和能源效率至关重要。此外，我们还表明，在核心分配的同时共同管理数据包处理间隔可以进一步增强核心闲置率并降低能耗，而不会影响 SLO 合规性。基于这些见解，我们提出了 EcoCore，这是一种动态核心管理技术，可以联合管理应用程序线程和网络数据包处理的核心分配，同时自适应调整数据包处理间隔。 EcoCore 采用轻量级预测模型来估计能耗和尾部延迟，使其能够在不违反 SLO 的情况下选择节能配置。通过综合评估，包括在 AWS 云平台上的部署，EcoCore 展示了其实用性，在不违反 SLO 的情况下，平均降低能耗 11.7 \(\%\)，最高可达 20.3 \(\%\)。在 AWS 云环境中，EcoCore 将核心睡眠状态延长高达 45.9 \(\%\) ，从而额外节省高达 35.8 \(\%\) 的能源。这些结果凸显了 EcoCore 在缩小数据中心粗粒度资源管理和细粒度核心管理之间差距方面的潜力。

items.title: GCC: A 3DGS Inference Architecture with Gaussian-Wise and Cross-Stage Conditional Processing.
items.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a leading neural rendering technique for high-fidelity view synthesis, prompting the development of dedicated 3DGS accelerators for resource-constrained platforms. The conventional decoupled preprocessing-rendering dataflow in existing accelerators has two major limitations: 1) a significant portion of preprocessed Gaussians are not used in rendering, and 2) the same Gaussian gets repeatedly loaded across different tile renderings, resulting in substantial computational and data movement overhead. To address these issues, we propose GCC, a novel accelerator designed for fast and energy-efficient 3DGS inference. GCC introduces a novel dataflow featuring: 1) cross-stage conditional processing , which interleaves preprocessing and rendering to dynamically skip unnecessary Gaussian preprocessing; and 2) Gaussian-wise rendering , ensuring that all rendering operations for a given Gaussian are completed before moving to the next, thereby eliminating duplicated Gaussian loading. We also propose an alpha-based boundary identification method to derive compact and accurate Gaussian regions, thereby reducing rendering costs. We implement our GCC accelerator in 28nm technology. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GCC significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art 3DGS inference accelerator, GSCore, in both performance and energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 3D 高斯泼溅 (3DGS) 已成为一种用于高保真视图合成的领先神经渲染技术，推动了针对资源受限平台的专用 3DGS 加速器的开发。现有加速器中传统的解耦预处理-渲染数据流有两个主要限制：1）很大一部分预处理高斯没有在渲染中使用，2）相同的高斯在不同的图块渲染中重复加载，导致大量的计算和数据移动开销。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 GCC，这是一种专为快速且节能的 3DGS 推理而设计的新型加速器。 GCC 引入了一种新颖的数据流，具有以下特点：1）跨阶段条件处理，将预处理和渲染交错进行，以动态跳过不必要的高斯预处理； 2）高斯明智渲染，确保给定高斯的所有渲染操作在移动到下一个之前完成，从而消除重复的高斯加载。我们还提出了一种基于 alpha 的边界识别方法来导出紧凑且准确的高斯区域，从而降低渲染成本。我们采用 28 纳米技术实现 GCC 加速器。大量实验表明，GCC 在性能和能效方面均明显优于最先进的 3DGS 推理加速器 GSCore。

items.title: Symbiotic Task Scheduling and Data Prefetching.
items.abstract: Task-parallel programming models enable programmers to extract parallelism from irregular applications. Since software-based task-parallel runtimes impose crippling overheads on fine-grain tasks, architects have designed manycores with hardware support for task management. These hardware task-parallel systems can scale challenging workloads to hundreds of cores, but fail to use conventional prefetchers due to short (100-cycle) tasks. Lacking prefetching, they often expose DRAM latency to applications, fumbling the performance gains of hardware. We present the Task-Seeded Prefetcher ( TSP ) and Memory Response Task Scheduler ( MRS ), a symbiotic pair that boost performance in general-purpose task-parallel hardware. TSP learns and prefetches the data-access pattern of each task function, seeded with its descriptor that is queued by the task scheduler. MRS augments the baseline task-to-core dispatch policy by using prefetch status from TSP to optimize core utilization. Together, TSP and MRS provide speedups of up to 3.1 × (gmeans up to 1.4 ×) across 13 benchmarks on 256-core task-parallel systems that were already 3–60 × faster than parallel software.
items.abstract_zh: 任务并行编程模型使程序员能够从不规则的应用程序中提取并行性。由于基于软件的任务并行运行时给细粒度任务带来了严重的开销，因此架构师设计了具有任务管理硬件支持的多核。这些硬件任务并行系统可以将具有挑战性的工作负载扩展到数百个核心，但由于任务较短（100 个周期）而无法使用传统的预取器。由于缺乏预取，它们经常会给应用程序带来 DRAM 延迟，从而影响硬件的性能提升。我们提出了任务种子预取器 ( TSP ) 和内存响应任务调度器 ( MRS )，这是一对可以提高通用任务并行硬件性能的共生对。 TSP 学习并预取每个任务函数的数据访问模式，并以其由任务调度程序排队的描述符作为种子。 MRS 通过使用 TSP 的预取状态来优化核心利用率，从而增强了基线任务到核心的调度策略。 TSP 和 MRS 共同在 256 核任务并行系统的 13 个基准测试中提供高达 3.1 倍（gmeans 高达 1.4 倍）的加速，而这些系统已经比并行软件快了 3-60 倍。

items.title: Optimizing All-to-All Collective Communication with Fault Tolerance on Torus Networks.
items.abstract:
Large-scale distributed processing is extensively employed for large model inference and training, such as Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRMs) and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models. However, the All-to-All collective, with its complex point-to-point communication patterns and blocking nature, has become a major performance bottleneck in distributed DLRM and MoE accelerations. Moreover, the prolonged distributed processing often encounters link failures, which severely impact system efficiency, reliability, and cost. Unlike switched-based topologies, which support any-to-any connections like Clos networks, All-to-All communication on torus networks can interfere with one another by sharing routing paths, creating critical performance limitations.

To address these challenges, we propose single-dimensional algorithm and multi-dimensional scheduling for all-to-all optimizations with fault tolerance on torus. In fault-free scenarios, we propose HalfRing algorithm and DimRotation scheduling. HalfRing utilizes bidirectional links to construct shortest communication path on a ring, while DimRotation allocates communication sequences of each data chunk across multiple dimensions to achieve full bandwidth utilization. In faulty scenarios, we introduce FoldedRing algorithm and MATE scheduling. FoldedRing facilitates fault-tolerant communication on a ring, while MATE accelerates communication on the faulty ring by leveraging available links from other dimensions. Our results show that, compared to the ring algorithm with pipeline scheduling, HalfRing, DimRotation and their combination can achieve average performance speedups of 1.56 ×, 1.45 ×, and 2.28 ×, respectively. For All-to-All with a single link failure, MATE can achieve a 1.37 × speedup compared to ring-based fault-free conditions. When compared with state-of-the-art routing methods in TPUv4 clusters, our approach achieves 1.57 × and 1.61 × speedups for fault-free and fault-tolerant scenarios, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
大规模分布式处理广泛用于大型模型推理和训练，例如深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）和专家混合（MoE）模型。然而，All-to-All 集合体以其复杂的点对点通信模式和阻塞性质，已成为分布式 DLRM 和 MoE 加速的主要性能瓶颈。此外，长时间的分布式处理经常会遇到链路故障，严重影响系统效率、可靠性和成本。与支持 Clos 网络等任意对任意连接的基于交换的拓扑不同，环面网络上的所有对所有通信可能会通过共享路由路径而相互干扰，从而造成关键的性能限制。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了单维算法和多维调度，以实现环面容错的全面优化。在无故障场景下，我们提出HalfRing算法和DimRotation调度。 HalfRing利用双向链路在环上构建最短通信路径，而DimRotation则跨多个维度分配每个数据块的通信序列以实现带宽的充分利用。针对故障场景，我们引入了FoldedRing算法和MATE调度。 FoldedRing有助于环上的容错通信，而MATE则通过利用其他维度的可用链路来加速故障环上的通信。我们的结果表明，与带有流水线调度的环算法相比，HalfRing、DimRotation 及其组合可以分别实现 1.56 ×、1.45 × 和 2.28 × 的平均性能加速。对于单链路故障的 All-to-All，与基于环的无故障条件相比，MATE 可以实现 1.37 倍的加速。与 TPUv4 集群中最先进的路由方法相比，我们的方法在无故障和容错场景下分别实现了 1.57 × 和 1.61 × 的加速。

items.title: LongSight: Compute-Enabled Memory to Accelerate Large-Context LLMs via Sparse Attention.
items.abstract: Large input context windows in transformer-based LLMs help minimize hallucinations and improve output accuracy and personalization. However, as the context window grows, the attention phase increasingly dominates execution time. Key–Value (KV) caching alleviates part of this cost by avoiding redundant computation, but the KV cache itself can quickly exceed the capacity of today’s GPU high-bandwidth memory (HBM). In this work, we present LongSight, an algorithm–hardware co-design framework for accelerating attention in large-context scenarios. LongSight leverages a compute-enabled CXL memory device, originally designed for dense retrieval acceleration, to offload KV cache storage and retrieval. Therefore, LongSight effectively elevates the value of relatively low-cost LPDDR DRAM to that of high-end HBM. We demonstrate that, with just a single GPU and a single compute-enabled CXL memory expander, LongSight can efficiently support context lengths of up to 1 million tokens for state-of-the-art Llama models.
items.abstract_zh: 基于变压器的法学硕士中的大输入上下文窗口有助于最大限度地减少幻觉并提高输出准确性和个性化。然而，随着上下文窗口的增长，注意力阶段越来越主导执行时间。键值 (KV) 缓存通过避免冗余计算来减轻部分成本，但 KV 缓存本身很快就会超过当今 GPU 高带宽内存 (HBM) 的容量。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LongSight，一种算法-硬件协同设计框架，用于加速大上下文场景中的注意力。 LongSight 利用支持计算的 CXL 内存设备（最初设计用于密集检索加速）来卸载 KV 缓存存储和检索。因此，LongSight有效地将相对低成本的LPDDR DRAM的价值提升到高端HBM的价值。我们证明，只需一个 GPU 和一个支持计算的 CXL 内存扩展器，LongSight 就可以有效地支持最先进的 Llama 模型高达 100 万个令牌的上下文长度。

items.title: Flexing RISC-V Instruction Subset Processors to Extreme Edge.
items.abstract: This paper presents an automated approach for designing processors that support a subset of the RISC-V instruction set architecture (ISA) for a new class of applications at Extreme Edge. The electronics used in extreme edge applications must be area and power-efficient, but also provide additional qualities, such as low cost, conformability, comfort and sustainability. Flexible electronics, rather than silicon-based electronics, will be able to meet the above qualities. For this purpose, we propose a methodology for generating RISC-V instruction subset processors (RISSPs) tailored to these applications and implementing them as flexible integrated circuits (FlexICs). The methodology makes verification an integral part of the processor design by treating each instruction in the ISA as a discrete, fully functional, pre-verified hardware block. It automatically builds a custom processor by stitching together the instruction hardware blocks required by an application or a set of applications in a specific domain. We generate RISSPs using the proposed methodology for three extreme edge applications, and embedded applications from the Embench benchmark suite. When synthesized, RISSPs can achieve 8-to-43% reduction in area and 3-to-30% reduction in power compared to a processor supporting the full RISC-V ISA, and are also on average ~40 times more energy efficient than Serv - the world’s smallest 32-bit RISC-V processor. When physically implemented as FlexICs, the three extreme edge RISSPs achieve up to 42% area and 21% power savings with respect to the full RISC-V processor.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于设计处理器的自动化方法，该处理器支持 RISC-V 指令集架构 (ISA) 子集，适用于 Extreme Edge 的新型应用程序。极端边缘应用中使用的电子设备必须具有面积和功率效率，而且还要提供额外的品质，例如低成本、一致性、舒适性和可持续性。柔性电子产品，而不是硅基电子产品，将能够满足上述品质。为此，我们提出了一种生成适合这些应用的 RISC-V 指令子集处理器 (RISSP) 并将其实现为灵活集成电路 (FlexIC) 的方法。该方法通过将 ISA 中的每条指令视为离散的、功能齐全的、预先验证的硬件块，使验证成为处理器设计的一个组成部分。它通过将特定领域中的一个应用程序或一组应用程序所需的指令硬件块拼接在一起来自动构建定制处理器。我们使用所提出的方法为三个极端边缘应用程序以及 Embench 基准套件中的嵌入式应用程序生成 RISSP。综合后，与支持完整 RISC-V ISA 的处理器相比，RISSP 的面积可减少 8% 至 43%，功耗可减少 3% 至 30%，而且平均能效比 Serv（世界上最小的 32 位 RISC-V 处理器）高约 40 倍。当物理实现为 FlexIC 时，三个极端边缘 RISSP 相对于完整 RISC-V 处理器可实现高达 42% 的面积和 21% 的功耗节省。

items.title: RayN: Ray Tracing Acceleration with Near-memory Computing.
items.abstract: A desire for greater realism and increasing transistor density has led the GPU industry to include specialized hardware for accelerating ray tracing in graphics processing units (GPUs). Ray tracing generates realistic images, but even with specialized hardware support for memory traversal, we find it is highly sensitive to memory latency due to pointer chasing operations. Noting that graphics has historically employed specialized DRAM memory (GDDR) and near-memory computing is highly suitable for improving memory access latency, we propose RayN, a near-memory ray tracing architecture. RayN places a memory controller and dedicated ray tracing computation units inside the logic layers of 3D stacked DRAM memory modules specialized for use with GPUs. We study different memory controller configurations for RayN and how to partition scene geometry among memory modules to mitigate load imbalance. RayN achieves 3.0 × speedup on average on representative ray tracing workloads over a GPU without near-memory support while incurring a minimal area and power overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 对更高真实感和增加晶体管密度的渴望导致 GPU 行业在图形处理单元 (GPU) 中加入了用于加速光线追踪的专用硬件。光线追踪生成逼真的图像，但即使有专门的硬件支持内存遍历，我们发现它对由于指针追踪操作而导致的内存延迟高度敏感。注意到图形历来采用专用 DRAM 内存 (GDDR) 并且近内存计算非常适合改善内存访问延迟，因此我们提出了 RayN，一种近内存光线追踪架构。 RayN 将内存控制器和专用光线追踪计算单元放置在专门用于 GPU 的 3D 堆叠 DRAM 内存模块的逻辑层内。我们研究了 RayN 的不同内存控制器配置以及如何在内存模块之间划分场景几何形状以减轻负载不平衡。 RayN 在没有近内存支持的情况下，通过 GPU 实现代表性光线追踪工作负载的平均加速 3.0 倍，同时产生最小的面积和功耗开销。

items.title: OmniSim: Simulating Hardware with C Speed and RTL Accuracy for High-Level Synthesis Designs.
items.abstract:
High-Level Synthesis (HLS) is increasingly popular for hardware design using C/C++ instead of Register-Transfer Level (RTL). To express concurrent hardware behavior in a sequential language like C/C++, HLS tools introduce constructs such as infinite loops and dataflow modules connected by FIFOs (first-in first-out). While these constructs can represent concurrency, efficiently and accurately simulating them at C level remains challenging. First, without hardware timing information, functional verification typically requires slow RTL synthesis and simulation, as the current approaches in commercial HLS tools. Second, cycle-accurate performance metrics, such as end-to-end latency or throughput, also rely on RTL simulation. No existing HLS tool fully overcomes the first limitation. For the second, prior work such as LightningSim partially improves simulation speed but lacks support for advanced dataflow features like cyclic dependencies and non-blocking FIFO accesses.

To overcome both limitations, we propose OmniSim , a framework that significantly extends the simulation capabilities of both academic and commercial HLS tools. First, OmniSim enables fast and accurate simulation of complex dataflow designs, especially those explicitly declared unsupported by commercial tools. It does so through sophisticated software multi-threading, where threads are orchestrated by querying and updating a set of FIFO tables that explicitly record exact hardware timing of each FIFO access. Second, OmniSim achieves near-C simulation speed with near-RTL accuracy for both functionality and performance, via flexibly coupled and overlapped functionality and performance simulations.

We demonstrate that OmniSim successfully simulates eleven designs previously unsupported by any HLS tool, achieving up to 35.9 × speedup over traditional C/RTL co-simulation, and up to 6.61 × speedup over the state-of-the-art yet less capable simulator, LightningSim, on its own benchmark suite.
items.abstract_zh:
在使用 C/C++ 而不是寄存器传输级 (RTL) 的硬件设计中，高级综合 (HLS) 越来越受欢迎。为了用 C/C++ 等顺序语言表达并发硬件行为，HLS 工具引入了无限循环和通过 FIFO（先进先出）连接的数据流模块等结构。虽然这些构造可以表示并发性，但在 C 级别有效且准确地模拟它们仍然具有挑战性。首先，在没有硬件时序信息的情况下，功能验证通常需要缓慢的 RTL 合成和仿真，正如商业 HLS 工具中的当前方法一样。其次，周期精确的性能指标（例如端到端延迟或吞吐量）也依赖于 RTL 模拟。现有的 HLS 工具还没有完全克服第一个限制。其次，LightningSim 等之前的工作部分提高了模拟速度，但缺乏对循环依赖和非阻塞 FIFO 访问等高级数据流功能的支持。

为了克服这两个限制，我们提出了 OmniSim，这是一个可以显着扩展学术和商业 HLS 工具模拟功能的框架。首先，OmniSim 能够快速、准确地模拟复杂的数据流设计，尤其是那些明确声明不受商业工具支持的设计。它通过复杂的软件多线程来实现这一点，其中通过查询和更新一组 FIFO 表来编排线程，这些表明确记录每个 FIFO 访问的准确硬件时序。其次，OmniSim 通过灵活耦合和重叠的功能和性能仿真，实现了接近 C 的仿真速度和接近 RTL 的功能和性能精度。

我们证明，OmniSim 成功模拟了以前任何 HLS 工具都不支持的 11 种设计，在其自己的基准套件上实现了比传统 C/RTL 协同仿真高达 35.9 倍的加速，比最先进但能力较差的模拟器 LightningSim 高达 6.61 倍的加速。

items.title: Citadel: Rethinking Memory Allocation to Safeguard Against Inter-Domain Rowhammer Exploits.
items.abstract: Rowhammer is a hardware security vulnerability at the heart of every DRAM-based memory system. Despite its discovery a decade ago, comprehensive defenses in current systems remain elusive, while the probability of successful attacks grows with DRAM density. Hardware-based defenses have proven ineffective due to substantial cost, delays in commercial adoption, and repeated circumventions by attackers, while more flexible software-based solutions incur major performance and memory capacity overheads or offer only limited protection. Citadel is a new memory allocator design that prevents Rowhammer-initiated security exploits by addressing the vulnerability’s root cause: physical adjacency of DRAM rows. It introduces flexible security domains and isolates them in physically disjoint memory regions, guaranteeing security by design. On a server system, Citadel supports thousands of security domains at a modest 7.2% average memory overhead and no performance loss, while remaining readily deployable across legacy, contemporary, and future platforms. In contrast, recent domain isolation schemes fail to support many workload scenarios due to excessive overhead and incur 4–6 × higher overhead for supported scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: Rowhammer 是每个基于 DRAM 的内存系统核心的硬件安全漏洞。尽管它在十年前就被发现了，但当前系统中的全面防御仍然难以实现，而成功攻击的可能性随着 DRAM 密度的增加而增加。由于成本高昂、商业采用的延迟以及攻击者的反复规避，基于硬件的防御已被证明是无效的，而更灵活的基于软件的解决方案会产生重大的性能和内存容量开销，或者仅提供有限的保护。 Citadel 是一种新的内存分配器设计，可通过解决漏洞的根本原因（DRAM 行的物理相邻性）来防止 Rowhammer 发起的安全漏洞。它引入了灵活的安全域，并将它们隔离在物理上不相交的内存区域中，通过设计保证安全性。在服务器系统上，Citadel 以 7.2% 的平均内存开销支持数千个安全域，并且没有性能损失，同时仍然可以跨传统、现代和未来平台轻松部署。相比之下，最近的域隔离方案由于开销过多而无法支持许多工作负载场景，并且为支持的场景带来 4-6 倍的开销。

items.title: A Probabilistic Perspective on Tiling Sparse Tensor Algebra.
items.abstract: Sparse tensor algebra computations are often memory-bound due to irregular access patterns and low arithmetic intensity. We present D2T2 (Data-Driven Tensor Tiling), a framework that optimizes static coordinate-space tiling schemes to minimize memory traffic by identifying and leveraging relevant high-level statistics from input operands. For a given tensor algebra computation, D2T2 collects statistics from input tensors, builds a probability distribution-based model of the tensor computation, and uses it to predict traffic for various tiling configurations. It searches over tile shape and size configurations to minimize total traffic. We evaluate D2T2 against Tailors and DRT, two state of the art tiling schemes for sparse tensor algebra. We find that D2T2 achieves, on average, a 2.54 × speedup over Tailors and a 1.13× lower memory bandwidth compared to DRT for sparse-sparse matrix multiplication (SpMSpM). We also achieve 1.22–48.94× lower bandwidth for SpMSpM and up to 34.31× lower bandwidth for tensor operations (TTM and MTTKRP) than conservative static tiling schemes. Unlike prior tiling techniques, D2T2 is deployable without specialized hardware support. On Opal, a 16nm sparse tensor algebra accelerator, D2T2 generated tiling configurations that achieve 1.23–3.34 × speedups compared to their original hand-tuned configurations.
items.abstract_zh: 由于不规则的访问模式和低算术强度，稀疏张量代数计算通常受内存限制。我们提出了 D2T2（数据驱动张量平铺），这是一个优化静态坐标空间平铺方案的框架，通过识别和利用输入操作数的相关高级统计数据来最大限度地减少内存流量。对于给定的张量代数计算，D2T2 从输入张量收集统计数据，构建基于概率分布的张量计算模型，并使用它来预测各种平铺配置的流量。它搜索图块形状和尺寸配置，以最大限度地减少总流量。我们针对 Tailors 和 DRT（稀疏张量代数的两种最先进的切片方案）评估了 D2T2。我们发现，对于稀疏-稀疏矩阵乘法 (SpMSpM)，D2T2 平均比 Tailors 实现 2.54 倍的加速，并且比 DRT 降低 1.13 倍的内存带宽。与保守的静态切片方案相比，我们还使 SpMSpM 的带宽降低了 1.22–48.94 倍，张量运算（TTM 和 MTTKRP）的带宽降低了 34.31 倍。与之前的切片技术不同，D2T2 无需专门的硬件支持即可部署。在 Opal（16nm 稀疏张量代数加速器）上，D2T2 生成的平铺配置与原始手动调整的配置相比，实现了 1.23–3.34 倍的加速。

items.title: FALA: Locality-Aware PIM-Host Cooperation for Graph Processing with Fine-Grained Column Access.
items.abstract:
Graph processing is fundamental and critical to various domains, such as social networks and recommendation systems. However, its irregular memory access patterns incur significant memory bottlenecks on modern DRAM architectures, optimized for sequential access. To address this challenge, various approaches with cache and processing-in-memory (PIM) have been explored. Cache-based approaches target efficiently utilizing the cache by improving locality through graph tiling. However, a discrepancy between burst size and data makes them suffer from redundant memory accesses. PIM leverages high internal memory bandwidth but fails to exploit cache locality, showing inefficiencies in workloads with high data reuse. Hybrid approaches attempt to combine both techniques but still face limitations since they struggle with overfetching and inefficient cache utilization when vertex data has low reuse.

To this end, we propose FALA , a novel hybrid architecture that synergistically integrates PIM and cache-based acceleration to overcome these limitations. FALA introduces a fine-grained column access mechanism within memory banks and a locality-aware PIM architecture to enhance memory efficiency and cache utilization. Our design minimizes unnecessary memory access while fully utilizing both high internal bandwidth and on-chip caches. We evaluate FALA against state-of-the-art cache-based, PIM, and hybrid graph processing accelerators. Experimental results demonstrate that FALA achieves 1.56 × speedup and reduces energy consumption by 35.3% in geometric mean, compared to the prior art.
items.abstract_zh:
图处理对于社交网络和推荐系统等各个领域来说都是基础和关键。然而，其不规则的内存访问模式在针对顺序访问进行优化的现代 DRAM 架构上会产生严重的内存瓶颈。为了应对这一挑战，人们探索了各种缓存和内存处理 (PIM) 方法。基于缓存的方法旨在通过图形平铺改进局部性来有效利用缓存。然而，突发大小和数据之间的差异使它们遭受冗余内存访问。 PIM 利用高内部内存带宽，但无法利用缓存局部性，这表明数据重用率高的工作负载效率低下。混合方法尝试结合这两种技术，但仍然面临局限性，因为当顶点数据重用率较低时，它们会面临过度获取和低效缓存利用率的问题。

为此，我们提出了 FALA，一种新颖的混合架构，它协同集成 PIM 和基于缓存的加速来克服这些限制。 FALA 在内存库中引入了细粒度的列访问机制和局部感知 PIM 架构，以提高内存效率和缓存利用率。我们的设计最大限度地减少了不必要的内存访问，同时充分利用高内部带宽和片上缓存。我们根据最先进的基于缓存、PIM 和混合图形处理加速器来评估 FALA。实验结果表明，与现有技术相比，FALA实现了1.56倍的加速，几何平均能耗降低了35.3%。

items.title: Drishti: Do Not Forget Slicing While Designing Last-Level Cache Replacement Policies for Many-Core Systems.
items.abstract:
High-performance Last-level Cache (LLC) replacement policies mitigate off-chip memory access latency by intelligently determining which cache lines to retain in the LLC. State-of-the-art replacement policies significantly outperform policies like LRU. However, the effectiveness of these policies is not evaluated on many-core systems with sliced LLCs, which is common in commercial many-core systems. Recent state-of-the-art LLC replacement policies use two seminal ideas: (i) a sampled cache and (ii) a reuse predictor. In a monolithic LLC, there is a single sampled cache and a single reuse predictor. However, these structures must be created per slice with the sliced LLC. We study the interaction between sliced LLC and state-of-the-art replacement policies, identifying a few unexplored interactions. A per-slice reuse predictor makes myopic decisions based on the accesses made to a particular slice, unaware of the global reuse behavior. A trivial solution to this problem is to design a centralized reuse predictor shared by all the LLC slices. However, this will significantly increase interconnect traffic, requiring more bandwidth to access the centralized reuse predictor. Next, we observe that with a sliced LLC, the LLC sets used for the sampled cache do not receive sufficient LLC misses. As these LLC sets drive the decisions of LLC replacement policies, some of the decisions become suboptimal.

We propose Drishti, which is designed to improve the effectiveness of LLC replacement policies further. We make a case for two enhancements: (i) a per-core and yet global reuse predictor with a local (per-slice) sampled cache, and argue that there is no need for a global sampled cache, and (ii) a per-slice dynamic sampled cache to improve the utility of LLC sets used for the sampled cache. We evaluate two state-of-the-art LLC replacement policies, Hawkeye and Mockingjay, on four, 16, and 32-core systems with eight, 32, and 64MB sliced LLC. On a 32-core system, Drishti enhances the effectiveness of two state-of-the-art replacement policies, Hawkeye and Mockingjay, by improving performance by 5.6% and 13.2%, respectively, compared to the baseline LRU policy. Without Drishti, Hawkeye and Mockingjay improve performance by 3.3% and 6.7%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
高性能末级缓存 (LLC) 替换策略通过智能确定在 LLC 中保留哪些缓存行来减少片外内存访问延迟。最先进的替换策略明显优于 LRU 等策略。然而，这些策略的有效性并未在具有切片 LLC 的多核系统上进行评估，这在商业多核系统中很常见。最近最先进的 LLC 替换策略使用两个开创性的想法：(i) 采样缓存和 (ii) 重用预测器。在单片 LLC 中，有一个采样缓存和一个重用预测器。但是，这些结构必须使用切片 LLC 为每个切片创建。我们研究了切片有限责任公司和最先进的替代政策之间的相互作用，确定了一些未经探索的相互作用。每片重用预测器根据对特定片的访问做出短视决策，不知道全局重用行为。该问题的一个简单解决方案是设计一个由所有 LLC 切片共享的集中式重用预测器。然而，这将显着增加互连流量，需要更多带宽来访问集中式重用预测器。接下来，我们观察到，对于切片 LLC，用于采样缓存的 LLC 集没有收到足够的 LLC 未命中。由于这些 LLC 集驱动 LLC 替代政策的决策，因此某些决策变得次优。

我们提出 Drishti，旨在进一步提高 LLC 替代政策的有效性。我们提出了两个增强功能的案例：（i）具有本地（每片）采样缓存的每核全局重用预测器，并认为不需要全局采样缓存，以及（ii）每片动态采样缓存以提高用于采样缓存的 LLC 集的实用性。我们在具有 8、32 和 64MB 切片 LLC 的 4、16 和 32 核系统上评估了两种最先进的 LLC 替换策略 Hawkeye 和 Mockingjay。在 32 核系统上，Drishti 提高了两种最先进的替换策略 Hawkeye 和 Mockingjay 的有效性，与基准 LRU 策略相比，性能分别提高了 5.6% 和 13.2%。如果没有 Drishti，Hawkeye 和 Mockingjay 的性能分别提高了 3.3% 和 6.7%。

items.title: YOUTIAO: Hybrid Multiplexing with Dynamic Qubit Grouping for Low-cost and Scalable Quantum Wiring.
items.abstract: With continuous advances in physical technology, the number of qubits has increased from just a few to several thousand. To further extend the scale, the density of control lines has become one of the major limitations that decides the cost and control fidelity. Specifically, each superconducting qubit requires dedicated control lines to manipulate its state; however, these lines reach the spatial upper limit of the cryostat when scaling up the quantum chip. Inspired by collinear signal transmission, a promising solution is to adopt multiplexing methods—such as frequency-division multiplexing (FDM) and time-division multiplexing (TDM)—to share control lines among superconducting qubits. However, existing methods lack a systematic architectural approach to support multiplexing-aware wiring, which leads to low parallelism and high crosstalk during deployment. In this work, we propose a multiplexing-aware design for the peripheral control lines of superconducting quantum processors, combining cryostat-level wiring optimization with on-chip routing. Our key novelty lies in a hybrid multiplexing architecture that adopts FDM for XY control and readout lines, and TDM for Z control lines. This enables high utilization of natural non-parallel operations, thereby cutting the additional circuit depth for TDM control. Finally, we develop an interaction model that co-optimizes qubit layout and multiplexed channel allocation. Our experiments use the data collected from self-developed Xmon quantum chips. The results show that YOUTIAO achieves a 67.7% reduction in cryostat-level coaxial wiring complexity and overall superconducting quantum system costs, while reducing on-chip routing area by 23%. With these improvements, we still keep the 1q-gate fidelity at 99.98%, and only introduce 5% extra circuit latency compared to the partial-multiplexing system.
items.abstract_zh: 随着物理技术的不断进步，量子比特的数量已经从几个增加到几千个。为了进一步扩大规模，控制线的密度已成为决定成本和控制保真度的主要限制之一。具体来说，每个超导量子位都需要专用的控制线来操纵其状态；然而，当按比例放大量子芯片时，这些线达到了低温恒温器的空间上限。受共线信号传输的启发，一种有前景的解决方案是采用频分复用 (FDM) 和时分复用 (TDM) 等复用方法，在超导量子位之间共享控制线。然而，现有方法缺乏系统的架构方法来支持多路复用感知布线，这导致部署期间的低并行性和高串扰。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种针对超导量子处理器的外围控制线的多路复用感知设计，将低温恒温器级布线优化与片上布线相结合。我们的主要创新点在于混合多路复用架构，该架构采用 FDM 进行 XY 控制和读出线，采用 TDM 进行 Z 控制线。这使得自然非并行操作的高利用率成为可能，从而减少了用于 TDM 控制的额外电路深度。最后，我们开发了一种交互模型，可以共同优化量子位布局和多路复用通道分配。我们的实验使用的是自主研发的Xmon量子芯片收集的数据。结果表明，油条实现了低温恒温器级同轴布线复杂性和整体超导量子系统成本降低67.7%，同时片上布线面积减少23%。通过这些改进，我们仍然将 1q 门保真度保持在 99.98%，并且与部分复用系统相比仅引入了 5% 的额外电路延迟。

items.title: Security and Performance Implications of GPU Cache Eviction Priority Hints.
items.abstract:
NVIDIA provides cache eviction priority hints such as evict_first and evict_last on recent GPUs. These hints allow users to specify the eviction priority that should be used for individual cache lines to improve cache utilization. However, NVIDIA does not disclose the microarchitectural details of these hints or cache eviction behaviors when using them, which makes their security and performance implications unclear.

In this paper, we first reverse engineer the detailed comprehensive behaviors of these eviction priority hints. Then based on our findings, we analyze their impact on system security and performance. First, we found that these priority hints introduce new security problems. Specifically, we develop a new covert channel using the evict_first priority hint, which is more efficient than existing GPU covert channels. We also demonstrate a performance degradation attack using the evict_last priority hint, which is more stealthy compared to the known methods. Second, from the performance perspective, we show that marking a cache line as evict_last does not always keep it in the cache. In fact, if more than 12/16 (or 3/16, depending on the driver version) of the L2 cache size worth of data are marked as evict_last, cache thrashing can occur, which leads to performance degradation for real GPU workloads.
items.abstract_zh:
NVIDIA 在最新的 GPU 上提供了缓存逐出优先级提示，例如 evict_first 和 evict_last。这些提示允许用户指定应用于各个缓存行的逐出优先级，以提高缓存利用率。然而，NVIDIA 并未披露这些提示的微架构细节或使用它们时的缓存逐出行为，这使得它们的安全和性能影响尚不清楚。

在本文中，我们首先对这些驱逐优先级提示的详细综合行为进行逆向工程。然后根据我们的发现，我们分析它们对系统安全和性能的影响。首先，我们发现这些优先级提示引入了新的安全问题。具体来说，我们使用 evict_first 优先级提示开发了一个新的隐蔽通道，它比现有的 GPU 隐蔽通道更高效。我们还使用 evict_last 优先级提示演示了性能下降攻击，与已知方法相比，该攻击更加隐蔽。其次，从性能角度来看，我们表明将缓存行标记为 evict_last 并不总是将其保留在缓存中。事实上，如果超过 12/16（或 3/16，具体取决于驱动程序版本）的 L2 缓存大小的数据被标记为 evict_last，则可能会发生缓存抖动，从而导致实际 GPU 工作负载的性能下降。

items.title: MCBP: A Memory-Compute Efficient LLM Inference Accelerator Leveraging Bit-Slice-enabled Sparsity and Repetitiveness.
items.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) face significant inference latency due to inefficiencies in GEMM operations, weight access, and KV cache access, especially in real-time scenarios. This highlights the need for a versatile compute-memory efficient accelerator. Unfortunately, existing Transformer accelerators struggle to address both aspects simultaneously, as they focus on value-level processing, missing fine-grained opportunities to optimize computation and memory collaboratively. This paper introduces MCBP, a bit-grained compute-memory efficient algorithm-hardware co-design that leverages bit-slice (BS) enabled repetitiveness and sparsity to accelerate LLM inference. MCBP features three key innovations: 1) BS-repetitiveness-enabled computation reduction (BRCR), which eliminates redundant GEMM computations via leveraging redundancy hidden among BS vectors; 2) BS-sparsity-enabled two-state coding (BSTC), which reduces weight access via exploiting significant sparsity in high-order bit-slice weight; 3) Bit-grained progressive prediction (BGPP), which reduces KV cache access by leveraging early-termination-based bit-grained prediction. These techniques, supported by custom accelerator designs, effectively alleviate the burden in GEMM, weight access, and KV cache access. Extensive experiments on 26 benchmarks show that MCBP achieves 9.43 × speed up and 31.1 × higher energy efficiency than Nvidia A100 GPU. Compared to SOTA Transformer accelerators, MCBP achieves 35 ×, 5.2 × and 3.2 × energy saving than Spatten, FACT and SOFA, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 由于 GEMM 操作、权重访问和 KV 缓存访问效率低下，大型语言模型 (LLM) 面临严重的推理延迟，尤其是在实时场景中。这凸显了对多功能计算内存高效加速器的需求。不幸的是，现有的 Transformer 加速器很难同时解决这两个方面的问题，因为它们专注于价值级别的处理，错过了协同优化计算和内存的细粒度机会。本文介绍了 MCBP，这是一种位粒度计算内存高效算法硬件协同设计，它利用位片 (BS) 启用的重复性和稀疏性来加速 LLM 推理。 MCBP具有三个关键创新：1）BS重复性计算减少（BRCR），它通过利用BS向量中隐藏的冗余来消除冗余GEMM计算； 2）支持BS稀疏性的二态编码（BSTC），通过利用高阶位片权重中的显着稀疏性来减少权重访问； 3）位粒度渐进预测（BGPP），它通过利用基于早期终止的位粒度预测来减少KV缓存访问。这些技术在定制加速器设计的支持下，有效减轻了GEMM、权重访问和KV缓存访问的负担。对 26 个基准测试的大量实验表明，MCBP 比 Nvidia A100 GPU 实现了 9.43 倍的加速和 31.1 倍的能效。与SOTA Transformer加速器相比，MCBP分别比Spatten、FACT和SOFA实现了35倍、5.2倍和3.2倍的节能。

items.title: REACT3D: Real-time Edge Accelerator for Incremental Training in 3D Gaussian Splatting based SLAM Systems.
items.abstract:
3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a promising approach for high-fidelity scene reconstruction and has been widely adopted in Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems. 3DGS SLAM requires incremental training and rendering of Gaussians in real-time from continuous camera viewpoints. To match the streaming nature of SLAM, 3DGS-based mapping must sustain over 30 frames per second (FPS), which is a widely recognized threshold for maintaining accurate tracking and mapping quality. Existing GPU-based solutions and prior accelerators fall short of this target, primarily due to redundant training computation, unnecessary loss computing, and irregular memory access patterns.

To address these challenges, we propose REACT3D, a real-time edge accelerator designed for incremental training in 3DGS SLAM systems. At the algorithmic level, we introduce spatial consistency and convergence aware sparsification, which eliminates redundant computation in both forward and backward rendering by predicting under-optimized regions based on spatial coherence and convergence dynamics. At the architectural level, we design a pixel block-wise fine-grained dataflow to eliminate explicit loss computing, establish a tightly coupled pipeline, and improve hardware utilization. Furthermore, we develop a Content Addressable Memory (CAM)-based Dual-index Gaussian Buffer to resolve discontinuous memory accesses and avoid computation conflicts during gradient merging. Experimental results show that REACT3D achieves 12.10 × performance and 33.69 × energy efficiency improvement over NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin. To the best of our knowledge, REACT3D is the first hardware design that meets the real-time requirements of 3DGS SLAM on the edge.
items.abstract_zh:
3D 高斯分布 (3DGS) 已成为一种有前途的高保真场景重建方法，并已广泛应用于同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 系统中。 3DGS SLAM 需要从连续摄像机视点实时增量训练和渲染高斯模型。为了匹配 SLAM 的流媒体特性，基于 3DGS 的映射必须维持每秒 30 帧 (FPS) 以上，这是保持准确跟踪和映射质量的广泛认可的阈值。现有的基于 GPU 的解决方案和先前的加速器未能实现这一目标，主要是由于冗余训练计算、不必要的损失计算和不规则的内存访问模式。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 REACT3D，这是一种实时边缘加速器，专为 3DGS SLAM 系统中的增量训练而设计。在算法层面，我们引入了空间一致性和收敛感知稀疏化，通过基于空间相干性和收敛动力学预测欠优化区域来消除前向和后向渲染中的冗余计算。在架构层面，我们设计了像素块级细粒度数据流，以消除显式损失计算，建立紧密耦合的管道，并提高硬件利用率。此外，我们开发了一种基于内容可寻址内存（CAM）的双索引高斯缓冲区，以解决不连续的内存访问并避免梯度合并期间的计算冲突。实验结果表明，REACT3D 较 NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin 实现了 12.10 倍的性能提升和 33.69 倍的能效提升。据我们所知，REACT3D是第一个满足边缘3DGS SLAM实时要求的硬件设计。

items.title: MHE-TPE: Multi-Operand High-Radix Encoder for Mixed-Precision Fixed-Point Tensor Processing Engines.
items.abstract: Fixed-point general matrix multiplication (GEMM) is pivotal in AI-accelerated computing for data centers and edge devices in GPU and NPU tensor processing engines (TPEs). This work exposes two critical limitations in typical spatial mixed-precision TPEs: ❶ Redundant partial products (PPs) reduction in PE multipliers across temporal and spatial domains in MAC arrays. ❷ Compute density imbalance: when the operand bit-width is reduced by one-half, the throughput of GEMM only doubles, which is half of the theoretical 4× improvement. To address these challenges. First, we design a multi-operand high-radix encoder based on vector inner products, which reduces PPs for vector reduction by half through decoding. Second, we establish a three-stage computational paradigm for TPE’s microarchitecture, comprising bit-slice encoding, PPs generation, and PPs reduction, which enables bit-width reconfiguration in unified hardware. Our approach decomposes the mixed-precision mapping process in TPEs into two components: temporal mapping of multi-precision multiplicands and spatial mapping of multipliers, achieving balanced computational density. Implementation results based on the UMC 22nm process demonstrate that this architecture outperforms other solutions in critical metrics, including the mixed-precision support range ( INT2 ∼ INT32 combinations), area efficiency, and energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 定点通用矩阵乘法 (GEMM) 在 GPU 和 NPU 张量处理引擎 (TPE) 中的数据中心和边缘设备的 AI 加速计算中至关重要。这项工作暴露了典型空间混合精度 TPE 的两个关键限制： ❶ MAC 阵列中跨时域和空间域的 PE 乘法器的冗余部分积（PP）减少。 ❷ 计算密度不平衡：当操作数位宽减少一半时，GEMM 的吞吐量仅增加一倍，是理论 4 倍提升的一半。为了应对这些挑战。首先，我们设计了一种基于向量内积的多操作数高基编码器，通过解码将向量约简的PPs减少了一半。其次，我们为 TPE 的微架构建立了一个三阶段计算范式，包括位片编码、PPs 生成和 PPs 缩减，这使得能够在统一硬件中进行位宽重新配置。我们的方法将 TPE 中的混合精度映射过程分解为两个部分：多精度被乘数的时间映射和乘数的空间映射，从而实现平衡的计算密度。基于UMC 22nm工艺的实施结果表明，该架构在关键指标上优于其他解决方案，包括混合精度支持范围（INT2∼INT32组合）、面积效率和能源效率。

items.title: MUSS-TI: Multi-level Shuttle Scheduling for Large-Scale Entanglement Module Linked Trapped-Ion.
items.abstract:
Trapped-ion computing is a leading architecture in the pursuit of scalable and high fidelity quantum systems. Modular quantum architectures based on photonic interconnects offer a promising path for scaling trapped ion devices. In this design, multiple Quantum Charge Coupled Device (QCCD) units are interconnected through entanglement module. Each unit features a multi-zone layout that separates functionalities into distinct areas, enabling more efficient and flexible quantum operations. However, achieving efficient and scalable compilation of quantum circuits in such entanglement module linked Quantum Charge-Coupled Device (EML-QCCD) remains a primary challenge for practical quantum applications.

In this work, we propose a scalable compiler tailored for large-scale trapped-ion architectures, with the goal of reducing the shuttling overhead inherent in EML-QCCD devices. MUSS-TI introduces a multi-level scheduling approach inspired by multi-level memory scheduling in classical computing. This method is designed to be aware of the distinct roles of different zones and to minimize the number of shuttling operations required in EML-QCCD systems. We demonstrate that EML-QCCD architectures are well-suited for executing large-scale applications. Our evaluation shows that MUSS-TI reduces shuttle operations by 41.74% for applications with 30–32 qubits, and by an average of 73.38% and 59.82% for applications with 117–128 qubits and 256–299 qubits, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
俘获离子计算是追求可扩展和高保真量子系统的领先架构。基于光子互连的模块化量子架构为缩小俘获离子器件提供了一条有前途的途径。在该设计中，多个量子电荷耦合器件（QCCD）单元通过纠缠模块互连。每个单元都采用多区域布局，将功能分为不同的区域，从而实现更高效、更灵活的量子操作。然而，在这种纠缠模块连接的量子电荷耦合器件（EML-QCCD）中实现量子电路的高效且可扩展的编译仍然是实际量子应用的主要挑战。

在这项工作中，我们提出了一种专为大规模离子捕获架构量身定制的可扩展编译器，其目标是减少 EML-QCCD 器件固有的穿梭开销。 MUSS-TI 引入了受经典计算中多级内存调度启发的多级调度方法。该方法旨在了解不同区域的不同作用，并最大限度地减少 EML-QCCD 系统中所需的穿梭操作数量。我们证明 EML-QCCD 架构非常适合执行大规模应用程序。我们的评估表明，对于 30-32 量子位的应用，MUSS-TI 将穿梭操作减少了 41.74%，对于 117-128 量子位和 256-299 量子位的应用，平均分别减少了 73.38% 和 59.82%。

items.title: Kelle: Co-design KV Caching and eDRAM for Efficient LLM Serving in Edge Computing.
items.abstract:
Running Large Language Models (LLMs) on edge devices is crucial for reducing latency, improving real-time processing, and enhancing privacy. By performing inference directly on the device, data does not need to be sent to the cloud, ensuring faster responses and reducing reliance on network connectivity. However, implementing LLMs on edge devices presents challenges, particularly with managing key-value (KV) caches, which plays a pivotal role in LLM serving. As the input text lengthens, the size of the KV cache increases linearly with the sequence length, leading to a significant memory footprint and data access costs. On the other hand, edge devices have limited memory and computational power, making it hard to store and efficiently access the large caches needed for LLM inference.

To mitigate the substantial overhead caused by KV cache, we propose using embedded DRAM (eDRAM) as the primary storage for LLM serving in edge device, which offers higher storage density compared to SRAM. However, to ensure data integrity, eDRAM needs periodic refresh operations, which are power-intensive. To reduce eDRAM costs and improve overall system performance, we propose Kelle , a software-hardware co-design solution optimized for deploying LLMs on eDRAM-based edge systems. Combined with our fine-grained memory eviction, recomputation, and refresh control algorithms, the Kelle accelerator delivers a 3.9 × speedup and 4.5 × energy savings compared to existing baseline solutions.
items.abstract_zh:
在边缘设备上运行大型语言模型 (LLM) 对于减少延迟、改进实时处理和增强隐私至关重要。通过直接在设备上执行推理，无需将数据发送到云端，从而确保更快的响应并减少对网络连接的依赖。然而，在边缘设备上实施 LLM 会带来挑战，特别是在管理键值 (KV) 缓存方面，这在 LLM 服务中发挥着关键作用。随着输入文本的延长，KV 缓存的大小会随着序列长度线性增加，从而导致显着的内存占用和数据访问成本。另一方面，边缘设备的内存和计算能力有限，因此很难存储和有效访问 LLM 推理所需的大型缓存。

为了减轻 KV 缓存造成的大量开销，我们建议使用嵌入式 DRAM (eDRAM) 作为边缘设备中 LLM 服务的主存储，与 SRAM 相比，它提供更高的存储密度。然而，为了确保数据完整性，eDRAM 需要定期刷新操作，这是非常耗电的。为了降低 eDRAM 成本并提高整体系统性能，我们提出了 Kelle，这是一种针对在基于 eDRAM 的边缘系统上部署 LLM 进行优化的软件硬件协同设计解决方案。与我们的细粒度内存驱逐、重新计算和刷新控制算法相结合，与现有基准解决方案相比，Kelle 加速器可实现 3.9 倍的加速和 4.5 倍的节能。

items.title: Amove: Accelerating LLMs through Mitigating Outliers and Salient Points via Fine-Grained Grouped Vectorized Data Type.
items.abstract:
The quantization of Large Language Models (LLMs) poses significant challenges due to the heterogeneous nature of feature point distributions in low-bit quantization scenarios, including salient points, normal outliers, and massive outliers. These challenges are particularly pronounced in supporting both weight-only and weight-activation quantization modes, as existing methods often focus on a single mode and fail to address the diverse feature characteristics holistically, resulting in suboptimal model accuracy and hardware efficiency trade-offs.

To tackle these limitations, we introduce Amove, a novel co-design framework that synergistically integrates data type and hardware architecture design for efficient LLM quantization. Our approach is threefold: First, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of quantization granularity and propose a residual approximation mechanism that balances model accuracy and memory overhead under fine-grained quantization. Second, we design a flexible fine-grained grouped vectorized data type, enabling seamless support for both weight-activation and low-bit weight-only quantization modes within a unified framework. Third, we implement the hardware architecture of Amove on both GPU tensor core and systolic array-based architectures. The Amove-enhanced tensor core achieves an average speedup of 2.13× and a 1.70× reduction in energy consumption over the state-of-the-art OliVe design. Furthermore, an Amove-based accelerator achieves up to 2.67× speedup and 1.68× energy reduction over the state-of-the-art accelerator.
items.abstract_zh:
由于低比特量化场景中特征点分布的异构性（包括显着点、正常异常值和大量异常值），大型语言模型（LLM）的量化提出了重大挑战。这些挑战在支持仅权重和权重激活量化模式时尤其明显，因为现有方法通常专注于单一模式，无法整体解决不同的特征特性，导致模型精度和硬件效率权衡不理想。

为了解决这些限制，我们引入了 Amove，这是一种新颖的协同设计框架，它协同集成数据类型和硬件架构设计，以实现高效的 LLM 量化。我们的方法有三个：首先，我们对量化粒度进行全面分析，并提出一种残差近似机制，在细粒度量化下平衡模型精度和内存开销。其次，我们设计了一种灵活的细粒度分组矢量化数据类型，能够在统一框架内无缝支持权重激活和低位仅权重量化模式。第三，我们在 GPU 张量核心和基于脉动阵列的架构上实现了 Amove 的硬件架构。与最先进的 OliVe 设计相比，Amove 增强型张量核心的平均速度提高了 2.13 倍，能耗降低了 1.70 倍。此外，与最先进的加速器相比，基于 Amove 的加速器可实现高达 2.67 倍的加速和 1.68 倍的能耗降低。

items.title: X-SET: An Efficient Graph Pattern Matching Accelerator With Order-Aware Parallel Intersection Units.
items.abstract:
Graph Pattern Matching (GPM) is a critical task in a wide range of graph analytics applications, such as social network analysis and cybersecurity. Despite its importance, GPM remains challenging to accelerate due to its inherently irregular control flow and heavy reliance on set operations, which dominate execution time and introduce data dependencies that limit parallelism. While recent GPM accelerators attempt to improve performance, they often overlook the ordered nature of input data, resulting in redundant computations and inefficient hardware utilization.

This paper presents X-SET, a GPM accelerator that overcomes these limitations by introducing two key innovations. First, we propose an Order-Aware Set Intersection Unit (SIU), which exploits input ordering to reduce the hardware complexity of parallel set intersection from \(\mathcal {O}(N^2)\) to \(\mathcal {O}(N \log N)\) , achieving high throughput and significant area savings by avoiding unnecessary comparisons. Second, we develop a barrier-free task scheduler that breaks traditional DFS scheduling constraints by enabling asynchronous, out-of-order task execution across different levels of the GPM search tree.
