X-SET is integrated into a RISC-V SoC, supporting end-to-end acceleration. Extensive experimental results show that X-SET outperforms state-of-the-art GPM accelerators, achieving 4.6 × - 142.9 × improvements in compute density, with a geometric mean of 13.7 × , and delivering 6.4 × geometric mean and 42.9 × maximum speedup in end-to-end performance. X-SET is open-sourced at github 1 .
items.abstract_zh:
图模式匹配（GPM）是社交网络分析和网络安全等各种图分析应用中的一项关键任务。尽管 GPM 很重要，但由于其固有的不规则控制流和对集合操作的严重依赖，GPM 仍然难以加速，而集合操作主导了执行时间并引入了限制并行性的数据依赖性。虽然最近的 GPM 加速器试图提高性能，但它们经常忽视输入数据的有序性质，从而导致冗余计算和低效的硬件利用率。

本文介绍了 X-SET，这是一种 GPM 加速器，它通过引入两项关键创新来克服这些限制。首先，我们提出了一种顺序感知集交集单元（SIU），它利用输入排序来降低并行集交集的硬件复杂性，从 \(\mathcal {O}(N^2)\) 到 \(\mathcal {O}(N \log N)\) ，通过避免不必要的比较来实现高吞吐量和显着节省面积。其次，我们开发了一种无障碍任务调度程序，它通过在 GPM 搜索树的不同级别上实现异步、无序任务执行来打破传统的 DFS 调度约束。 X-SET集成到RISC-V SoC中，支持端到端加速。大量实验结果表明，X-SET 的性能优于最先进的 GPM 加速器，计算密度实现了 4.6 × - 142.9 × 的提升，几何平均值为 13.7 × ，端到端性能实现了 6.4 × 几何平均值和 42.9 × 最大加速。 X-SET 在 github 1 上开源。

items.title: LLM.265: Video Codecs are Secretly Tensor Codecs.
items.abstract:
As the parameter size of large language models (LLMs) continues to expand, the need for a large memory footprint and high communication bandwidth have become significant bottlenecks for the training and inference of LLMs. To mitigate these bottlenecks, various tensor compression techniques have been proposed to reduce the data size, thereby alleviating memory requirements and communication pressure.

Our research found that video codecs, despite being originally designed for compressing videos, show excellent efficiency when compressing various types of tensors. We demonstrate that video codecs can be versatile and general-purpose tensor codecs while achieving the state-of-the-art compression efficiency in various tasks. We further make use of the hardware video encoding and decoding module available on GPUs to create a framework capable of both inference and training with video codecs repurposed as tensor codecs. Building on insights gained from video codecs, we further show that the hardware of the video codecs can be customized and enhanced to significantly improve tensor encoding/decoding throughput without incurring substantial costs, making it a highly effective solution for large-scale model deployment without requiring significant modifications to the existing GPU architecture.
items.abstract_zh:
随着大型语言模型（LLM）的参数大小不断扩大，对大内存占用和高通信带宽的需求已成为LLM训练和推理的重大瓶颈。为了缓解这些瓶颈，人们提出了各种张量压缩技术来减小数据大小，从而减轻内存需求和通信压力。

我们的研究发现，视频编解码器尽管最初是为压缩视频而设计的，但在压缩各种类型的张量时表现出出色的效率。我们证明视频编解码器可以是通用的张量编解码器，同时在各种任务中实现最先进的压缩效率。我们进一步利用 GPU 上可用的硬件视频编码和解码模块来创建一个能够进行推理和训练的框架，并将视频编解码器重新用作张量编解码器。基于从视频编解码器获得的见解，我们进一步表明，视频编解码器的硬件可以定制和增强，以显着提高张量编码/解码吞吐量，而不会产生大量成本，使其成为大规模模型部署的高效解决方案，而无需对现有 GPU 架构进行重大修改。

items.title: ReGate: Enabling Power Gating in Neural Processing Units.
items.abstract:
The energy efficiency of neural processing units (NPU) plays a critical role in developing sustainable data centers. Our study with different generations of NPU chips reveals that 30%–72% of their energy consumption is contributed by static power dissipation, due to the lack of power management support in modern NPU chips.

In this paper, we present ReGate, which enables fine-grained power-gating of each hardware component in NPU chips with hardware/software co-design. Unlike conventional power-gating techniques for generic processors, enabling power-gating in NPUs faces unique challenges due to the fundamental difference in hardware architecture and program execution model. To address these challenges, we carefully investigate the power-gating opportunities in each component of NPU chips and decide the best-fit power management scheme (i.e., hardware- vs. software-managed power gating). Specifically, for systolic arrays (SAs) that have deterministic execution patterns, ReGate enables cycle-level power gating at the granularity of processing elements (PEs) following the inherent dataflow execution in SAs. For inter-chip interconnect (ICI) and HBM controllers that have long idle intervals, ReGate employs a lightweight hardware-based idle-detection mechanism. For vector units and SRAM whose idle periods vary significantly depending on workload patterns, ReGate extends the NPU ISA and allows software (e.g., compilers) to manage the power gating. With implementation on a production-level NPU simulator, we show that ReGate can reduce the energy consumption of NPU chips by up to 32.8% (15.5% on average), with negligible impact on AI workload performance. The hardware implementation of power-gating logic introduces less than 3.3% overhead in NPU chips.
items.abstract_zh:
神经处理单元 (NPU) 的能源效率在开发可持续数据中心方面发挥着关键作用。我们对不同代 NPU 芯片的研究表明，由于现代 NPU 芯片缺乏电源管理支持，其 30%–72% 的能耗是由静态功耗贡献的。

在本文中，我们提出了 ReGate，它可以通过硬件/软件协同设计对 NPU 芯片中的每个硬件组件进行细粒度功率门控。与通用处理器的传统电源门控技术不同，由于硬件架构和程序执行模型的根本差异，在 NPU 中实现电源门控面临着独特的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们仔细研究了 NPU 芯片每个组件中的电源门控机会，并决定最适合的电源管理方案（即硬件管理与软件管理的电源门控）。具体来说，对于具有确定性执行模式的脉动阵列 (SA)，ReGate 可以按照 SA 中固有的数据流执行，在处理元件 (PE) 的粒度上实现周期级功率门控。对于具有较长空闲间隔的芯片间互连 (ICI) 和 HBM 控制器，ReGate 采用了基于硬件的轻量级空闲检测机制。对于空闲时间根据工作负载模式而显着变化的矢量单元和 SRAM，ReGate 扩展了 NPU ISA，并允许软件（例如编译器）管理电源门控。通过在生产级 NPU 模拟器上的实施，我们表明 ReGate 可以将 NPU 芯片的能耗降低高达 32.8%（平均 15.5%），而对 AI 工作负载性能的影响可以忽略不计。电源门控逻辑的硬件实现在 NPU 芯片中引入了不到 3.3% 的开销。

items.title: Bootes: Boosting the Efficiency of Sparse Accelerators Using Spectral Clustering.
items.abstract: Sparse matrix-matrix multiplication (SpGEMM) is crucial in many applications, with numerous recent efforts focused on optimizing it. The row-wise product has emerged as a favorable SpGEMM dataflow due to its balanced performance, but it alone is insufficient to minimize data movement and off-chip traffic—key factors for efficient accelerator deployment. Previous studies face three key challenges: (1) reordering is often suboptimal, failing to maximize memory traffic reduction; (2) preprocessing steps are typically slow and inefficient, making the overhead hard to justify; and (3) certain sparsity patterns do not benefit from reordering, potentially increasing traffic, yet existing methods lack a mechanism to detect such cases. To address these challenges, we propose Bootes, a novel approach that leverages spectral clustering to optimally reorder the rows of matrix A, aligning data access patterns with matrix B to maximize reuse and reduce off-chip memory traffic during row-wise matrix multiplication. Our key insight lies in using a similarity matrix that captures the structural properties of matrix A to guide clustering, along with an optimized implementation of the spectral clustering algorithm to reduce preprocessing overhead. Additionally, Bootes incorporates a decision tree model trained on real-world matrices to predict when reordering is beneficial, enabling a cost-aware preprocessing strategy. Bootes achieves a geometric mean speedup of 11.61 × in preprocessing time compared to existing row reordering techniques while maintaining scalability. It is deployed on state-of-the-art accelerators—Flexagon, GAMMA, and Trapezoid—where it reduces off-chip traffic by 2.31 ×, 1.67 ×, and 1.38 ×, respectively, thereby boosting their efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpGEMM) 在许多应用中至关重要，最近的许多工作都集中在优化它上。由于其均衡的性能，行式产品已成为一种受欢迎的 SpGEMM 数据流，但仅靠它还不足以最大限度地减少数据移动和片外流量——高效加速器部署的关键因素。先前的研究面临三个关键挑战：（1）重新排序通常不是最优的，无法最大限度地减少内存流量； (2) 预处理步骤通常缓慢且低效，使得开销难以合理； (3)某些稀疏模式不会从重新排序中受益，可能会增加流量，但现有方法缺乏检测此类情况的机制。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Bootes，这是一种利用谱聚类对矩阵 A 的行进行最佳重新排序的新颖方法，将数据访问模式与矩阵 B 对齐，以最大限度地重用并减少行式矩阵乘法期间的片外内存流量。我们的关键见解在于使用相似矩阵来捕获矩阵 A 的结构属性来指导聚类，以及谱聚类算法的优化实现以减少预处理开销。此外，Bootes 还结合了一个在现实世界矩阵上训练的决策树模型，可以预测重新排序何时有益，从而实现成本感知的预处理策略。与现有的行重新排序技术相比，Bootes 在预处理时间上实现了 11.61 倍的几何平均加速，同时保持了可扩展性。它部署在最先进的加速器（Flexagon、GAMMA 和 Trapezoid）上，分别将片外流量减少了 2.31 ×、1.67 × 和 1.38 ×，从而提高了效率。

items.title: Misam: Machine Learning Assisted Dataflow Selection in Accelerators for Sparse Matrix Multiplication.
items.abstract: The performance of Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (SpGEMM), a foundational operation in scientific computing and machine learning, is highly sensitive to the diverse and dynamic sparsity patterns of its input matrices. While specialized hardware accelerators improve efficiency, their reliance on fixed dataflows, each optimized for a narrow sparsity regime, results in suboptimal performance on real-world workloads. Even recent flexible accelerators that support multiple dataflows face two critical limitations: (1) the lack of a fast and principled mechanism for runtime dataflow selection, and (2) the area overhead and hardware underutilization incurred to provide that flexibility. We present Misam, a machine learning framework that addresses these challenges to enable adaptive and hardware-efficient SpGEMM acceleration. Misam employs a lightweight decision tree to dynamically predict the optimal hardware configuration from matrix features. To overcome hardware underutilization, Misam leverages FPGA reconfigurability to deploy specialized, resource-efficient bitstreams on demand. This process is governed by an intelligent reconfiguration engine that evaluates whether the anticipated performance gain justifies the overhead of switching hardware configurations. Misam’s dynamic approach yields up to a 10.76 × speedup by judiciously reconfiguring. Misam demonstrates that a synergistic combination of machine learning-based prediction and judicious hardware reconfiguration can achieve high performance across a wide spectrum of sparsity patterns, bridging the gap between specialized efficiency and general-purpose adaptability.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpGEMM) 是科学计算和机器学习的基础运算，其性能对其输入矩阵的多样化和动态稀疏模式高度敏感。虽然专用硬件加速器提高了效率，但它们对固定数据流的依赖（每个数据流都针对狭窄的稀疏范围进行了优化）导致实际工作负载的性能不佳。即使是最近支持多个数据流的灵活加速器也面临两个关键限制：(1) 缺乏用于运行时数据流选择的快速且有原则的机制，以及 (2) 提供这种灵活性所产生的面积开销和硬件利用率不足。我们推出了 Misam，这是一个机器学习框架，可以解决这些挑战，以实现自适应且硬件高效的 SpGEMM 加速。 Misam 采用轻量级决策树根据矩阵特征动态预测最佳硬件配置。为了克服硬件利用率不足的问题，Misam 利用 FPGA 可重新配置性来按需部署专用的、资源高效的比特流。此过程由智能重新配置引擎控制，该引擎评估预期的性能增益是否证明切换硬件配置的开销是合理的。 Misam 的动态方法通过明智的重新配置可实现高达 10.76 倍的加速。 Misam 证明，基于机器学习的预测和明智的硬件重新配置的协同组合可以在各种稀疏模式下实现高性能，从而缩小专业效率和通用适应性之间的差距。

items.title: FexMo: Enabling Fuse Execution Mode for Multi-task CGRAs.
items.abstract:
Conventional CGRA multi-task resource allocation predominantly employs spatial partition, resulting in low temporal utilization of tiles. Our study reveals that fusing multiple tasks to share the whole CGRA can improve temporal utilization of tiles and introduce superior task throughput. However, this fuse execution mode brings two challenges: as nodes from multiple tasks’ DFGs multiplex the same tiles, load misses from any task will block the execution of other tasks. Besides, existing CGRA mappers fail to constrain the scheduling when fuse mapping multiple tasks’ DFGs collaboratively, which results in an imbalanced distribution of nodes along different modulo cycles. Both challenges hinder the full exploitation of the utilization and throughput advantages inherent to the fuse execution mode.

To address these challenges, we propose FexMo, a novel framework supporting fused execution mode for multi-task CGRA. Architecturally, FexMo introduces checkpoints with clock-gating mechanisms. The contexts of any tasks that encounter load misses are checkpointed to preserve progress without blocking other tasks, and will be resumed for retrying every time at the same modulo cycle. During load misses, tasks execute NOPs on the clock-gated tiles, preventing errors and saving power. For fuse mapping, FexMo proposes inter-DFGs co-scheduling strategy, which evenly distributes nodes from all tasks across modulo cycles, maximizing temporal utilization of tiles and fully leveraging the throughput benefits of fuse execution mode. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FexMo achieves an average utilization gain of 36.9% and a 1.99 × throughput improvement over the conventional partition execution mode. FexMo-Mapper completes mapping within one minute, delivering solutions with 2.72 × higher quality than conventional mappers on average. Implementation using the ASAP7 PDK flow shows FexMo achieves 434MHz clock frequency with negligible area overhead. Despite inducing additional power consumption, FexMo maintains 1.22 × higher energy efficiency than the baseline on average.
items.abstract_zh:
传统的CGRA多任务资源分配主要采用空间划分，导致瓦片的时间利用率较低。我们的研究表明，融合多个任务以共享整个 CGRA 可以提高图块的时间利用率并引入卓越的任务吞吐量。然而，这种熔断执行模式带来了两个挑战：当来自多个任务的 DFG 的节点复用相同的块时，任何任务的加载未命中都会阻塞其他任务的执行。此外，现有的CGRA映射器在协同融合映射多个任务的DFG时无法约束调度，导致节点沿不同模周期的分布不平衡。这两个挑战都阻碍了熔丝执行模式固有的利用率和吞吐量优势的充分利用。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 FexMo，一种支持多任务 CGRA 融合执行模式的新型框架。在架构上，FexMo 引入了带有时钟门控机制的检查点。遇到加载未命中的任何任务的上下文都会被设置检查点，以在不阻塞其他任务的情况下保留进度，并且每次都会在相同的模周期中恢复重试。在加载未命中期间，任务在时钟门控块上执行 NOP，从而防止错误并节省电量。对于熔丝映射，FexMo 提出了 DFG 间协同调度策略，该策略跨模周期均匀分布所有任务的节点，最大限度地提高图块的时间利用率，并充分利用熔丝执行模式的吞吐量优势。大量实验表明，与传统分区执行模式相比，FexMo 的平均利用率提高了 36.9%，吞吐量提高了 1.99 倍。 FexMo-Mapper 可在一分钟内完成测绘，提供的解决方案质量平均比传统测绘仪高 2.72 倍。使用 ASAP7 PDK 流程的实施表明，FexMo 实现了 434MHz 时钟频率，而面积开销可以忽略不计。尽管会产生额外的功耗，但 FexMo 的能源效率平均比基准高 1.22 倍。

items.title: PyTorchSim: A Comprehensive, Fast, and Accurate NPU Simulation Framework.
items.abstract:
Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have continuously increasing demands for the performance and efficiency of Neural Processing Units (NPUs). While analytical models enable rapid exploration of high-level aspects (e.g., tiling), later stages of NPU design require a cycle-accurate simulator that supports various scenarios. However, existing NPU simulators are limited in several aspects, including support for high-speed, multi-core, multi-model tenancy, generic ISA (with vector operations), compiler, data-dependent timing model, and enabling both inference and training.

To address these challenges, we propose PyTorchSim, 1 a novel NPU simulation framework integrated with PyTorch 2. PyTorchSim models NPUs with a custom RISC-V-based ISA extended to support various acceleration units (e.g., systolic array). Our custom backend for PyTorch 2 compiles a given DNN using this ISA through lowering passes with MLIR and LLVM. Then, our extended Gem5 and Spike simulators execute the machine code to accurately model the DNN’s timing and functional aspects on the NPU. However, as such a conventional Instruction-Level Simulation (ILS) inevitably runs slowly, we propose Tile-Level Simulation (TLS) to improve speed without sacrificing accuracy. It uses tile-granularity operation latencies from offline ILS runs for high speed while still modeling DRAM and interconnect with cycle-accurate simulators. Furthermore, TLS can also be employed for sparse tensor operations using auxiliary per-tile latency obtained offline. As a result, PyTorchSim provides speedups of up to 139 × compared to Accel-Sim, while achieving high simulation accuracy against Google TPUv3 with an MAE of 11.5%. Additionally, we also demonstrate the effectiveness of PyTorchSim over existing simulators for different scenarios, including heterogeneous dense-sparse NPU, multi-model tenancy, compiler optimization, chiplet-aware NPU scheduling, and impact of DNN training hyperparameter.
items.abstract_zh:
深度神经网络 (DNN) 对神经处理单元 (NPU) 的性能和效率的要求不断提高。虽然分析模型可以快速探索高级方面（例如平铺），但 NPU 设计的后期阶段需要支持各种场景的周期精确模拟器。然而，现有的 NPU 模拟器在几个方面受到限制，包括对高速、多核、多模型租户的支持、通用 ISA（具有向量运算）、编译器、数据相关时序模型以及支持推理和训练。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 PyTorchSim，1 一种与 PyTorch 2 集成的新型 NPU 仿真框架。PyTorchSim 使用基于 RISC-V 的自定义 ISA 来对 NPU 进行建模，该 ISA 扩展为支持各种加速单元（例如脉动阵列）。我们的 PyTorch 2 自定义后端使用此 ISA 通过使用 MLIR 和 LLVM 降低传递次数来编译给定的 DNN。然后，我们的扩展 Gem5 和 Spike 模拟器执行机器代码，以在 NPU 上准确建模 DNN 的时序和功能。然而，由于这种传统的指令级仿真（ILS）不可避免地运行缓慢，我们提出了平铺级仿真（TLS）来提高速度而不牺牲准确性。它利用离线 ILS 运行的切片粒度操作延迟来实现高速，同时仍然对 DRAM 进行建模并与周期精确的模拟器互连。此外，TLS 还可以使用离线获得的辅助每块延迟来进行稀疏张量运算。因此，与 Accel-Sim 相比，PyTorchSim 的加速速度高达 139 倍，同时针对 Google TPUv3 实现了高仿真精度，MAE 为 11.5%。此外，我们还展示了 PyTorchSim 相对于现有模拟器在不同场景下的有效性，包括异构密集-稀疏 NPU、多模型租赁、编译器优化、小芯片感知 NPU 调度以及 DNN 训练超参数的影响。

items.title: StreamTensor: Make Tensors Stream in Dataflow Accelerators for LLMs.
items.abstract: Efficient execution of deep learning workloads on dataflow architectures is crucial for overcoming memory bottlenecks and maximizing performance. While streaming intermediate results between computation kernels can significantly improve efficiency, existing approaches struggle with inter-kernel correlations, external memory access management, and buffer optimization. In this work, we propose StreamTensor, a compiler framework that automatically constructs and optimizes stream-based dataflow accelerators. StreamTensor introduces a novel iterative tensor type system to explicitly encode stream layouts, enabling seamless kernel fusion, buffer allocation, and memory optimization. By systematically exploring three hierarchical design spaces, including tensor tiling, kernel fusion, and resource allocation, StreamTensor balances computational intensity, memory efficiency, and data streaming to maximize performance. Based on FPGA evaluations on Large Language Models (LLM), StreamTensor achieves up to 0.76x and 0.64x lower latency compared to the state-of-the-art FPGA LLM accelerators and GPUs, and up to 1.99x higher energy efficiency compared to GPUs, making it a promising approach for scalable dataflow-based deep learning acceleration.
items.abstract_zh: 在数据流架构上高效执行深度学习工作负载对于克服内存瓶颈和最大限度地提高性能至关重要。虽然在计算内核之间流式传输中间结果可以显着提高效率，但现有方法在内核间关联、外部内存访问管理和缓冲区优化方面遇到了困难。在这项工作中，我们提出了 StreamTensor，这是一个编译器框架，可以自动构建和优化基于流的数据流加速器。 StreamTensor 引入了一种新颖的迭代张量类型系统来显式编码流布局，从而实现无缝内核融合、缓冲区分配和内存优化。通过系统地探索三个层次设计空间，包括张量平铺、内核融合和资源分配，StreamTensor 平衡了计算强度、内存效率和数据流，以最大限度地提高性能。基于大型语言模型 (LLM) 上的 FPGA 评估，与最先进的 FPGA LLM 加速器和 GPU 相比，StreamTensor 的延迟分别降低了 0.76 倍和 0.64 倍，与 GPU 相比，能源效率提高了 1.99 倍，这使其成为基于可扩展数据流的深度学习加速的一种有前途的方法。

items.title: DiffTest-H: Toward Semantic-Aware Communication in Hardware-Accelerated Processor Verification.
items.abstract:
Verification has become the most time-consuming phase in chip development. Co-simulation frameworks simulate the design under test (DUT) with a golden reference model (REF) and compare their instruction-level results for verification, causing over 98% communication overhead: although hardware-accelerated platforms, such as FPGA and emulators, speed up DUT simulation by 300 × –10000 ×, overall co-simulation speedup is still limited to 2.5 × –20 ×.

In this paper, we propose DiffTest-H , a semantic-aware, hardware-accelerated co-simulation framework with three techniques reducing communication overhead while preserving debuggability: (1) Batch minimizes communication frequency by tightly packing structurally diverse verification events into a single transfer. (2) Squash reduces data transmission volume by fusing verification events with a decoupled checking order. (3) Replay preserves instruction-level debuggability by reprocessing the original, unfused verification events around the failure point.

DiffTest-H is deployed on both Palladium emulator and FPGA to verify a 6-wide, out-of-order RISC-V processor, XiangShan. It achieves simulation speeds of 478KHz and 7.8MHz respectively, with an 80 × and 78 × speedup over the baseline, 119 × and 1945 × faster than 16-thread Verilator, and uncovers 151 bugs in XiangShan.
items.abstract_zh:
验证已成为芯片开发中最耗时的阶段。协同仿真框架使用黄金参考模型 (REF) 来模拟被测设计 (DUT)，并比较其指令级结果进行验证，从而导致超过 98% 的通信开销：尽管 FPGA 和仿真器等硬件加速平台将 DUT 仿真速度提高了 300 × –10000 ×，但整体协同仿真加速仍然限于 2.5 × –20 ×。

在本文中，我们提出了 DiffTest-H，一种语义感知、硬件加速的联合仿真框架，采用三种技术减少通信开销，同时保留可调试性：(1) Batch 通过将结构多样的验证事件紧密打包到单个传输中来最小化通信频率。 (2) Squash通过将验证事件与解耦的检查顺序融合来减少数据传输量。 (3) 重放通过重新处理故障点周围原始的、未融合的验证事件来保留指令级可调试性。

DiffTest-H 部署在 Palladium 仿真器和 FPGA 上，以验证 6 宽乱序 RISC-V 处理器香山。它的仿真速度分别达到 478KHz 和 7.8MHz，比基线加速 80 倍和 78 倍，比 16 线程 Verilator 快 119 倍和 1945 倍，并发现了香山中的 151 个错误。

items.title: ComPASS: A Compatible PIM Protocol Architecture and Scheduling Solution for Processor-PIM Collaboration.
items.abstract: With growing demands from memory-bound applications, Processing-In-Memory (PIM) architectures have emerged as a promising way to reduce data movement. However, existing PIM designs face challenges in compatibility and efficiency due to limited command/address space and the overhead of switching between PIM and normal memory modes. To address these limitations, we propose ComPASS, a compatible PIM protocol and scheduling solution that enables efficient processor-PIM integration. ComPASS introduces PIM-ACT, a new memory command that triggers multi-bank activation and PIM operations at once, allowing for compatibility across diverse PIM architectures. It also adds a PIM request generator within the memory controller, which can serve all PIM devices compliant with PIM-ACT, avoiding device-specific integration. In addition, ComPASS supports architecture-aware optimizations, enabling each PIM device to use a customized PIM-ACT configuration tailored to its architecture without compromising compatibility. For efficient scheduling of both PIM and conventional memory requests, ComPASS proposes static and adaptive scheduling that maintain PIM throughput while allocating bandwidth to conventional workloads for overall system efficiency. Our evaluation shows that ComPASS consistently meets PIM performance targets by achieving up to 10.75 × GEMV speedup on LPDDR-PIM over non-PIM environments, even under co-execution with memory-intensive CPU workloads, thereby demonstrating both efficiency and compatibility.
items.abstract_zh: 随着内存限制应用程序的需求不断增长，内存处理 (PIM) 架构已成为减少数据移动的一种有前途的方法。然而，由于有限的命令/地址空间以及 PIM 和普通内存模式之间切换的开销，现有的 PIM 设计面临兼容性和效率方面的挑战。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 ComPASS，这是一种兼容的 PIM 协议和调度解决方案，可实现高效的处理器-PIM 集成。 ComPASS 引入了 PIM-ACT，这是一种新的内存命令，可同时触发多组激活和 PIM 操作，从而实现跨不同 PIM 架构的兼容性。它还在内存控制器内添加了一个 PIM 请求生成器，该生成器可以为所有符合 PIM-ACT 的 PIM 设备提供服务，从而避免特定于设备的集成。此外，ComPASS 支持架构感知优化，使每个 PIM 设备能够使用适合其架构的定制 PIM-ACT 配置，而不会影响兼容性。为了有效调度 PIM 和传统内存请求，ComPASS 提出了静态和自适应调度，可维持 PIM 吞吐量，同时为传统工作负载分配带宽，以提高整体系统效率。我们的评估表明，即使在与内存密集型 CPU 工作负载共同执行的情况下，ComPASS 在 LPDDR-PIM 上实现比非 PIM 环境高达 10.75 × GEMV 的加速，从而始终满足 PIM 性能目标，从而展示了效率和兼容性。

items.title: 3D-PATH: A Hierarchy LUT Processing-in-memory Accelerator with Thermal-aware Hybrid Bonding Integration.
items.abstract: LUT-based processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures enable general-purpose in-situ computing by retrieving precomputed results. However, they suffer from limited computing precision, redundancy, and high latency of off-table access. To address these challenges, we present 3D-PATH, a novel PIM architecture that employs 3D hybrid bonding to integrate a DRAM-LUT, enhancing system capacity and reducing access latency. To further optimize efficiency, 3D-PATH introduces a hierarchical fast-LUT design that reduces storage redundancy and accelerates computation. Additionally, 3D-PATH extends computing precision by efficiently supporting floating-point operations via representation transformation and parallel interleaving banks. While hybrid bonding offers significant benefits, it induces heat dissipation challenges. To address this, we implement thermal-aware hardware that ensures the DRAM Die temperature maintains below the threshold of 85°C. Evaluations on arithmetic and AI workloads demonstrate that 3D-PATH achieves up to 12.68 × higher throughput than GPUs and 2.27-7.54 × over prior LUT-PIMs, while delivering a 12.24 × improvement in floating-point energy efficiency over GPU and 2.13 × over a 3D baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 LUT 的内存处理 (PIM) 架构通过检索预先计算的结果来实现通用原位计算。然而，它们面临计算精度有限、冗余以及表外访问延迟高的问题。为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 3D-PATH，这是一种新颖的 PIM 架构，它采用 3D 混合绑定来集成 DRAM-LUT，从而增强系统容量并减少访问延迟。为了进一步优化效率，3D-PATH 引入了分层快速 LUT 设计，可减少存储冗余并加速计算。此外，3D-PATH 通过表示转换和并行交错库有效支持浮点运算，从而扩展了计算精度。虽然混合键合具有显着的优势，但它也带来了散热挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们实施了热感知硬件，确保 DRAM 芯片温度保持在 85°C 的阈值以下。对算术和 AI 工作负载的评估表明，3D-PATH 的吞吐量比 GPU 高 12.68 倍，比之前的 LUT-PIM 高 2.27-7.54 倍，同时浮点能效比 GPU 提高 12.24 倍，比 3D 基线提高 2.13 倍。

items.title: ColumnDisturb: Understanding Column-based Read Disturbance in Real DRAM Chips and Implications for Future Systems.
items.abstract:
We experimentally demonstrate a new widespread read disturbance phenomenon, ColumnDisturb, in real commodity DRAM chips. By repeatedly opening or keeping a DRAM row (aggressor row) open, we show that it is possible to disturb DRAM cells through a DRAM column (i.e., bitline) and induce bitflips in DRAM cells sharing the same columns as the aggressor row (across multiple DRAM subarrays). With ColumnDisturb, the activation of a single row concurrently disturbs DRAM cells across as many as three DRAM subarrays (e.g., up to 3072 DRAM rows in tested DDR4 DRAM chips) as opposed to RowHammer & RowPress, which affect only a few neighboring rows of the aggressor row in a single subarray. We rigorously and comprehensively characterize ColumnDisturb and its characteristics under various operational conditions (i.e., temperature, data pattern, DRAM timing parameters, average voltage level of the bitline, memory access pattern, and spatial variation) using 216 DDR4 and 4 HBM2 chips from three major DRAM manufacturers. Among our 27 key experimental observations, we highlight two major results and their implications.

First, ColumnDisturb affects chips from all three major DRAM manufacturers and worsens as DRAM technology scales down to smaller node sizes (e.g., the minimum time to induce the first ColumnDisturb bitflip reduces by up to 5.06 x and 2.96 x on average across all tested modules). We observe that, even in existing DRAM chips, ColumnDisturb induces bitflips within a nominal DDR4 refresh window (e.g., in 63.6 ms) in multiple cells from one module. We predict that, as DRAM technology node size reduces, ColumnDisturb would worsen in future DRAM chips, likely causing many more bitflips in the nominal refresh window. Second, beyond the nominal refresh window, ColumnDisturb induces bitflips in many (up to 198 x) more DRAM rows than retention failures. Therefore, ColumnDisturb has strong implications for existing retention-aware refresh mechanisms that aim to improve system performance and energy efficiency by leveraging the heterogeneity in DRAM cell retention times: our detailed analyses and cycle-level simulations show that ColumnDisturb greatly reduces and can completely diminish the performance and energy benefits of such mechanisms.

Our results have serious implications for the robustness of future DRAM-based computing systems due to continued aggressive DRAM technology scaling. We describe and evaluate two solutions for mitigating read disturbance bitflips in the presence of ColumnDisturb and call for more research on the topic.
items.abstract_zh:
我们在实际商用 DRAM 芯片中通过实验演示了一种新的广泛存在的读取干扰现象，即 ColumnDisturb。通过重复打开或保持 DRAM 行（攻击者行）打开，我们表明可以通过 DRAM 列（即位线）干扰 DRAM 单元，并在与攻击者行共享相同列（跨多个 DRAM 子阵列）的 DRAM 单元中引发位翻转。使用 ColumnDisturb，单行的激活会同时干扰多达三个 DRAM 子阵列（例如，测试的 DDR4 DRAM 芯片中多达 3072 个 DRAM 行）的 DRAM 单元，这与 RowHammer 和 RowPress 不同，后者仅影响单个子阵列中干扰行的几个相邻行。我们使用来自三大 DRAM 制造商的 216 个 DDR4 和 4 个 HBM2 芯片，严格、全面地表征了 ColumnDisturb 及其在各种操作条件（即温度、数据模式、DRAM 时序参数、位线平均电压电平、内存访问模式和空间变化）下的特性。在我们的 27 个关键实验观察中，我们重点介绍了两个主要结果及其含义。

首先，ColumnDisturb 会影响所有三个主要 DRAM 制造商的芯片，并且随着 DRAM 技术缩小到更小的节点尺寸，情况会变得更糟（例如，在所有测试的模块中，引发第一次 ColumnDisturb 位翻转的最短时间平均减少高达 5.06 倍和 2.96 倍）。我们观察到，即使在现有 DRAM 芯片中，ColumnDisturb 也会在一个模块的多个单元中的标称 DDR4 刷新窗口（例如 63.6 毫秒）内引发位翻转。我们预测，随着 DRAM 技术节点尺寸的减小，未来 DRAM 芯片中的 ColumnDisturb 将会恶化，可能会在标称刷新窗口中导致更多的位翻转。其次，超出标称刷新窗口，ColumnDisturb 会导致比保留故障多（最多 198 倍）的 DRAM 行中的位翻转。因此，ColumnDisturb 对现有的保留感知刷新机制具有重大影响，这些机制旨在通过利用 DRAM 单元保留时间的异质性来提高系统性能和能源效率：我们的详细分析和周期级模拟表明，ColumnDisturb 大大降低并可能完全削弱此类机制的性能和能源效益。

由于持续积极的 DRAM 技术扩展，我们的结果对未来基于 DRAM 的计算系统的稳健性产生了严重影响。我们描述并评估了在 ColumnDisturb 存在的情况下减轻读取干扰位翻转的两种解决方案，并呼吁对该主题进行更多研究。

items.title: TransFusion: End-to-End Transformer Acceleration via Graph Fusion and Pipelining.
items.abstract: Transformer acceleration has increasingly emphasized local fusion within isolated submodules, such as multi-head attention (MHA) and softmax. However, as Transformer models continue to scale in both depth and context length, such fragmented optimizations fail to address end-to-end inefficiencies across the full encoder/decoder stack. This paper presents TransFusion, a comprehensive framework for end-to-end Transformer layers, including QKV projections, MHA, LayerNorm, and FFN, as structured Einsum Cascades, enabling precise modelling of data dependencies and execution order. TransFusion introduces DPipe, a unified graph-based scheduler that partitions the Einsum-centric directed acyclic graph (DAG) and applies latency-aware pipelining across hardware hierarchies using dynamic programming (DP). To enable scalable execution under strict memory budgets, TransFusion integrates TileSeek, a Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS)-based tiling search algorithm that balances buffer reuse and system constraints. Evaluated across both cloud and edge architecture, TransFusion achieves up to an average of 1.6 × speedup on cloud and 2.2 × on edge over the prior state-of-the-art, FuseMax, by jointly optimizing inter-layer data reuse, intra-layer pipelining, and operator scheduling.
items.abstract_zh: Transformer 加速越来越强调孤立子模块内的局部融合，例如多头注意力 (MHA) 和 softmax。然而，随着 Transformer 模型在深度和上下文长度上不断扩展，这种碎片化的优化无法解决整个编码器/解码器堆栈中端到端的低效率问题。本文介绍了 TransFusion，这是一个端到端 Transformer 层的综合框架，包括 QKV 投影、MHA、LayerNorm 和 FFN，作为结构化 Einsum Cascades，能够对数据依赖性和执行顺序进行精确建模。 TransFusion 推出了 DPipe，这是一种基于图形的统一调度程序，它对以 Einsum 为中心的有向无环图 (DAG) 进行分区，并使用动态编程 (DP) 在硬件层次结构中应用延迟感知管道。为了在严格的内存预算下实现可扩展的执行，TransFusion 集成了 TileSeek，这是一种基于蒙特卡罗树搜索 (MCTS) 的平铺搜索算法，可平衡缓冲区重用和系统约束。通过云和边缘架构的评估，TransFusion 通过联合优化层间数据重用、层内流水线和算子调度，与之前最先进的 FuseMax 相比，在云上平均加速 1.6 倍，在边缘平均加速 2.2 倍。

items.title: Towards Closing the Performance Gap for Cryptographic Kernels Between CPUs and Specialized Hardware.
items.abstract:
Specialized hardware like application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs) remains the primary accelerator type for cryptographic kernels based on large integer arithmetic. Prior work has shown that commodity and server-class GPUs can achieve near-ASIC performance for these workloads. However, achieving comparable performance on CPUs remains an open challenge. This work investigates the following question: How can we narrow the performance gap between CPUs and specialized hardware for key cryptographic kernels like basic linear algebra subprograms (BLAS) operations and the number theoretic transform (NTT)?

To this end, we develop an optimized scalar implementation of these kernels for x86 CPUs at the per-core level. We utilize SIMD instructions—specifically AVX2 and AVX-512—to further improve performance, achieving an average speedup of 38 times and 62 times over state-of-the-art CPU baselines for NTTs and BLAS operations, respectively. To narrow the gap further, we propose a small AVX-512 extension, dubbed multi-word extension (MQX), which delivers substantial speedup with only three new instructions and minimal proposed hardware modifications. MQX cuts the slowdown relative to ASICs to as low as 35 times on a single CPU core. Finally, we perform a roofline analysis to evaluate the peak performance achievable with MQX when scaled across an entire multi-core CPU. Our results show that, with MQX, top-tier server-grade CPUs can approach the performance of state-of-the-art ASICs for cryptographic workloads.
items.abstract_zh:
专用集成电路 (ASIC) 等专用硬件仍然是基于大整数算术的加密内核的主要加速器类型。先前的研究表明，商用和服务器级 GPU 可以为这些工作负载实现接近 ASIC 的性能。然而，在 CPU 上实现可比较的性能仍然是一个开放的挑战。这项工作研究了以下问题：我们如何缩小 CPU 与关键加密内核（如基本线性代数子程序 (BLAS) 运算和数论变换 (NTT)）专用硬件之间的性能差距？

为此，我们在每个核心级别为 x86 CPU 开发了这些内核的优化标量实现。我们利用 SIMD 指令（特别是 AVX2 和 AVX-512）进一步提高性能，与最先进的 CPU 基准相比，NTT 和 BLAS 操作的平均加速分别提高了 38 倍和 62 倍。为了进一步缩小差距，我们提出了一个小型 AVX-512 扩展，称为多字扩展 (MQX)，它仅用三个新指令和最少的建议硬件修改即可提供显着的加速。 MQX 在单个 CPU 核心上将相对 ASIC 的速度降低至低至 35 倍。最后，我们执行屋顶线分析，以评估 MQX 在整个多核 CPU 上扩展时可实现的峰值性能。我们的结果表明，借助 MQX，顶级服务器级 CPU 可以在加密工作负载方面达到最先进 ASIC 的性能。

items.title: Sonar: A Hardware Fuzzing Framework to Uncover Contention Side Channels in Processors.
items.abstract:
Contention-based side channels, rooted in resource sharing, have emerged as a significant security threat in modern processors. These side channels allow attackers to leverage timing differences caused by conflicts in execution ports, caches, or interconnects to infer secret information such as cryptographic keys or enclave-resident data. Despite increasing awareness, detecting such channels remains challenging because triggering contentions requires precisely orchestrating specific microarchitectural states, which is often difficult in practice, especially for timing-sensitive contentions.

This paper introduces Sonar , the first systematic and automated fuzzing framework designed to uncover contention side channels in processors. Our core idea is to leverage microarchitectural states to guide testcase generation, enabling the precise triggering of microarchitectural events with stringent conditions. Sonar is built on the key observation that multiplexers (MUXes) are hotspots for contention, as resource contention frequently involves data routing and signal selection, which are fundamentally implemented by MUXes in circuits. We first identify contention-critical states with side channel risks based on MUXes, and then utilize these runtime states to directly guide testcase generation via fuzzing, progressively approaching and ultimately triggering contentions. Finally, we employ a dual-differential comparison method to efficiently detect contention-induced side channels and simulate attack scenarios to assess their exploitability.

Evaluated on two out-of-order RISC-V processors, Sonar uncovers 14 contention side channels, including 11 previously unknown. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of Sonar in uncovering potentially exploitable microarchitectural contentions.
items.abstract_zh:
植根于资源共享的基于争用的侧通道已成为现代处理器中的重大安全威胁。这些侧通道允许攻击者利用执行端口、缓存或互连冲突引起的时序差异来推断秘密信息，例如加密密钥或飞地驻留数据。尽管意识不断增强，检测此类通道仍然具有挑战性，因为触发争用需要精确编排特定的微架构状态，这在实践中通常很困难，特别是对于时间敏感的争用。

本文介绍了 Sonar，这是第一个系统化、自动化的模糊测试框架，旨在发现处理器中的争用侧通道。我们的核心思想是利用微架构状态来指导测试用例生成，从而能够在严格的条件下精确触发微架构事件。 Sonar 建立在以下关键观察之上：多路复用器 (MUX) 是争用热点，因为资源争用经常涉及数据路由和信号选择，而这些基本上是由电路中的 MUX 实现的。我们首先基于 MUX 识别具有侧通道风险的争用关键状态，然后利用这些运行时状态通过模糊测试直接指导测试用例生成，逐步接近并最终触发争用。最后，我们采用双差分比较方法来有效检测争用引起的侧信道并模拟攻击场景以评估其可利用性。

在两个无序 RISC-V 处理器上进行评估后，Sonar 发现了 14 个争用侧通道，其中包括 11 个以前未知的通道。这些结果证明了声纳在发现潜在可利用的微架构争用方面的有效性。

items.title: OneAdapt: Resource-Adaptive Compilation of Measurement-Based Quantum Computing for Photonic Hardware.
items.abstract: Measurement-based quantum computing (MBQC), a.k.a. one-way quantum computing (1WQC), is a universal quantum computing model, which is particularly well-suited for photonic platforms. In this model, computation is driven by measurements on an entangled state, which serves as an intermediate representation (IR) between programs and hardware. However, compilers on previous IRs lack adaptivity to resource constraints in photonic quantum computers. In this work, we propose a novel IR with new optimization passes, realizing a compiler that minimizes execution time while being adaptive to the hardware size, to the number of delay lines, and to whether the hardware can support the additional flexibility in the IR or not. Moreover, our optimization can be integrated with quantum error correction (QEC) to improve the efficiency of photonic fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC).
items.abstract_zh: 基于测量的量子计算 (MBQC)，又名单向量子计算 (1WQC)，是一种通用量子计算模型，特别适合光子平台。在此模型中，计算由纠缠态测量驱动，纠缠态充当程序和硬件之间的中间表示 (IR)。然而，以前的 IR 上的编译器缺乏对光子量子计算机中资源限制的适应性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有新优化通道的新型 IR，实现了一种编译器，可以最大限度地减少执行时间，同时适应硬件大小、延迟线数量以及硬件是否可以支持 IR 中的额外灵活性。此外，我们的优化可以与量子纠错（QEC）相结合，以提高光子容错量子计算（FTQC）的效率。

items.title: Characterizing and Optimizing Realistic Workloads on a Commercial Compute-in-SRAM Device.
items.abstract:
Compute-in-SRAM architectures offer a promising approach to achieving higher performance and energy efficiency across a range of data-intensive applications. However, prior evaluations have largely relied on simulators or small prototypes, limiting the understanding of their real-world potential. In this work, we present a comprehensive performance and energy characterization of a commercial compute-in-SRAM device, the GSI APU, under realistic workloads. We compare the GSI APU against established architectures, including CPUs and GPUs, to quantify its energy efficiency and performance potential. We introduce an analytical framework for general-purpose compute-in-SRAM devices that reveals fundamental optimization principles by modeling performance trade-offs, thereby guiding program optimizations.

Exploiting the fine-grained parallelism of tightly integrated memory-compute architectures requires careful data management. We address this by proposing three optimizations: communication-aware reduction mapping, coalesced DMA, and broadcast-friendly data layouts. When applied to retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over large corpora (10GB–200GB), these optimizations enable our compute-in-SRAM system to accelerate retrieval by 4.8 × –6.6 × over an optimized CPU baseline, improving end-to-end RAG latency by 1.1 × –1.8 ×. The shared off-chip memory bandwidth is modeled using a simulated HBM, while all other components are measured on the real compute-in-SRAM device. Critically, this system matches the performance of an NVIDIA A6000 GPU for RAG while being significantly more energy-efficient (54.4 × -117.9 × reduction). These findings validate the viability of compute-in-SRAM for complex, real-world applications and provide guidance for advancing the technology.
items.abstract_zh:
SRAM 计算架构提供了一种有前景的方法，可以在一系列数据密集型应用中实现更高的性能和能源效率。然而，之前的评估很大程度上依赖于模拟器或小型原型，限制了对其现实世界潜力的理解。在这项工作中，我们展示了商业 SRAM 计算设备 GSI APU 在实际工作负载下的综合性能和能耗特征。我们将 GSI APU 与现有架构（包括 CPU 和 GPU）进行比较，以量化其能源效率和性能潜力。我们引入了一个用于通用 SRAM 计算设备的分析框架，该框架通过对性能权衡建模来揭示基本优化原理，从而指导程序优化。

利用紧密集成的内存计算架构的细粒度并行性需要仔细的数据管理。我们通过提出三种优化来解决这个问题：通信感知缩减映射、合并 DMA 和广播友好的数据布局。当应用于大型语料库（10GB–200GB）上的检索增强生成（RAG）时，这些优化使我们的 SRAM 计算系统能够在优化的 CPU 基准上将检索速度提高 4.8 × –6.6 ×，从而将端到端 RAG 延迟缩短 1.1 × –1.8 ×。共享片外内存带宽使用模拟 HBM 进行建模，而所有其他组件均在真实的 SRAM 计算设备上测量。重要的是，该系统与 RAG 的 NVIDIA A6000 GPU 的性能相匹配，同时能效显着提高（减少 54.4 × -117.9 ×）。这些发现验证了 SRAM 计算对于复杂的现实应用的可行性，并为推进该技术提供了指导。

items.title: ATR: Out-of-Order Register Release Exploiting Atomic Regions.
items.abstract:
Modern superscalar processors require large physical register files to support a high number of in-flight instructions, which is crucial for achieving higher ILP and IPC. Conventional register renaming techniques release physical registers conservatively, waiting until the instruction that redefines the same architectural register commits, which results in inefficient register utilization. In particular, registers frequently remain allocated for many cycles although they are no longer in-use. To address this deficiency, previous approaches have explored early register release, which aims to free registers as soon as they have been fully consumed. However, these techniques are either unsafe or conservative, limiting the benefits.

We observe that over 17% of all allocated registers in SPEC2017int and 13% in SPEC2017fp are located within atomic commit regions , sequences that do not include conditional branches nor exception-causing instructions. Instructions within such regions are guaranteed to atomically commit or flush together, allowing safe early release of the registers allocated by the first instruction of a region. In particular, registers can be released without waiting for the redefining instruction of the architectural register to commit. We propose a novel renaming technique that leverages this insight to reduce register file pressure. Our technique enables out-of-order register release by identifying atomic commit regions using a simple mechanism that requires no stacks, queues, extra memory, or shadow cells. We show that, for SPEC2017int benchmarks, the proposed register renaming scheme achieves an average speedup of 5.13% for a 64-entry, and 1.48% for a 224-entry register file.
items.abstract_zh:
现代超标量处理器需要大型物理寄存器文件来支持大量运行中指令，这对于实现更高的 ILP 和 IPC 至关重要。传统的寄存器重命名技术保守地释放物理寄存器，等待重新定义相同架构寄存器的指令提交，这导致寄存器利用率低下。特别是，寄存器经常在许多周期内保持分配状态，尽管它们不再使用。为了解决这个缺陷，以前的方法已经探索了早期寄存器释放，其目的是在寄存器被完全消耗后立即释放它们。然而，这些技术要么不安全，要么保守，限制了其益处。

我们观察到，SPEC2017int 中超过 17% 的所有已分配寄存器和 SPEC2017fp 中的 13% 位于原子提交区域内，即不包含条件分支也不包含引发异常的指令的序列。这些区域内的指令保证以原子方式提交或刷新在一起，从而允许安全地提前释放由区域的第一条指令分配的寄存器。特别地，无需等待架构寄存器的重定义指令提交就可以释放寄存器。我们提出了一种新颖的重命名技术，利用这种见解来减少寄存器文件压力。我们的技术通过使用不需要堆栈、队列、额外内存或影子单元的简单机制来识别原子提交区域，从而实现无序寄存器释放。我们表明，对于 SPEC2017int 基准测试，所提出的寄存器重命名方案对于 64 条目的寄存器文件实现了 5.13% 的平均加速，对于 224 条目的寄存器文件实现了 1.48% 的平均加速。

items.title: AxCore: A Quantization-Aware Approximate GEMM Unit for LLM Inference.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become foundational to modern natural language processing, yet their immense computational and memory demands pose major obstacles for efficient inference. Transformer-based LLMs rely heavily on floating-point general matrix-matrix multiplication (FP-GEMM), which dominates both compute and bandwidth. In this paper, we introduce AxCore, a quantization-aware, approximate GEMM unit that combines weight-only quantization with floating-point multiplication approximation (FPMA) to deliver highly efficient and accurate LLM inference. Unlike traditional GEMM units, AxCore eliminates multipliers entirely, replacing them with low-bit integer additions in a novel systolic array. AxCore features several key innovations: (1) a mixed-precision FPMA-based processing element that supports direct computation on compressed weights and high-precision activations; (2) a lightweight accuracy preservation strategy, including subnormal number handling, error compensation, and format-aware quantization; and (3) a set of systolic array optimizations, including shared correction and normalization logic. Evaluations on open-source LLMs show that AxCore achieves up to 6.3 × -12.5 × higher compute density than conventional FP GEMM units. Compared to state-of-the-art INT4-based accelerators, FIGLUT and FIGNA, AxCore improves compute density by 53% and 70%, respectively, while also delivering lower perplexity. AxCore is opensourced at: https://github.com/CLab-HKUST-GZ/micro58-axcore.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 已成为现代自然语言处理的基础，但其巨大的计算和内存需求对高效推理造成了重大障碍。基于 Transformer 的 LLM 严重依赖浮点通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (FP-GEMM)，它在计算和带宽方面占据主导地位。在本文中，我们介绍了 AxCore，这是一种量化感知的近似 GEMM 单元，它将仅权重量化与浮点乘法近似 (FPMA) 相结合，以提供高效且准确的 LLM 推理。与传统的 GEMM 单元不同，AxCore 完全消除了乘法器，用新颖的脉动阵列中的低位整数加法代替它们。 AxCore具有几项关键创新：（1）基于混合精度FPMA的处理元件，支持压缩权重和高精度激活的直接计算； (2) 轻量级精度保存策略，包括次正规数处理、误差补偿和格式感知量化； (3)一组脉动阵列优化，包括共享校正和归一化逻辑。对开源 LLM 的评估表明，AxCore 的计算密度比传统 FP GEMM 单元高出 6.3 × -12.5 ×。与最先进的基于 INT4 的加速器Figlut 和Figna 相比，AxCore 的计算密度分别提高了 53% 和 70%，同时还降低了困惑度。 AxCore 开源于：https://github.com/CLab-HKUST-GZ/micro58-axcore。

items.title: PolymorPIC: Embedding Polymorphic Processing-in-Cache in RISC-V based Processor for Full-stack Efficient AI Inference.
items.abstract:
The growing demand for neural network (NN) driven applications in AIoT devices necessitates efficient matrix multiplication (MM) acceleration. While domain-specific accelerators (DSAs) for NN are widely used, their large area overhead of dedicated buffers and low reusability limit cost-effectiveness. Processing-in-cache (PIC) architectures address this by repurposing existing SRAMs in processor caches for MM computation, eliminating dedicated DSA areas while retaining programmability. Despite its potential, PIC designs often overlook fundamental system-level issues, e.g ., compactness, programmability, coherence, and scheduling optimization.

In this work, we introduce PolymorPIC , a polymorphic architecture designed to accelerate MM directly within the cache using a bit-serial computing pattern. First, we propose a reconfigurable and processor-safe PIC architecture based on homogeneous memory arrays (HMAs), programmed through a meticulously designed interfaces in our software stack. Next, to enable mode switch of cache between cache mode and PIC mode, we develop a coherence strategy that ensures rapid, flexible, and processor-safe PIC. Moreover, we conduct scheduling optimization to maximize the NN acceleration performance of PolymorPIC . Ultimately, the PolymorPIC architecture is implemented on a RISC-V-based system-on-chip (SoC) and successfully end-to-end verified on a validation platform with an operating system running . Evaluation results show that by only introducing 11.5% area overhead for a single-core Out-of-Order processor (BOOM) with 1MB cache, PolymorPIC can improve the energy efficiency (TOPS/W) of multiple NNs by 1543.8 × on average. Compared to system-level implementation of using NPU as co-processor (Gemmini), PolymorPIC outperforms it by 3.76 × in area efficiency and 3.9 × in energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh:
AIoT 设备中对神经网络 (NN) 驱动的应用的需求不断增长，需要高效的矩阵乘法 (MM) 加速。虽然神经网络的特定领域加速器 (DSA) 被广泛使用，但其专用缓冲区的大面积开销和低可重用性限制了成本效益。缓存中处理 (PIC) 架构通过重新利用处理器缓存中的现有 SRAM 进行 MM 计算来解决这个问题，消除专用的 DSA 区域，同时保留可编程性。尽管 PIC 设计具有潜力，但它常常忽视基本的系统级问题，例如紧凑性、可编程性、一致性和调度优化。

在这项工作中，我们引入了 PolymorPIC，这是一种多态架构，旨在使用位串行计算模式直接在缓存内加速 MM。首先，我们提出了一种基于同质存储器阵列 (HMA) 的可重构且处理器安全的 PIC 架构，通过我们的软件堆栈中精心设计的接口进行编程。接下来，为了实现高速缓存模式和 PIC 模式之间的高速缓存模式切换，我们开发了一种一致性策略，以确保快速、灵活和处理器安全的 PIC。此外，我们还进行调度优化，以最大限度地提高 PolymorPIC 的神经网络加速性能。最终，PolymorPIC 架构在基于 RISC-V 的片上系统 (SoC) 上实现，并在运行操作系统的验证平台上成功进行了端到端验证。评估结果表明，对于具有 1MB 缓存的单核乱序处理器 (BOOM) 仅引入 11.5% 的面积开销，PolymorPIC 即可将多个神经网络的能源效率 (TOPS/W) 平均提高 1543.8 倍。与使用 NPU 作为协处理器的系统级实现（Gemmini）相比，PolymorPIC 在面积效率方面优于其 3.76 倍，在能源效率方面优于其 3.9 倍。

items.title: S-DMA: Sparse Diffusion Models Acceleration via Spatiality-Aware Prediction and Dimension-Adaptive Dataflow.
items.abstract: Diffusion Models (DMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance in a variety of image generation tasks. However, their complex architectures and intensive computations result in significant overhead and latency, posing challenges for hardware deployment. To address these issues, researchers have explored the sparsity in DMs to reduce computational workloads, including semantic sparsity in image generation and spatial sparsity in local editing. Unfortunately, existing sparsity prediction methods face critical limitations in deployment: 1) additional prediction overheads offset the benefits of sparsity; 2) convolution and general matrix multiplication (GEMM) exhibit distinct sparsity patterns, which current co-design frameworks struggle to process. In this paper, we introduce S-DMA, a software-hardware co-design framework that unifies efficient sparsity prediction while supporting various sparse operators. First, we propose a spatiality-aware similarity computation method that leverages the local similarity of images, reducing the computational complexity of sparsity prediction from O( N 2 ) to O( N ). Second, we implement NAND-based similarity for sparsity prediction, which minimizes the computational overheads and ensures adaptability to different sparsity schemes. Finally, a dedicated hardware architecture is designed to efficiently leverage the algorithm optimizations. A NAND-based sparsity prediction processing unit is designed to adaptively handle the sparsity patterns. Additionally, a sparsity-aware reduction network and a dimension-adaptive dataflow are employed to support convolution and GEMM with different DM sparsity patterns. Experimental results demonstrate that S-DMA achieves up to 51.11 × speedup and 43.87 × higher energy efficiency than NVIDIA A100 GPU. Compared to state-of-the-art DM accelerators, S-DMA achieves up to 7.05 × speedup and 3.19 × higher energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 扩散模型 (DM) 在各种图像生成任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，其复杂的架构和密集的计算导致大量的开销和延迟，给硬件部署带来了挑战。为了解决这些问题，研究人员探索了 DM 中的稀疏性以减少计算工作量，包括图像生成中的语义稀疏性和本地编辑中的空间稀疏性。不幸的是，现有的稀疏性预测方法在部署中面临着严重的限制：1）额外的预测开销抵消了稀疏性的好处； 2）卷积和通用矩阵乘法（GEMM）表现出独特的稀疏模式，当前的协同设计框架难以处理。在本文中，我们介绍了 S-DMA，这是一种软件硬件协同设计框架，它统一了高效的稀疏性预测，同时支持各种稀疏算子。首先，我们提出了一种空间感知相似度计算方法，该方法利用图像的局部相似度，将稀疏预测的计算复杂度从 O( N 2 ) 降低到 O( N )。其次，我们实现了基于 NAND 的相似性来进行稀疏性预测，这最大限度地减少了计算开销并确保了对不同稀疏性方案的适应性。最后，设计了专用硬件架构来有效利用算法优化。基于 NAND 的稀疏性预测处理单元被设计用于自适应地处理稀疏性模式。此外，还采用稀疏感知缩减网络和维度自适应数据流来支持具有不同 DM 稀疏模式的卷积和 GEMM。实验结果表明，S-DMA 比 NVIDIA A100 GPU 实现了高达 51.11 倍的加速比和 43.87 倍的能效。与最先进的 DM 加速器相比，S-DMA 可实现高达 7.05 倍的加速比和 3.19 倍的能效。
